name: Dr Neil Shah
subject: I Just Took Ivermectin
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Dr
body:
| [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_just_took_ivermectin&n=1) Peter, Your personal health decisions are being decided by the government. That’s not only frightening, but it's anti-American! The medical industrial complex, mainstream media and social media giants are in bed with the government over this massive expansion of tyranny. It’s so bad these days that good information about how to combat COVID is being censored. Meanwhile, the propaganda for vaccine mandates is promoted constantly. You deserve to get the information that can help you and your family. This is why I decided to be open and honest about my positive COVID test this week, how vaccination didn’t stop me from contracting it, and to discuss what I’m doing to treat the symptoms. **The media and the political class are not going to like this message. But it’s the truth. I’m taking Ivermectin to treat my symptoms.**
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6rdu3t7F11lVK5qeu9KzziVz8jC-LgxEI62vmX14yFCgKpjG-E_WD66wHWYaBok2Dg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_just_took_ivermectin&n=2)

If you contract COVID, you should treat it - not just sit on that diagnosis. Monoclonal antibodies are a very effective treatment. I like what Ron Desantis is doing down in Florida by making them readily available. In fact, he’s been so effective that the Biden administration now wants to cut off his supply. Unfortunately, Walz isn’t leading like Desantis, and the supply is somewhat limited in Minnesota. So I decided to leave that supply to older patients who need them more than me. **Instead, I’m using Ivermectin, which is what the lying media calls a “horse dewormer”. I call it evidence based medicine. Ivermectin is an effective treatment for mild and moderate cases of COVID particularly when used early. FLCCC has a **[**good protocol**](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=WqQOFUIr_fCy6woKbIQ65QePrzRa2uaC7HcX8LfrneNQSZZU5rrvsUNXUq3CLEkqUZwOhY0-dCzGH3NPV9qGEyXmuiYpNlO21wixKm031AFOksnIlRG4whb9ugtBr58YdqWyuJnYhJiKUYcRDZjIIQ&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_just_took_ivermectin&n=3)**to follow.** One of the greatest tragedies of the COVID pandemic has been the willful ignorance of off-patent, cheap, older drugs, such as Ivermectin, that have proven effective at every level from test tubes, to randomized trials to epidemiological studies. These drugs could have saved millions of lives if they were used worldwide as aggressively as they were used in parts of India and a few other countries. Unfortunately, these drugs have two fatal flaws. First, they’re off-patent and thus cheap. While Pfizer makes billions of dollars off of their vaccines, and Merck stands to make even more over their new drug molnupiravir, a safe, off-patent medication like Ivermectin costs pennies per pill. Second, the public health complex has turned into a vaccine-only cult. Despite evidence that the COVID vaccines are no longer effective at protecting against infection or spread of infection, they continue to push a ‘vaccine only’ plan to beat back COVID. Vaccines alone, particularly poor performing vaccines like the COVID vaccines, will never be able to control COVID. They certainly have their role in reducing the risk of death for high-risk individuals, but they do not prevent one from contracting or spreading COVID: I’m living proof of this fact. I’m not alone, in the UK the vaccinated in most age groups are nearly [twice as likely to become infected with COVID](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=DaCDBEFJKvGygj0H15jbuOW1Ykdt3_TYzT5VpCaQEIiXl0FwvzZAR5JgpuekzwNwIKGTyH2qTI--4ycHp02a0iuxAvCjR27JYMfD28qIgpoZUetL-7sXbJg6GAw85x3DrNjYcYUOY5c_auqemRZ04RD3p3KYAs2JP0ozDbZzc1bwCkg8b6vqjGFbDIQsQinT&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_just_took_ivermectin&n=4) as are the unvaccinated. **You and I have a legitimate beef with the media and government for silencing, or even distorting, important information about treating COVID. Look at this tweet about Ivermectin from the FDA that is funded by YOUR tax dollars!**
We MUST stop this campaign to silence us. And we absolutely must protect health freedom against the Biden/Walz vaccine mandates. But we can’t rely on career politicians to get the job done. I’m running to be your governor to Save Minnesota from the same career politicians who continue to bow down to the medical industrial complex and mainstream media. If we want to get rid of Tim Walz who is destroying this state, we must use a new playbook. I’m not afraid to take on these big issues and I would welcome a debate with Tim Walz on the science...any day of the week! **Please stay connected with our campaign to see how we plan to Fire Walz. Also, we had to cancel a fundraising event up in St Cloud since testing positive. But if you would like to**[**help our campaign to Save Minnesota from career politicians, please donate $25, $50 or even $100**](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_just_took_ivermectin&n=5)**.** Sincerely, Dr. Neil Shah Conservative Candidate for Governor [http://www.electneil.com/](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_just_took_ivermectin&n=6) Prepared and paid for by the Dr. Neil Shah for Governor Committee, 855 Village Center Dr #245, North Oaks, MN 55127
---
-=-=- Dr. Neil Shah for Governor · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_just_took_ivermectin&n=7). -=-=-
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_just_took_ivermectin&n=8), software for leaders.

subject: We can’t let #DeathSantis fail America like he failed Florida

body:
Every Democrat has a stake in ensuring he loses reelection
| [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/2935?t=6&akid=601%2E564421%2ELBNdBe) Friend -- MAGA Gov. Ron DeSantis has failed Florida. And that’s because _he’s more concerned with running for president in 2024 than protecting his constituents._

**We can’t let Gov. DeSantis fail America like he failed Florida,** so we need to defeat him _now_. He’s running for reelection in 2022, and every Democrat in America has a stake in ensuring he loses. [**Team -- that’s why I’m running to RETIRE MAGA Gov. DeSantis! The polls show I can win this thing! But only if Democrats like you join the fight. That’s why I’m asking you to split a donation between my campaign and the good folks at Ron Be Gone NOW »**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/2937?t=8&akid=601%2E564421%2ELBNdBe) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/2943?t=14&akid=601%2E564421%2ELBNdBe)

Gov. DeSantis is on the wrong side of every critical issue, including voting rights!

Back in May, he signed SB 90, a voter suppression bill similar to the infamous law in Georgia.

This bill made it **harder** for Floridians to vote by mail, **limited** drop boxes, and even **criminalized** offering food and water to people waiting in line to vote!

_Gov. DeSantis is so corrupt that he’s willing to engage in voter suppression just to protect his own political future._ That’s unacceptable -- and unAmerican.

Team, I’ve spent my entire career in public service living by one mantra: “people over politics.” But it seems Gov. Ron DeSantis has gotten that mantra switched around.
[**We must defeat Gov. DeSantis in 2022! Please, can you split a donation between my campaign and Ron Be Gone? This might be the most important donation you make all year! »**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/2937?t=18&akid=601%2E564421%2ELBNdBe)

body:
it might flip. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miV04tp4Fy6FnycaH8AsjDGD44ANBY59otdej9t8__oRZHMTzQUdXpIf_77MtG0KpISrW_KvlWL1OoGEUpVqAj1sYLbxleU8MMbzOfMYNM4pVopo-TBh-8GFGJ-vh4xHgJPi382z4GH7uAgfoHY6FtxeH8YKpMKYjS00-tFF_PQtyhONDbIGpYCbCzL0WK-gJRggnb85FA8RIyLStI2SN5SO5OIZUzENDbMfSXWKv6KhodXKkNGmm07VoZ2qkUUDXeyhswTifT5VVcjzOX1GzIeZgKE7ilHroX5S_Wa-OyyFqFG6FSY0avqdvLsqnSz6KwiEo2mK0Tuaf2EmKD92oqvg/3g6/jogja-sFRGGNh6gNibVeNw/h0/8dykQX_u-0kNWaCJwHPDiS2Puz4UAkmsjVFg1Cj5HMc)
Derek, we can’t believe this is happening. Trumpism is headed for a comeback in Virginia. Right now, Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate for Governor of Virginia, Glenn Youngkin, is **_LEADING_** in some polls. Not only that, but national Republicans are pouring money into Virginia to **_out-organize_** Democrats, and **_Republican enthusiasm is at an all time HIGH._**

What’s happening?!

_The Washington Post_ is saying Democrats in Virginia aren’t waking up to how close this election is going to be. If things continue to go the way they’re going right now, Trumpism is going to sweep across Virginia, and we can kiss blue Virginia goodbye.

body:
we don't mean to alarm you, but everything is on the line.
| | | _**We told you**_ House Republicans need to flip just **FIVE** seats to take back the Majority.

_**We told you**_ they're polling **AHEAD** of our House Democrats.

_**And we told you**_ they're **SHATTERING** fundraising records left and right.

**[We don't know what else to say -- because even after all our warnings, we're STILL short of our MUST-HIT Mid Month goal! NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com
| | [**Chip in $3 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/gpgkTRE-)

__](https://links.e.dccc.)

We don't mean to alarm you -- but everything is on the line, from health care to the climate to our very democracy.

Republicans have promised to do **WHATEVER** it takes to destroy Speaker Pelosi's House Majority.

_And we 'll be blunt: Right now, they've got the momentum and money to do it. _

**So we 're calling on 4,500 grassroots Democrats to rise up and help us turn the tide to show House Republicans that our Democratic House Majority is here to stay.**

name: Troy Newman, Operation Rescue
subject: Sign the National Petition to Defund Planned Parenthood
body:
Thanks to their allies in Big Tech and the liberal media, Planned Parenthood has managed to slip from the headlines since I help
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2kqi4bo5bkqhnmej0e49upps86os369qujdeqqo_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9ieaor4clh2bs) Fellow Pro-Life American, Thanks to their allies in Big Tech and the liberal media, Planned Parenthood has managed to slip from the headlines since I helped uncover their cash-for-baby-body parts scheme five years ago. But just because the radical left is suppressing content online and refuses to tell the truth about the radical abortion lobby ... that doesn’t mean they’ve cleaned up their act. **Far from it! ** While I was exposing Planned Parenthood’s crimes, and was found liable in a San Francisco court for $17 million in damages in a historic pro-life case, the federal government — with partial funding of Anthony Fauci’s National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases — **_was supporting research to graft the scalps of unborn babies who were just 17 to 20 weeks old onto lab rats and mice to see if they’d keep growing._** [**We MUST demand that Congress act NOW to Defund Planned Parenthood and end the senseless murder of unborn children and STOP using these innocent lives in the name of "research." Please sign the petition right away!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbbclmt59bolbmauhj1bdsab7cb5b13dc76ev3go_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9ieaor4clh2bs) [**Sign the Petition**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1jllg11ts26ae6rj2333rreg7mlpsoa2tbt8jso_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9ieaor4clh2bs) Right now, the radical abortionists are coming after life in new and horrific ways. They’re passing legislation aimed at expanding access to late-term abortion and infanticide, and they’re ramping up the number of pill mills across the nation. On top of it all, they’re working to **DESTROY** threats to their business — like me. Not long ago, they won a hard-fought battle against me in court, which cost Operation Rescue hundreds of thousands of dollars and hundreds of hours of our time. My team and I are on the ground every day exposing the radical abortion lobby and **SHUTTING THEM DOWN** , but now that Planned Parenthood has picked up their pace — and is now focused on opening pill mills over surgical facilities — we must ensure that Congress does their part by taking away all federal funding from these monsters. [**To help save innocent lives and ensure our tax dollars don’t fund Planned Parenthood in ANY manner, I need you to sign this national petition today.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp4m3codbgcnesi7nd8d9uuh8q3kaqlbdmdu9p8o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9ieaor4clh2bs) Over the last ten years, the number of surgical abortion clinics **decreased by 35 percent**. While this is fantastic — and in part thanks to the work we do at Operation Rescue to expose the abortion industry, shut down dangerous facilities, and put abortionists out of work — what’s very troubling is that Planned Parenthood has recently _shifted strategy._ [**_Medication abortion facilities —_** **_which are dispensaries for abortion-inducing drugs — have become the reliable “cash cow” for the abortion industry. And they’re popping up at an alarming rate!_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcii90c308hr241fr3ffs1lu64j494flnv4aupag_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9ieaor4clh2bs) That is why we must **INCREASE** our efforts this year to ensure that we can keep up with the pace of murder-pill mills AND pressure Congress to take every taxpayer dollar away from Planned Parenthood. [**Please help today by signing this national petition. It will only take a moment of your time and the impact will be huge.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zupips4jnujg73db0lkeap6g7he42upbpapf1b90_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9ieaor4clh2bs) [**Sign the Petition**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm7j0ou3u85rfuihvrkg1l14p1ovko4g846uh4vg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9ieaor4clh2bs) Thank you for your support, God bless you, Troy Newman President P.O. Box 782888 • Wichita, KS 67278
---

name: GOP Presidential
subject: A dangerous ideology
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that sup
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbrvr236qf95hksl4a3qn8n9mokqshks7qhakpbg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9ieeob6c1h2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z85vjlaftl50dto8kkv9djlnhis0egi7vtph5jhg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9ieeob6c1h2bs)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zoi7hhbq2eedtvshhd3cm4mjmktjl4cibmbaqdco_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9ieeob6c1h2bs)
---
Warm Regards,

clean_body: Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that sup | | | | | This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | Warm Regards, Larry P. name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: This is about defending democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37555950/311613822/-2023814932?refcode=20211015.2_TM_10DH&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzY2OWQ1My1hZDJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s4aze2YUbhBFgPqDeHbRG9x9kcgDhNXcj4vWyDBuzN4=)

| | Derek,

I firmly believe that the role _— the duty —_ of the Governor of Virginia is to unite people. To bring about unity in times of division. And above all, to do the morally right thing, especially when others won’t.

After he failed to condemn Donald Trump and his ‘big lie’ rally, it’s clear Glenn Youngkin doesn’t hold those values.

From day one of his campaign, Youngkin has pushed Donald Trump’s lies about the 2020 election. He’s peddled dangerous conspiracy theories and keeps cozying up to Trump’s most extreme supporters.

**This is not who we are as Virginians — or as Americans. And we must not stand for this hateful, divisive rhetoric. This is about safeguarding the values that make this country what it is.**

**[That’s why, right now, I am launching a three-day fundraising goal for our Defend Democracy Fund. Will you help me raise $1,000,000 by midnight on Sunday? Everything we raise will go directly toward getting out the vote in this election — because the best way to defend our democracy is to participate in it. I am humbly asking for your support today:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37555951/311613823/-2023814932?refcode=20211015.2_TM_10DH&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzY2OWQ1My1hZDJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s4aze2YUbhBFgPqDeHbRG9x9kcgDhNXcj4vWyDBuzN4=)** | | | **[DONATE $15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37555952/311613824/-2023814932?refcode=20211015.2_TM_10DH&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzY2OWQ1My1hZDJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s4aze2YUbhBFgPqDeHbRG9x9kcgDhNXcj4vWyDBuzN4=)**

****
January 6 was one of the darkest days in our history. We watched as our Capitol was desecrated. Police officers were killed. And our democracy was under siege.

Trump’s rally for Youngkin this week was another dark day. Attendees actually celebrated the insurrection by saying the pledge of allegiance to a flag that was used to try and bring down democracy — _the very democracy which that American flag symbolizes._

Glenn Youngkin saw January 6 just like the rest of us. His complacency in undermining American democracy is unacceptable.

**Derek, he is not fit to be Governor of Virginia.**

[**I’m asking you right now to stand up for our democracy and support my campaign by chipping in whatever amount makes sense for you. Together, we will build a movement that unites us and keeps our Commonwealth moving forward.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37555958/311613830/-2023814932?refcode=20211015.2_TM_10DH&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzY2OWQ1My1hZDJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s4aze2YUbhBFgPqDeHbRG9x9kcgDhNXcj4vWyDBuzN4=)

In solidarity,

Terry McAuliffe

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: 9 felonies for exposing Planned Parenthood
body:
I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot.
_Sponsored message_
Dear Friend, I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. You may remember David as the undercover journalist who spent 30 months investigating and capturing video evidence of Planned Parenthood 's top leadership --- medical directors, national program directors, even its Senior Director of Medical Services -- **callously negotiating the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts.** **And now, he’s been charged with nine bogus felonies.** **[Which is why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zq0odve0p1em63g71scngs81027am3rhfj5t101g_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9ie9oj4c5h2bs)** You see, after David released the shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David... _**... Kamala Harris even ordered the California Department of Justice to raid David's home and confiscate his unpublished videos.**_ I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces steep fines and years in state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. While Kamala Harris --- a bought-and-paid-for ally of the abortion industry --- is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency. That's the bad news. But here's the good news... David is fighting back. In fact, he's taking another opportunity to drag more of Planned Parenthood's dark criminality into the spotlight with two new federal lawsuits. That's right. The Thomas More Society has filed a federal civil rights lawsuit in California on behalf of David against former California Attorney General and now VicePresident Kamala Harris for prosecuting David in bad faith, twisting and perverting California's anti-eavesdropping law to persecute a citizen journalist because of his political views. Then the Thomas More Society filed a defamation (libel) lawsuit in federal court in New York against Planned Parenthood, which said David created a "fake" and "false" "smear campaign" against Planned Parenthood. In other words, the best defense is a good offense. The truth is we could no longer let David suffer such a trampling of his free speech and due process rights without a counterattack. The timing couldn't be more important. This is a critical opportunity to put Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the rest of the abortion industry on trial for conspiring to silence David in order to cover-up their illegal activities. **[That's where your emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND comes in --- by giving today you can stand with David in his hour of need.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z4btpj7s8u0e2cjvbdi1jrqsv5pnuhdg9efiog30_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9ie9oj4c5h2bs)** The reality is. . . You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini." You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit. You couldn't be there when the videos were released and Kamala Harris and Planned Parenthood conspired to crush David with trumped up legal charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment. And you couldn't be there with David (our criminal defense team was there) when he voluntarily appeared in both Texas and California for booking and processing --- fingerprinted and photographed for a mugshot like a common criminal. But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do. **[You can make an emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND to help vindicate this pro-life hero.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ztc223eg5r92881hokpq20p6a6q79fs0le3k71m0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9ie9oj4c5h2bs)** My name is Tom Brejcha. I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society --- a not-for-profit law firm underwriting and helping to spearhead David's criminal defense. The Thomas More Society is proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, former Kansas Attorney General Phill Kline, the March for Life, and many more. Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **we fight back.** I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach. But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in Pro-Life courage. Now I'll get right down to it... **We anticipate David's legal defense will cost us more than $6 million. That's right, SIX MILLION DOLLARS.** In addition to the criminal case and the new federal civil rights and defamation lawsuits, we're currently representing David in THREE other cases.
* The civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood where we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with the judge's order permanently banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. Recently, we posted a $700,000 appeal bond to keep Planned Parenthood’s nasty collection agents from harassing him with collection agents and even seizing his belongings. We’re fighting back, but we’ll need your help.

* The civil lawsuit brought by the National Abortion Federation and the "gag order" injunction that still prohibits David from releasing any more of his video evidence exposing Planned Parenthood's illegal fetal tissue business. And now, in light of the Planned Parenthood civil lawsuit, NAF has moved for summary judgment – they want a ruling against David without a trial at all!

* And finally, the civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood personnel in federal court in Seattle, where we just achieved a victory for a second time on appeal, but it appears we may need at least a third victory on appeal before this case ends.

That's why David needs your financial support today. **[And that's why I'm praying you will donate $35 or more to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ztrjjfmucd128nh7uaf2a0stas28c7kntof2i0tg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9ie9oj4c5h2bs)** I won't guess how much you're able to send today. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more... ... I will only say that time is of the essence. So I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can. **This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David."** It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished. By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over 12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured. Since that time, 26 states --- over half the country -- have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding. It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen. **[So please don't delay. Donate $35, $50, $100, or more to stand with David Daleiden today.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zs148hcdk3lbhpupluat0u0d2u19fi22cincm750_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9ie9oj4c5h2bs)** I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get it so I can let David know that you're standing with him. I know he'll be deeply touched by your generous support. May God Bless You, Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel P.S. Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal, ghoulish activities. You and I cannot let that happen. Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of David Daleiden? **[David is a pro-life hero. Will you make a generous donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND of $35, $50, $100 or more to stop this attempt to crush him?](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zk5h2p1pg35n9seaop5pluikhjfelu7cit11p4mg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9ie9oj4c5h2bs)** [**DONATE**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z8423hbbkdlblkn81hh9e98v9h7snkecqc5dkqao_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9ie9oj4c5h2bs) [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z4b084f82a4sq1nbt4epgpufbs1ddrmc7dt2bndg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9ie9oj4c5h2bs) The Thomas More Society is a not-for-profit, national public interest law firm dedicated to restoring respect in law for life, family, and religious liberty. [Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zkh48vmuceau7g230ov6mcso8g1rse7pkj8gdp1o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9ie9oj4c5h2bs) © Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ze5a5b6flv5t6u9cs56m4ba75brls09t3vv1rd5g_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9ie9oj4c5h2bs)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- we fight back. I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach. But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in Pro-Life courage. Now I'll get right down to it... We anticipate David's legal defense will cost us more than $6 million. That's right, SIX MILLION DOLLARS. In addition to the criminal case and the new federal civil rights and defamation lawsuits, we're currently representing David in THREE other cases. The civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood where we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with the judge's order permanently banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. Recently, we posted a $700,000 appeal bond to keep Planned Parenthood’s nasty collection agents from harassing him with collection agents and even seizing his belongings. We’re fighting back, but we’ll need your help. The civil lawsuit brought by the National Abortion Federation and the "gag order" injunction that still prohibits David from releasing any more of his video evidence exposing Planned Parenthood's illegal fetal tissue business. And now, in light of the Planned Parenthood civil lawsuit, NAF has moved for summary judgment – they want a ruling against David without a trial at all! And finally, the civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood personnel in federal court in Seattle, where we just achieved a victory for a second time on appeal, but it appears we may need at least a third victory on appeal before this case ends. That's why David needs your financial support today. I won't guess how much you're able to send today. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more... ... I will only say that time is of the essence. So I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can. This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David." It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished. By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over 12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured. Since that time, 26 states --- over half the country -- have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding. It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen. I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get it so I can let David know that you're standing with him. I know he'll be deeply touched by your generous support. May God Bless You, Tom Brejcha President & Chief Counsel P.S. Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal, ghoulish activities. You and I cannot let that happen. Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of David Daleiden? ** The Thomas More Society is a not-for-profit, national public interest law firm dedicated to restoring respect in law for life, family, and religious liberty. © Thomas More Society | 309 W. Friend,

It’s hard to believe we’re just about a year away from Election Day -- which means we don’t have a lot of time left to build the **_enormous_ campaign infrastructure** that it’s going to take to defeat Governor DeSantis! There’s a lot we need to accomplish in the next year:
* **Registering new voters** from Pensacola to the Keys
* **Organizing on-the-ground** in communities all over the state
* **Spreading Charlie’s message** about building a Florida for all

**...and so much more.[It’s going to be a HUGE undertaking -- but as long as we’ve got grassroots support from folks like you, we KNOW we can win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37557511/311616927/-1308222812?refcode=20211015_f_1_fl&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmI3YzIzMi1iMjJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jGuprN_UZZLO6c2SE9RqPrvVnWAP3fMiyZJXqCowWKM=)**

Here’s why: **Governor DeSantis’ approval ratings have been _tanking_** as voters see that he’s ignored his responsibility to keep Florida safe from COVID-19, preferring instead to fly all over the country to schmooze with far-right billionaire donors.

**Plus, recent polls have Charlie either leading or within the margin of error** \-- which means that as long as we can keep up our current momentum, things are looking up. But that means it’s CRITICAL that we continue reaching our fundraising goals!

**That’s why we’re coming to you right now, friend. Will you pitch in to help us reach our $10,000 mid-month goal before tonight’s midnight deadline so we can keep building the campaign Charlie needs to DEFEAT Governor DeSantis?**

body:

*Sponsored by
[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z7glv5igjnjrenqig1h387ms4ha31jlf5utvmtlg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpg60p34cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zs3hedq2qrl9bqubrpgm9u5910uoqskaib8sc0n8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpg60p34cph2bs) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zl6n30vunfmuur0cbdqlg558sln431n0qpu1a920_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpg60p34cph2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

body:
Together, we’re building a coalition for the future.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37558858/311622617/1473364893?refcode=EM_C_2110welcome1_W_SB_W_5_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWIwMjU2NS1iODJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z1eerNPYkwK0Jgw83DtEPrr5k1lCTpazwbKg3pg0PDk=) Team, we need as many people as possible to help us send Democrat Shontel Brown to Congress, but if you would prefer not to receive emails in the future, please feel free to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/f6d2ff22-352d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208/3eb02565-b82d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWIwMjU2NS1iODJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z1eerNPYkwK0Jgw83DtEPrr5k1lCTpazwbKg3pg0PDk=&id=126631505) or sign up to receive [**_fewer emails here._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37558862/311622621/-1403672908?refcode=EM_C_2110welcome1_W_SB_W_5_NG_N_header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWIwMjU2NS1iODJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z1eerNPYkwK0Jgw83DtEPrr5k1lCTpazwbKg3pg0PDk=&emci=f6d2ff22-352d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=3eb02565-b82d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=23746811) Hello, and thanks for joining my team!

As a native Clevelander, it has been my highest honor to serve for almost a decade as a legislator _and_ the first Black person and the first woman elected as the Chair of the largest county Democratic Party in the state.

As the next Congresswoman from Ohio, I will work tirelessly for:
* Affordable, quality health care
* Jobs that pay fair wages
* A strong public education system
* Environmental policies to protect our planet

**I will stand, every day, for equity and justice for all.**

[**_My team is working tirelessly to ensure we have the resources to communicate with every voter possible, but we need your help. Can you sign up today to be a public supporter of my campaign right now?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37558868/311622625/113757430?refcode=EM_C_2110welcome1_W_SB_W_5_NG_N_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWIwMjU2NS1iODJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z1eerNPYkwK0Jgw83DtEPrr5k1lCTpazwbKg3pg0PDk=&emci=f6d2ff22-352d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=3eb02565-b82d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=23746811) [Sign your name today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37558869/311622629/113757430?refcode=EM_C_2110welcome1_W_SB_W_5_NG_N_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWIwMjU2NS1iODJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z1eerNPYkwK0Jgw83DtEPrr5k1lCTpazwbKg3pg0PDk=&emci=f6d2ff22-352d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=3eb02565-b82d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=23746811) With the help of grassroots supporters like you, we dominated our 13-way primary with more than 50 percent of the vote. Now, voters of Ohio’s 11th congressional district are early voting. [**_Add your name to my list of public supporters today!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37558872/311622630/113757430?refcode=EM_C_2110welcome1_W_SB_W_5_NG_N_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWIwMjU2NS1iODJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z1eerNPYkwK0Jgw83DtEPrr5k1lCTpazwbKg3pg0PDk=&emci=f6d2ff22-352d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=3eb02565-b82d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=23746811)

I hope you’ll join us,

Shontel Brown |
As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent that last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As the next Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**

name: American Defense News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zv6sno6o7phn144qonivlbq22lgo98o231l9dudo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbr34t3nmcr31or164qe8oblcdr74dpkcmqb5c3lc3hn2tjkclh72chlehjr6chnmv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3imhj30tpjc5jrep366hgb4ohme8gq48bi4bh28or6c5j60oj0s5g649fg)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zabmlk2t2mmc5gdbbls85ni0e56630heffeg6tug_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpg64o71c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4dfpe3tlmeitqk6q2pi5hmh7ve313utak5ptsg8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpg64o71c1h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zntq7m4jfupgb401kv1rrbi4c63s2rtpqnmfh21o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpg64o71c1h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

| Peter,
---
| Today's deadline could be the difference between getting a leader in Pennsylvania who will represent our Republican, America First values...
...or having this seat fall into the hands of the radical, hypocritical, liberal elite Democrats!
---
| | | [KEEP THIS SENATE SEAT RED!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uoiBl4uOwdYnia946rz7FyhdYv8ZUs0YA74j5ZrSIb2-Q5CQ79_HJtEslIAV7DFnObI2leJt_naBZRylQdmgHZHVnyRMPbb7P8yhsmokSFbYY9Xb63q0IlGB6ZYHsBWMm3W6XnGkM0C9X_Uz0waJWnjYOkzvpLfuBPK-fhqdlrNlKyzJyAVIi5X6dQOmkbo7&c=hWi3t531TvmIfKs1W5NZnLYWZqq8VIiYZAvrscXtcXeg4sglOUgTQw==&ch=yTTB_sC4xVjlC1UKUqTPAOaujzKs9oGbAU5GQRaKIinfpohIbDLO9A==)
---
| We can't let this seat go their way - Pennsylvania children could become subject to their racist ideology in the classroom, our state's economy could continue to be plagued by unemployment and inflation, and the Left's radical abortion agenda could be spread across our Commonwealth!
Kathy Barnette is the leader we need to back if we want to stop this - [will you donate right now before her mid-month deadline tonight?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uoiBl4uOwdYnia946rz7FyhdYv8ZUs0YA74j5ZrSIb2-Q5CQ79_HJtEslIAV7DFnObI2leJt_naBZRylQdmgHZHVnyRMPbb7P8yhsmokSFbYY9Xb63q0IlGB6ZYHsBWMm3W6XnGkM0C9X_Uz0waJWnjYOkzvpLfuBPK-fhqdlrNlKyzJyAVIi5X6dQOmkbo7&c=hWi3t531TvmIfKs1W5NZnLYWZqq8VIiYZAvrscXtcXeg4sglOUgTQw==&ch=yTTB_sC4xVjlC1UKUqTPAOaujzKs9oGbAU5GQRaKIinfpohIbDLO9A==)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uoiBl4uOwdYnia946rz7FyhdYv8ZUs0YA74j5ZrSIb2-Q5CQ79_HJtEslIAV7DFnObI2leJt_naBZRylQdmgHZHVnyRMPbb7P8yhsmokSFbYY9Xb63q0IlGB6ZYHsBWMm3W6XnGkM0C9X_Uz0waJWnjYOkzvpLfuBPK-fhqdlrNlKyzJyAVIi5X6dQOmkbo7&c=hWi3t531TvmIfKs1W5NZnLYWZqq8VIiYZAvrscXtcXeg4sglOUgTQw==&ch=yTTB_sC4xVjlC1UKUqTPAOaujzKs9oGbAU5GQRaKIinfpohIbDLO9A==)

| At the end of the day, winning elections and getting leadership that fights for our values isn't cheap... It takes resources from grassroots patriots like YOU in order to win at the ballot box!
With even just 200 top supporters stepping up today to make a contribution, Kathy and this entire team will have the financial resolve we need to keep fighting.

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: "the most alarming Trump rally yet"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
During his speech, Trump welcomed my opponent, Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA), to the stage...
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37562114/311636376/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk277-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmFkMGZiMC1iYzJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qWtOF5EcDqfL8AIC2CtKmyQJ5rX8c0CHtvB5FmAO2do=)
Peter – last weekend, Donald Trump held a rally in Iowa that a CNN opinion piece calls**"the most alarming Trump rally yet."** During his speech, Trump welcomed my opponent, Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA), to the stage, praising Sen. Grassley for always being there whenever he needed him. **Then, he gave Sen. Grassley his "complete and total endorsement," which Sen. Grassley enthusiastically accepted.**
Moments like this show why our campaign to defeat Sen. Grassley is so important – and why I need to ask for your donation to meet our mid-month fundraising goal. But before I do, I hope you'll let me explain.
You see, this rally has political commentators especially worried because top-ranking Republicans, like Sen. Grassley, are making their allegiances clear. Instead of choosing facts, reason and our democracy, they're choosing Donald Trump – the man who incited a deadly riot on our Capitol. But frankly, I'm not surprised at my opponent's actions. Sen. Grassley has a long history of advancing radical ideas at the expense of our country.
Just look at his time as chair of the Judiciary Committee, when he blocked President Obama from appointing a Supreme Court Justice and then rammed through the controversial confirmations of Neil Gorsuch and Brett Kavanaugh. It's not shocking to me that he'll happily defend Trump's attempts to overturn the election and put our democracy at risk if it helps further his radical agenda.
On Saturday, we saw clear as day that Sen. Grassley will stand by Trump no matter what – and that Trump is all in to protect Sen. Grassley. **Together, they'll do everything they can to take back the Senate and reclaim the White House. Our race here in Iowa is critical to stopping them. **
That's why I'm asking you to support my campaign, Peter. You see, our mid-month fundraising deadline is at midnight tonight, but right now, we're still short of our $25,000 goal. With Trump and Sen. Grassley working hand in hand to keep Iowa red and take back the Senate, we cannot afford to miss this goal. **[Please, can you donate $5 – or whatever you can spare – right now, so we can defeat Sen. Grassley, protect our Senate majority and stop Trump in his tracks?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37562115/311636377/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk277-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmFkMGZiMC1iYzJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qWtOF5EcDqfL8AIC2CtKmyQJ5rX8c0CHtvB5FmAO2do=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37562116/311636379/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk277-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmFkMGZiMC1iYzJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qWtOF5EcDqfL8AIC2CtKmyQJ5rX8c0CHtvB5FmAO2do=)
---
Thank you for always standing beside me, especially in moments like these.

– Abby

subject: Together, we’ll Save America.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee on behalf of Save America and the Make America Great Again PAC

name: Gary Black
subject: Here's Something Good
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/e912e0f1bad332d9/e7ecd30d74e7a00ec3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Friend, Another big week on the campaign trail! Team ’22 is most certainly hitting its stride, and it wouldn't be possible without your strong support. We're grateful to each of you for all you're doing to power our movement. Stay tuned for more B.I.G. news in the days ahead.
---
---
# **_Centennial Farm Award_**
---
|
---
[| | |
---|---|---](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/e912e0f1bad332d9/86dfa3f9ee13b82ac3d6b838967d376c/37793)
We had a great day at the Georgia National Fair earlier this week! My friend and Georgia House Majority Leader Jon Burns was given a Centennial Farm award, which goes to families that maintain a working farm for 100 years. I'm proud to have Jon's endorsement, and in the U.S. Senate no one will fight harder to stop regressive tax and regulation policies that threaten our family farmers. We recorded a short video about the meaning of this award. You can watch it here or above.
---
---
# **_Georgia Sheriffs Association_**
---
|
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/e912e0f1bad332d9/2ba2a65710a3955cc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
This week, I was proud to catch up with the Georgia Sheriffs Association in Savannah and to share our message of standing with law enforcement. 76 sheriffs across the state now support our campaign. I'm humbled by that, and as Georgia's next Senator I'll do everything I can to ensure these heroes have the resources they need to keep our communities safe.
---
|
---
---
# **_Gas Prices_**
---
|
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/e912e0f1bad332d9/74a21e91483abb09c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
$3.13 for gas in Glynn County yesterday. We've got to return to energy independence. And it starts with one more conservative vote in the U.S. Senate. If you agree, reply to this email and let us know how much gas has gone up in your community.
---
---
# **_Domestic Violence Awareness Month_**
---
---
October is Domestic Violence Awareness Month. Hope you'll stand with us to raise awareness, support victims and survivors, and resolve to hold domestic abusers accountable. Domestic violence has no place in Georgia or America.
---
---
# **_One More Thing_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/e912e0f1bad332d9/e4304f3a572ac806c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Live in Northeast Georgia? Join us on October 28th for a B.I.G. event! We'll be joined by our good friends Doug Collins, Nathan Deal, Sandra Deal, and many others. Tickets are $50 and going fast. Make sure to claim yours here.
---
---
# **_One More Thing_**
---
Please follow our campaign's [**Facebook**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/e912e0f1bad332d9/c0ee15e1a2206d96c3d6b838967d376c/37793), **[Twitter](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/e912e0f1bad332d9/67411b3804aca65fc3d6b838967d376c/37793)** , and [**Instagram**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/e912e0f1bad332d9/a7714e4c9ff13e8cc3d6b838967d376c/37793) pages if you aren't already, and make sure 10 of your friends are too! This campaign is powered by folks like you, and so many of you have already stepped up to ensure we have the resources it takes to win this race. **[If you haven't contributed yet, I hope you'll do so here and now.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/e912e0f1bad332d9/6a86b4338bac66bfc3d6b838967d376c/37793)**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/e912e0f1bad332d9/98fa12338e65789ec3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/e912e0f1bad332d9/11006cd7a5d6b4d3c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $10 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate here or below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/e912e0f1bad332d9/b36ad065dec26942c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=e912e0f1bad332d9&d=5d2f02cbebd0e10ac3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=e912e0f1bad332d9).
---
This message was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** by:Gary Black for SenateP.O. Box 6501
Athens, GA 30604
---
PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC.
---

name: Ralph Northam
subject: Reaching out on behalf of my friend Terry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/S5jx-0nE_E7Wx143pwLTwo45cswIyebt-wypg8_2JWA=/I2xiXXbgWFO-ODqZRSac5ZS5DzoxJvx3zQ5-sbnL6ik=?refcode=20211015_RN_TRM)
---
Friend, my friend Terry McAuliffe is in a tight race with Donald Trump's handpicked candidate to be Virginia's next Governor. [**Will you split a contribution between his campaign and mine to help stop a Trump acolyte from winning this race?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/S5jx-0nE_E7Wx143pwLTwo45cswIyebt-wypg8_2JWA=/AAovis2mg_kdlsr9HelNj5wCMABJNICEJCY9m26cnsI=?refcode=20211015_RN_TRM) Four years ago, I was in an equally tight race for Governor -- less than a year after Donald Trump was inaugurated. **And frankly, the reason I won my election was because our grassroots team **--** _this grassroots team _**-- **stepped up and worked hard to defend Virginia 's progress.** Now, our progress is threatened. With early voting underway, and Election Day less than three weeks out, Terry doesn't have any time to lose. [**Terry needs your help, friend****. Please split a contribution of any amount between The Way Ahead and Terry McAuliffe 's campaign right now!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/S5jx-0nE_E7Wx143pwLTwo45cswIyebt-wypg8_2JWA=/AAovis2mg_kdlsr9HelNj5wCMABJNICEJCY9m26cnsI=?refcode=20211015_RN_TRM) Thank you, Ralph Northam

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: New report shows how Trump nearly destroyed the Constitution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=HEnNhK2M0WZMWmf78Vp41U%2BcnKNKGfAC&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
I have serious news from the Senate Judiciary Committee: We just released our interim report about former president Donald Trump's attempts to overturn the 2020 election.
Our report reveals how Trump nearly destroyed the Constitution in his attempt to abuse the Department of Justice to overturn the election. The details are truly horrifying.
In a Jan. 3 Oval Office meeting between Trump, former Attorney General Jeffrey Rosen, and other Department of Justice and White House officials, the former president repeatedly pressured his attorney general to resign so he could install a Trump loyalist who would pursue Trump's false claims of voter fraud.
There's no other way to call it: On Jan. 3, Donald Trump tried to weaponize the Department of Justice to overturn a free and fair election. Three days later, he held a "Stop the Steal" rally that incited a violent and deadly insurrection on the Capitol.
Friend, these truths are appalling, but they are only the tip of the iceberg - and as a former U.S. attorney and state attorney general, I can tell you that there is very real potential for consideration of criminal charges against Donald Trump. We must continue gathering all the facts about everyone involved, from Donald Trump to his family, to officials in his administration.
**By contrast, nearly the entire Republican Party is consolidated around protecting themselves and covering up any wrongdoing and illegal actions by Donald Trump.** In spite of evidence to the contrary, my Republican colleagues on the Judiciary Committee have chosen to conclude that Trump _did not_ use the justice system to overturn the election.**That is why I 'm counting on grassroots Democrats like you to speak out by the thousands.**
**In light of these new revelations, even if you 've spoken up before, I am urgently asking you to keep holding Donald Trump accountable. We cannot back down now. So please, let me know where you stand:**
**[Should criminal charges be considered for Donald Trump, his family, and members of Congress if it's proved that they aided the Jan. 6 insurrectionists? Click here to add your name if you agree.](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-trump-crimes?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1081-su-nd)**
The truth is becoming clearer and clearer - and all signs point to the most dangerous, anti-democratic behavior of Donald Trump. It's up to us to hold him accountable. Thank you for continuing to speak out.
Dick

clean_body: Friend, I have serious news from the Senate Judiciary Committee: We just released our interim report about former president Donald Trump's attempts to overturn the 2020 election. Our report reveals how Trump nearly destroyed the Constitution in his attempt to abuse the Department of Justice to overturn the election. The details are truly horrifying. In a Jan. 3 Oval Office meeting between Trump, former Attorney General Jeffrey Rosen, and other Department of Justice and White House officials, the former president repeatedly pressured his attorney general to resign so he could install a Trump loyalist who would pursue Trump's false claims of voter fraud. There's no other way to call it: On Jan. 3, Donald Trump tried to weaponize the Department of Justice to overturn a free and fair election. Three days later, he held a "Stop the Steal" rally that incited a violent and deadly insurrection on the Capitol. Friend, these truths are appalling, but they are only the tip of the iceberg - and as a former U.S. attorney and state attorney general, I can tell you that there is very real potential for consideration of criminal charges against Donald Trump. We must continue gathering all the facts about everyone involved, from Donald Trump to his family, to officials in his administration. By contrast, nearly the entire Republican Party is consolidated around protecting themselves and covering up any wrongdoing and illegal actions by Donald Trump. In spite of evidence to the contrary, my Republican colleagues on the Judiciary Committee have chosen to conclude that Trump did not use the justice system to overturn the election.That is why I 'm counting on grassroots Democrats like you to speak out by the thousands. In light of these new revelations, even if you 've spoken up before, I am urgently asking you to keep holding Donald Trump accountable. We cannot back down now. So please, let me know where you stand: The truth is becoming clearer and clearer - and all signs point to the most dangerous, anti-democratic behavior of Donald Trump. It's up to us to hold him accountable. Thank you for continuing to speak out. Dick

body:
Building a national network of grassroots Democrats isn't cheap, but it's incredibly necessary to defend and expand our majorities in 2022. |
#
Derek – Adam is working around the clock in Congress. To pass the infrastructure and Build Back Better bills.
To lift the debt ceiling and prevent a government shutdown.
To address climate change and help save the planet. But that’s not all. He is also working hard to expand our majorities in the House and Senate, and you have been a vital part of that effort. You’ve helped him elect and protect Democrats all across the country. From supporting new Senate challengers in Florida, Ohio, and Iowa to helping incumbent Senate Democrats like Raphael Warnock and Mark Kelly, this grassroots team continues to put in the work to protect and expand our slim Democratic majorities in the House and Senate. Not to mention, when Adam asked you to chip in to help Governor Gavin Newsom in California stave off the Republican-led recall, you responded by raising **over $500,000** and helping to beat the leading anti-vax, Big Lie-promoting GOP candidate. Decisively. Building a national network of grassroots Democrats doesn’t happen by accident, and it's incredibly important to defend and expand our majorities in 2022. Every time you chip in, please know there’s someone else who’s taking action right alongside you. body:
Mitch McConnell and the GOP’s special interests are already working overtime attacking Democrats -- and laying the groundwork for their plan to flip the Senate red in 2022.
#
Peter,
**It will only take a moment of your time to read this email -- but the impact you can make is enormous.** My team has been writing to you this week about the crucial mid-month fundraising deadline -- and now, we’re up against the clock racing to meet our goal by midnight.
Mitch McConnell and the GOP’s special interests are already working overtime attacking Democrats -- _and laying the groundwork for their plan to flip the Senate red in 2022._
You know you can count on me to keep up the fight for workers and families in Washington state and across the country -- but I’m going to need this team to have my back in the fights ahead, like keeping Washington state blue and preventing a GOP takeover of the Senate majority.
**[We’re so close to meeting this mid-month goal, Peter: we only have another $3,098 to raise by midnight. Can I count on you to pitch in $5 or more right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37567832/311663028/137030067?refcode=pm_em_211015_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2ZhOTYzYy1jYTJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r9wWTd9GlRB-EQALvM1V0gK-WoySSIcKzYnXQHlYvaU=)**
I’ve always been able to count on this team -- and this time is no different. I know that we can meet our milestone before the midnight deadline and keep our must-win campaign on track.
**_Democrats can’t afford to lose a single seat_ \-- and we can’t take any race for granted.** There is too much at stake to sit on the sidelines in this election. We all have a part to play.
**[Make your $5 contribution by midnight tonight to help us reach this important goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37567833/311663029/137030067?refcode=pm_em_211015_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2ZhOTYzYy1jYTJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r9wWTd9GlRB-EQALvM1V0gK-WoySSIcKzYnXQHlYvaU=)**
Thank you,
Patty

name: Warner HQ
subject: stop the stupidity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Senator Warner has a word for this never-ending cycle of brinkmanship and shutdown threats: it’s just plain STUPID.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37568967/311668227/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzIzMTMyNC1jZTJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1k0lACKUoMi7jT-GiSdYxOswT_LSAqJF-AT71gS-w-U=&emci=097d6dda-182d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=fc231324-ce2d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, It happened again. Partisan gridlock forced us up to another government funding deadline, and Congress came dangerously close to another government shutdown. Without Republican votes to fund the government for the coming year, the only option was a temporary funding bill that kicks the can down the road and leaves our country and our federal workers vulnerable to another shutdown. Senator Warner has a word for this never-ending cycle of brinkmanship and shutdown threats: it’s just plain STUPID. In 2019, when we were in the midst of the Trump shutdown debacle, Senator Warner introduced the "Stop Shutdowns Transferring Unnecessary Pain and Inflicting Damage in the Coming Years Act" or Stop STUPIDITY Act to finally put a stop to these ridiculous government shutdowns. **Here’s the deal:** if Congress and the President can’t reach a deal to fund the government, then _Congress and the White House should shut down_ \-- not the rest of our government that should continue serving the people. **_[Derek, will you add your name to Mark’s petition to stop the GOP shutdown?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37568968/311668228/1283820880?ms=mw_em_211015_1&refcode=mw_em_211015_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzIzMTMyNC1jZTJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1k0lACKUoMi7jT-GiSdYxOswT_LSAqJF-AT71gS-w-U=&emci=097d6dda-182d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=fc231324-ce2d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=4568237)_** Playing partisan political games with government funding is bad for Virginia and bad for our country. Republicans should put families before politics and get out of the way. **Are you with Mark Warner and Senate Democrats as they work to keep the government and prevent another GOP shutdown?** **_[We must prevent a senseless GOP shutdown. Sign on right now to show your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37568969/311668229/1283820880?ms=mw_em_211015_1&refcode=mw_em_211015_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzIzMTMyNC1jZTJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1k0lACKUoMi7jT-GiSdYxOswT_LSAqJF-AT71gS-w-U=&emci=097d6dda-182d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=fc231324-ce2d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=4568237)_** Thank you, Team Warner **[Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37568970/311668230/1283820880?ms=mw_em_211015_1&refcode=mw_em_211015_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzIzMTMyNC1jZTJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1k0lACKUoMi7jT-GiSdYxOswT_LSAqJF-AT71gS-w-U=&emci=097d6dda-182d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=fc231324-ce2d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=4568237)**

clean_body: Senator Warner has a word for this never-ending cycle of brinkmanship and shutdown threats: it’s just plain STUPID. | | | Derek, It happened again. Partisan gridlock forced us up to another government funding deadline, and Congress came dangerously close to another government shutdown. Without Republican votes to fund the government for the coming year, the only option was a temporary funding bill that kicks the can down the road and leaves our country and our federal workers vulnerable to another shutdown. Senator Warner has a word for this never-ending cycle of brinkmanship and shutdown threats: it’s just plain STUPID. In 2019, when we were in the midst of the Trump shutdown debacle, Senator Warner introduced the "Stop Shutdowns Transferring Unnecessary Pain and Inflicting Damage in the Coming Years Act" or Stop STUPIDITY Act to finally put a stop to these ridiculous government shutdowns. Here’s the deal: if Congress and the President can’t reach a deal to fund the government, then Congress and the White House should shut down \-- not the rest of our government that should continue serving the people. Playing partisan political games with government funding is bad for Virginia and bad for our country. Republicans should put families before politics and get out of the way. Are you with Mark Warner and Senate Democrats as they work to keep the government and prevent another GOP shutdown? | | |

| What I Believe:
---
I have done everything I set out to do. I have shown good people that they have a better option. Come the 2022 election, we will no longer have to "hold our nose" to vote. Come the 2022 election, we will not be so desperate that we must put all of our "eggs into a damaged basket." Money, in this race, is very important, I have raised quite a bit of it. But money, alone, can't buy an election. We learned that from Hillary Clinton.
I am a private citizen. I am no different from you. I am a private citizen, who walked out and said, "I believe we can do better."
I'm not riding anyone's coattails. I'm not pulling my power from any other man or woman. By the grace of God and some really motivated Americans, who love their country, I have outraised and out polled the others.
I was not given a list of high dollar donors and told to sit in a room with a phone. I've been among you the entire time. We are up to about 900 miles a week going across our great state.
I have proven what I've set out to do. I can win! I can win not just the Primary, but I believe I'm the only Republican candidate who can win the General election against these "regressive" Leftists.
But, I can't do it alone. I need you!!! I need each of you:

* To [donate](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GCqnjAXrqeaoAvpgyBS5z9neYDMcNK0uC_xyjgTGf_rR-oJPcErajCMRXH_-nQza-v8cFkYw7PDKVFS-sNHcSAiVKxjVm-KzPmAJ44PMFX1DrC8H-PrFfQ-jfrQc1JtALteOXBsmvH8Y9co0PRkW6h9gZ0yLbx9eSSJ8Aw4tMUuvS-4A75BmXQ==&c=fd8qNqzv93og_ZbAiNBJ0Vs3NOxUDJLd6lS_wYdaNeNhU8RHDkHNrA==&ch=Y6cH4x4ibxo0UQxJj5N8M7vEGZCvZaiplxER3DuK7BsADJvSmwvZug==)
* To volunteer
* To host Meet & Greets
* To host fundraisers (my team can help you with this)
* To share my content
* To email me a list of people you believe are influential and I need to know.

No one is going to hand our country back to us. Most of our leaders are too busy worrying about getting to the next rung on the political ladder for themselves. Our help is NOT going to come from the top down. It will come from us being sick and tired of being sick and tired and demanding better.
We EACH have a part to play in this. Get engaged BEFORE it's too late. Jump in NOW with both feet. ~ Blessings

| One of many epitomes I've had on this journey:
---
I arrived home late from an event earlier this week and as is his routine my hubby stayed up waiting for me. We soon after retired for the night and as is her routine, my baby girl tiptoed in and laid down in my arms. So, there I was sandwiched between my husband and my daughter and I had the clearest thought: "THIS, right here, is what's real."
Life is busy. We are out here trying to save our country, or make our mark, or just survive. But, at the end of the day family is THE greatest blessing we've been given. Be kind to them. Spend time with them. Hold them while you can. ~Blessings...

A dad was tackled by security during a contentious school board meeting when he challenged the county about an alleged rape in the school bathroom involving a "trans" person.

Hi there — I’m Julie, Martin’s wife, and I want to let you in on a big birthday surprise I’m working on with our boys, Micah and Carter! Martin’s 50th birthday is just two days away, and we want to make it one to remember. Martin does so much for New Mexico and our country in the U.S. Senate — fighting to create good-paying jobs, making sure everyone has a fair shot at a good life, and acting on climate change to save our planet and preserve the lands we all love. **[Let’s show Martin how much his hard work means to us all by delivering him a birthday card with over 1,000 signatures and well wishes. Thanks for letting Martin know you’re thinking of him on his special day!
— Julie

clean_body: Hi there — I’m Julie, Martin’s wife, and I want to let you in on a big birthday surprise I’m working on with our boys, Micah and Carter! Martin’s 50th birthday is just two days away, and we want to make it one to remember. Martin does so much for New Mexico and our country in the U.S. Senate — fighting to create good-paying jobs, making sure everyone has a fair shot at a good life, and acting on climate change to save our planet and preserve the lands we all love. | Thanks for letting Martin know you’re thinking of him on his special day! — Julie P.S.
