## **🍂 WE HAVE**** _F_**** _ALL_****THE BEST EVENTS! 🍁**
_This week we’re going to pumpkin spice things up a bit._ _It’s almost Halloween and that means we’re carving out some fun and exciting trainings this week for YOU!_ 🎃☕

* * *

[**How to Build a Political Campaign Digital Plan**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTEwMTUyMV90bGRyJl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9.Lm6ewqSoI9FyjtsQCXyhmLQFAQ03sGWHns77eRQuTk8)
**Tuesday, October 19, 1pm ET** In the age of remote work, learning how to build a digital plan is the key 🔑 to gaining the attention of voters! During this training, we will show you how to do just that. Connect to your voters with a digital plan, learn how to build one, and set goals for your digital outreach efforts this Tuesday.
| [RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTEwMTUyMV90bGRyJl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9.Lm6ewqSoI9FyjtsQCXyhmLQFAQ03sGWHns77eRQuTk8)
---

* * *

[**How to Engage Your Volunteer Community Online**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..8INKzDkxkqKLyong7nDeAp-5hE4KsGiApfm8cZFy2W0)
**Wednesday, October 20, 1pm ET**
How do you touch base with members of your community when you can’t meet in person? Well, our team of experts can show you how!
Join this session to learn more about building your volunteer base and engaging your team through virtual events.

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..8INKzDkxkqKLyong7nDeAp-5hE4KsGiApfm8cZFy2W0)
---

* * *

[**Why Diverse Campaign Teams Win (And How to Be Part of One)**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTEwMTUyMV90bGRyJl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9.NxeQw69wDVfyS1tx6drmWjjxz9v-AfWFuS6RJjHhZCk)
**Thursday, October 21, 1pm ET**
Representative teams are essential for success. A diverse staff will bring you more perspectives, voices and ideas that are needed in Democratic politics, and we can walk you through building an ideal team.
If you’re curious about how to organize or be a part of a representative campaign team, then this training is for you!

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTEwMTUyMV90bGRyJl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9.NxeQw69wDVfyS1tx6drmWjjxz9v-AfWFuS6RJjHhZCk)
---

* * *

[**Digital Organizing: How to Engage and Activate Your Audience**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..xKqNLMaMdflE6zckfG9YTr3kv_jyndINp9Xy-8zftEo)
**Friday, October 22, 1pm ET**
You need to connect with your audience everywhere... and that means online, too! So how do you amp up your digital organizing plan? In this training, you’ll get all the key insights on mobilizing voters digitally, as well as best practices for sustaining that outreach.

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..xKqNLMaMdflE6zckfG9YTr3kv_jyndINp9Xy-8zftEo)
---

* * *

**But how do I share what I learned?**
Have you ever wanted to share what you learned in the Online Academy? Well, we just made it that much easier!
On our courses, mini-lessons, and events, you can now use the icons below to share what you’re learning with others on Twitter, Facebook, LinkedIn and more.

name: Jamal Raad, Evergreen Action
subject: Rallying cry ➡️ legislative priority
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
No climate, no deal.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3935?t=3&akid=12715%2E53494%2EVI4_y8) Friend, It started as a rallying cry. In June, when it became clear there would be two pieces of legislation to fulfill Biden's agenda—one bipartisan infrastructure bill and one climate-focused reconciliation package—we let Washington know where we stood: **No climate, no deal.** Soon after, 16 senators and 18 representatives stood up and made their stance clear, too: **No climate, no deal. ([_We'll ask you once more below, but please click here to thank the congressional climate champions for their commitment to bold climate action_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3935?t=4&akid=12715%2E53494%2EVI4_y8).)** When a few conservative Democrats attempted to sabotage the climate-focused reconciliation package, these congressional climate champions held the line. We won, and now even President Biden has publicly confirmed it: **No climate, no deal.** In just four months, our rallying cry has become a national legislative priority, with the full weight of national leaders behind it. Right now, we have unprecedented momentum for climate justice, millions of new jobs, and a serious reduction in pollution. But we're not over the finish line yet. **It's taken decades of activism to arrive at this make-or-break moment. Thanks to your advocacy and our climate champions in Congress, we're on the winning team right now. But it's not over yet, and we need to keep up the energy.** [**_Will you sign your name today to cheer on our allies in Congress and thank them for prioritizing bold climate action?_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3935?t=5&akid=12715%2E53494%2EVI4_y8) | [SAY THANKS](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3935?t=6&akid=12715%2E53494%2EVI4_y8)
---
Onward,
Jamal Raad
Co-Founder and Executive Director, Evergreen Action
P.S. [**_After you sign your name, we'll give you a chance to call your representatives and demand they get on board with "No climate, no deal." Add your name now, and follow it up with a call to your elected officials._**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3935?t=7&akid=12715%2E53494%2EVI4_y8)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=12715%2E53494%2EVI4_y8).Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible.| PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---
All content © 2021 EVERGREEN ACTION, All Rights Reserved

That recent _Politico_ headline is a quote from former National Security Council official, Fiona Hill.

Hey, friend – it's Phil from Marco's campaign team. I just checked in on our numbers again, and we're coming up way too short for comfort on our mid-month goal. **I'm meeting with Marco in a few hours and would _really_ love to be able to tell him we're on track to reach it – so [can you chip in right now to help close our budget gap and flip Arizona blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37570246/311675671/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk257-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWYxMDNhNi1kMTJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y_DKCHTFkUzuvyFWcbgqpwn_RKv2svugB_zdplpcmyg=)**

Election experts at Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight are officially calling this race a toss-up, so it's clear we have a real shot at winning here. But it's also clear that to bring home that victory, we have to hit every single fundraising goal – and this mid-month one is critical.

That's why I'm reaching out to you as one of our top supporters: With the stakes this high, Marco is counting on you to be the grassroots power behind our movement for progress in Arizona. It's make-or-break – and the alternative is four more years of failed Republicans like Doug Ducey and Kelli Ward.

**We only have until midnight – so I need to ask: Will you make a donation right now to hit our mid-month goal, defeat GOP extremism in Arizona and flip Arizona blue?**

**Here's the best link:** **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/marco-lopez-for-governor_email3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37570248/311675673/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk257-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWYxMDNhNi1kMTJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y_DKCHTFkUzuvyFWcbgqpwn_RKv2svugB_zdplpcmyg=)**
Thanks for all your help. Can't wait to tell Marco we hit our goal with your help.

Phil
Team Lopez

She's fighting against an extreme Republican opponent and national GOP money from wealthy donors who are determined to take back power and show the country that Virginia isn't blue. name: Team Cooper
subject: Roy is fighting to expand Medicaid. Are you with him, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
It’s never been more important to make sure every North Carolinian has quality health care access. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37571840/311683361/823540626?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjExYzhhMy1kNzJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jfWWwmvcq0JGzs8s7P5SZXJPUyJPX1Y-O0zTTMDtDoo=&emci=9835362f-342d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=1611c8a3-d72d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1049176)
Hi Peter — Did you know that Roy has spent _years_ fighting to expand Medicaid access and quality health care coverage to more than 500,000 North Carolinians who need it? And right now, during the most serious public health crisis in a century, it’s more critical than ever to make sure that all our neighbors can receive the health care they deserve. **[It’s up to us to join together and fight for what matters most. Please, say you’re with Roy in the fight to expand Medicaid coverage by adding your name right now>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37571841/311683362/-1052885936?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjExYzhhMy1kNzJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jfWWwmvcq0JGzs8s7P5SZXJPUyJPX1Y-O0zTTMDtDoo=&emci=9835362f-342d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=1611c8a3-d72d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1049176)** | **[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37571846/311683364/-1052885936?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjExYzhhMy1kNzJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jfWWwmvcq0JGzs8s7P5SZXJPUyJPX1Y-O0zTTMDtDoo=&emci=9835362f-342d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=1611c8a3-d72d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1049176)**
---
Look, we know we talk about this a lot. But that’s because quality health care access truly is one of the most important issues facing North Carolina.
Just think about it: Without insurance, an inhaler prescribed by your doctor might cost about $50. That might also be your grocery budget for the week. What would you do?
**Peter,_no one_ should ever have to choose between picking up a necessary prescription and putting food on the table. A visit to the doctor shouldn’t break the bank.**
**[Roy will never stop fighting for the Medicaid expansion North Carolinians need and deserve. But he needs to know he has YOU with him. Show your support by adding your name right now>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37571849/311683369/-1052885936?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjExYzhhMy1kNzJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jfWWwmvcq0JGzs8s7P5SZXJPUyJPX1Y-O0zTTMDtDoo=&emci=9835362f-342d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=1611c8a3-d72d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1049176)**
Thanks,
Team Cooper

name: Tiffany Smiley
subject: Our elections need to be secure
body:
Don't you agree?
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YUTBvFiFiefoFc0VZ3uE_nSwVHGCEcPh6537aYAreqHgFY7A0gXGQ0zl2DI9Y6SDoWmDGmBDhRwlK28M_g-Us8il7V4jbkjl9aenvfqXBnDwLZIfD3vqdOUBKB1zfuzy_BiExOiJsh-Usz3gyKCLY9NImnTwF87iEQP3rfiarrfDFJsMj-fYD1uv0ZjiNrPmvfNwkwO7NuoVP5VnSmcZUA==&c=mSuM81VTx3othFlgqVpmNZGvGuSeLNn1-w2HWGoMYpqPBe1XQa1bCg==&ch=PIS3f9sbFQsECe0q8JcgKIMroXygZ7SbkXPclwymgX5fXH_1d5i_JQ==)
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Friend,
---
| Election Integrity should be a bipartisan issue. Voting is a fundamental right of this country and it should be easy to do so.
Our system needs common sense solutions that are overwhelmingly supported by the American people: implementation of national voter ID, making sure our county voting systems are kept up-to-date, and signature/photo verification on mail-in-ballots are a MUST.
Patty Murray hasn't supported any of the above. She's more concerned about keeping the liberal political points she's earned than giving the American people the confidence they're asking for in our election system.
[If you support election integrity, like me, please make a donation in the next 30 minutes. >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YUTBvFiFiefoFc0VZ3uE_nSwVHGCEcPh6537aYAreqHgFY7A0gXGQ0zl2DI9Y6SDoWmDGmBDhRwlK28M_g-Us8il7V4jbkjl9aenvfqXBnDwLZIfD3vqdOUBKB1zfuzy_BiExOiJsh-Usz3gyKCLY9NImnTwF87iEQP3rfiarrfDFJsMj-fYD1uv0ZjiNrPmvfNwkwO7NuoVP5VnSmcZUA==&c=mSuM81VTx3othFlgqVpmNZGvGuSeLNn1-w2HWGoMYpqPBe1XQa1bCg==&ch=PIS3f9sbFQsECe0q8JcgKIMroXygZ7SbkXPclwymgX5fXH_1d5i_JQ==)
---
| | | [DONATE NOW TO SECURE OUR ELECTIONS](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YUTBvFiFiefoFc0VZ3uE_nSwVHGCEcPh6537aYAreqHgFY7A0gXGQ0zl2DI9Y6SDoWmDGmBDhRwlK28M_g-Us8il7V4jbkjl9aenvfqXBnDwLZIfD3vqdOUBKB1zfuzy_BiExOiJsh-Usz3gyKCLY9NImnTwF87iEQP3rfiarrfDFJsMj-fYD1uv0ZjiNrPmvfNwkwO7NuoVP5VnSmcZUA==&c=mSuM81VTx3othFlgqVpmNZGvGuSeLNn1-w2HWGoMYpqPBe1XQa1bCg==&ch=PIS3f9sbFQsECe0q8JcgKIMroXygZ7SbkXPclwymgX5fXH_1d5i_JQ==)
---
| We need to make it easier to vote and hard to cheat. Let's SUPPORT election integrity.
Thank you,
Tiffany Smiley
---

name: Elaine Luria
subject: Why I ran
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elaine for Congress
body:
---
| | | Below is a longer, personal note about why I dedicated my life to serving this country. If you’re able to pitch in, [**please click here to make a donation. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37572164/311685947/-1063973066?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_211015_FR_MM2WhyIRan_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzQ1Yjg1NS1kOTJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aVVKgSbsSN31HAoP8L7HZuxJOssQjJIpVPL6uL-a3G4=)
---
Folks,
I joined the Navy when I was just 17 years old -- enrolling in the Naval Academy as a history and physics major, _just 17 years after they began allowing women to serve._
I always had a knack for math and science, so I forged my own path as one of the first women in the Navy’s nuclear power program. While deployed to the Middle East, I oversaw eight nuclear reactors and was responsible for training all 700 nuclear operators onboard.
I spent the next 20 years dedicating myself to the Naval Academy’s mission to assume the highest responsibilities of command, citizenship, and government.
When I retired from the Navy, I wanted to focus on being a mom and managing my small business, but I couldn’t shake the desire to be doing _more_ for the country I had served for the past two decades.
I wanted to be able to look my daughter in the eye and say that I stepped forward when my country needed me most. That’s why I decided to run for office in 2018.
**But I didn’t get to Congress by myself.** Our team defied the odds and flipped VA-02 in 2018 because of supporters like you who refused to back down -- and that’s how we went toe-to-toe with the full force of the GOP establishment and millions in dark money to hold this seat in 2020.
And I need your help to do it again, folks. Early investments in 2018 and 2020 were _key_ to us standing up to our Republican opponents, defying the odds, and winning.
I’ve dedicated my life to serving this country, and I have no plans of stopping anytime soon. [**Will you chip in before midnight tonight to help me reach my mid-month fundraising goal of $15,000? clean_body: | | | Below is a longer, personal note about why I dedicated my life to serving this country. If you’re able to pitch in, = Folks, I joined the Navy when I was just 17 years old -- enrolling in the Naval Academy as a history and physics major, just 17 years after they began allowing women to serve. I always had a knack for math and science, so I forged my own path as one of the first women in the Navy’s nuclear power program. While deployed to the Middle East, I oversaw eight nuclear reactors and was responsible for training all 700 nuclear operators onboard. I spent the next 20 years dedicating myself to the Naval Academy’s mission to assume the highest responsibilities of command, citizenship, and government. When I retired from the Navy, I wanted to focus on being a mom and managing my small business, but I couldn’t shake the desire to be doing more for the country I had served for the past two decades. I wanted to be able to look my daughter in the eye and say that I stepped forward when my country needed me most. That’s why I decided to run for office in 2018. But I didn’t get to Congress by myself. Our team defied the odds and flipped VA-02 in 2018 because of supporters like you who refused to back down -- and that’s how we went toe-to-toe with the full force of the GOP establishment and millions in dark money to hold this seat in 2020. And I need your help to do it again, folks. Early investments in 2018 and 2020 were key to us standing up to our Republican opponents, defying the odds, and winning. I’ve dedicated my life to serving this country, and I have no plans of stopping anytime soon. = | | = Thank you, Elaine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. The enthusiasm for our campaign and the support have received up until now has been incredible! The attention Charles is receiving is all thanks to our grassroots supporters -- who retweeted our video, read our emails, or donated to our campaign so that we have the resources to spread Charles’ message of unity and hope across North Carolina and the country.

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Polling shows a tied race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Tonight’s deadline is a big one
#
Team, I’m running against an extreme, Trump-backed culture warrior. I know you understand how serious the Virginia governor’s race is for Virginia and America’s future. **_That’s why I’m so stunned that we haven’t gotten more support to hit our fundraising goal tonight!_**
Let me remind you why this goal is so important.
We are just weeks away from Election Day, and polling shows a tied race. The final filing deadline of the campaign is just days away and we have to reach our goal to have the resources we need for the campaign homestretch.
**[Please, split a donation of any amount right now between my campaign and Jacky Rosen to power this campaign through the finish line.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37572964/311688549/-2076894287?refcode=jr_em_nd_211014_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTYxNGVmYS1kOTJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Tx2ZHiGW91nMxQWKBLDb7_4QJp_TIFZ5OqHs9WZpgQ=)**
I really can’t overstate the importance of your support.
Every dollar we raise helps us reach one more voter with our positive message for Virginia's future -- and in a race this close, every single vote makes a huge difference.
Polls show a lot of Virginia voters are still undecided, so we need your help to keep our ads on the air and our organizing team on the doors.
**[Right now, will you split a donation to help fund our voter mobilization efforts in the final weeks?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37572965/311688550/-2076894287?refcode=jr_em_nd_211014_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTYxNGVmYS1kOTJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Tx2ZHiGW91nMxQWKBLDb7_4QJp_TIFZ5OqHs9WZpgQ=)**
Thank you for everything,
Terry McAuliffe

subject: Inflation Up; Biden’s Approval Down.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Under President Joe Biden and his handlers, inflation is skyrocketing faster than William Shatner’s rocket into space. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470894?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Inflation Up; Biden's Approval Down**_ Under President Joe Biden and his handlers, inflation is skyrocketing faster than William Shatner’s rocket into space. And, make no mistake, Biden’s inflation is a tax on all Americans, hitting lower and middle income families the hardest. Over the last year, inflation rose 8.6%, the largest increase since 2010 (when Joe Biden was Vice President). Everything is more expensive now than it was last year. Gas, groceries, construction materials, household items, have all gone up. These “hidden” tax increases on everything you purchase are the direct results of Biden and his handlers’ leftwing radicalism. So, keep that in mind when the President claims he will not raise taxes on anyone making less than $400,000 a year... he already has broken that promise!

In fact, one struggles to find any area that has actually improved since Joe Biden, his handlers, and the radical left Democrats came into office in DC. We’ve covered inflation. His leadership on the pandemic is muddled, inconsistent, and confusing, despite his promise to "shut down the virus." Thousands of illegal, unvaccinated immigrants are pouring through the border and being released into the United States. The lingering effects of Biden’s Afghanistan debacle are still being felt and we still have Americans left behind and the Taliban-controlled country. Our standing on the world stage has cratered, China is getting more aggressive, supply chains are breaking, and now the IRS will start snooping into every checking account in America. We’re not even a year in and the unchecked power of the Biden administration has been a complete disaster for the American people.

Thankfully, we have an opportunity to halt Biden’s leftward lunge and reverse the damage he and his handlers are inflicting on our economy. The 2022 election gives us the opportunity to send conservative majorities back to Washington and your Indiana Republican Party is laying the groundwork now to make sure the Hoosier State does our part to send Senator Todd Young and our House delegation back to Washington. Please reach out to our team if you are looking for ways to help.

Thanks
Kyle

_**Photo:** Chairman Hupfer speaks at last week's Allen County Bean Dinner_

|

|

| **_Building One Indiana For All_**
**Governor Holcomb **joined Saab to celebrate the opening of their new West Lafayette facility. Hoosiers at this facility will build components for the US Air force T-7A Redhawk. Together we are continuing to drive innovation and redefine the future of aerospace.

**Governor Holcomb** was on hand for another huge announcement! Israel-based Doral Renewables LLC, a developer of renewable energy projects, broke ground on phase one of the company's three-phase solar farm project. This project is expected to deliver a $1.5 billion investment in the company's Indiana operations.

**_Photos:_**_ Gov. Holcomb celebrating the grand opening of Saab's new West Lafayette facility. Gov. Holcomb breaking ground on Doral Renewables LLC's solar farm project._

Suzanne Crouch joined 14 other Republican lieutenant governors to urge Biden to reverse his decision to seize distribution of monoclonal antibody therapies for COVID-19. This unjustified attack is keeping lifesaving treatment from Americans.

Read their full letter to Biden here:

clean_body: Under President Joe Biden and his handlers, inflation is skyrocketing faster than William Shatner’s rocket into space. | | | | | | | | Inflation Up; Biden's Approval Down Under President Joe Biden and his handlers, inflation is skyrocketing faster than William Shatner’s rocket into space. And, make no mistake, Biden’s inflation is a tax on all Americans, hitting lower and middle income families the hardest. Over the last year, inflation rose 8.6%, the largest increase since 2010 (when Joe Biden was Vice President). Everything is more expensive now than it was last year. Gas, groceries, construction materials, household items, have all gone up. These “hidden” tax increases on everything you purchase are the direct results of Biden and his handlers’ leftwing radicalism. So, keep that in mind when the President claims he will not raise taxes on anyone making less than $400,000 a year... he already has broken that promise! In fact, one struggles to find any area that has actually improved since Joe Biden, his handlers, and the radical left Democrats came into office in DC. We’ve covered inflation. His leadership on the pandemic is muddled, inconsistent, and confusing, despite his promise to "shut down the virus." Thousands of illegal, unvaccinated immigrants are pouring through the border and being released into the United States. The lingering effects of Biden’s Afghanistan debacle are still being felt and we still have Americans left behind and the Taliban-controlled country. Our standing on the world stage has cratered, China is getting more aggressive, supply chains are breaking, and now the IRS will start snooping into every checking account in America. We’re not even a year in and the unchecked power of the Biden administration has been a complete disaster for the American people. Thankfully, we have an opportunity to halt Biden’s leftward lunge and reverse the damage he and his handlers are inflicting on our economy. The 2022 election gives us the opportunity to send conservative majorities back to Washington and your Indiana Republican Party is laying the groundwork now to make sure the Hoosier State does our part to send Senator Todd Young and our House delegation back to Washington. Please reach out to our team if you are looking for ways to help. October 15th, 2021
## Joe Rogan, Neil Shah, Ivermectin
I need to get something off my chest... A lot of things in the past year got my blood boiling. One of those things was the government-media censorship and mockery of valid treatments for COVID. When famous podcaster Joe Rogan took ivermectin, the dishonest media started spreading disinformation. They told their audience that he was taking "horse dewormer". Joe had a chance to confront CNN's Chief Medical Officer about it. Check out this video! [](https://www.action4liberty.com/joe_rogan_confront_cnn_s_chief_medical_officer_about_lies?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rogan_shah_and_ivermectin&n=2) We just learned that Mayo trained physician and gubernatorial candidate, Dr. Neil Shah, came down with COVID this week and is treating his breakout case with ivermectin as well. I think it's safe to say that this intelligent doctor has read a study or two and isn't using drugs for livestock. You can [**see his video here**](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=JgIBoJDRsS4q5gIGXkALnXgt0k5tUmBg0nksWlJSt4c&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rogan_shah_and_ivermectin&n=3). **_While the mainstream media continues to lie to the American people about lifesaving information, Facebook does nothing. But when Action 4 Liberty tells the truth, we get banned and silenced._** We, at Action 4 Liberty, are committed to fighting back! Our field team is headed up north this weekend to door knock. We're calling tens of thousands of voters a week. We will NOT STOP until vaccine mandates are dead. **Jake Duesenberg** **Action 4 Liberty** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rogan_shah_and_ivermectin&n=4 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rogan_shah_and_ivermectin&n=4)

clean_body: | October 15th, 2021 Joe Rogan, Neil Shah, Ivermectin I need to get something off my chest... A lot of things in the past year got my blood boiling. One of those things was the government-media censorship and mockery of valid treatments for COVID. When famous podcaster Joe Rogan took ivermectin, the dishonest media started spreading disinformation. They told their audience that he was taking "horse dewormer". Joe had a chance to confront CNN's Chief Medical Officer about it. Check out this video! We just learned that Mayo trained physician and gubernatorial candidate, Dr. Neil Shah, came down with COVID this week and is treating his breakout case with ivermectin as well. I think it's safe to say that this intelligent doctor has read a study or two and isn't using drugs for livestock. You can . While the mainstream media continues to lie to the American people about lifesaving information, Facebook does nothing. But when Action 4 Liberty tells the truth, we get banned and silenced. We, at Action 4 Liberty, are committed to fighting back! Our field team is headed up north this weekend to door knock. We're calling tens of thousands of voters a week. We will NOT STOP until vaccine mandates are dead. Jake Duesenberg Action 4 Liberty | "Support Us"

name: Kevin Hern
subject: Joe Biden's economy
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
The latest numbers on the economy are in, and it’s not looking good. Read more >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/231e86f1576790c3/fbd38676470a645cc3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
Peter, Biden’s economy is going from bad to worse, and it’s only going to go downhill from here if they continue on this disastrous path. **Bidenomics is not good for America, and not good for the hard-working men and women who are just trying to keep a roof over their families’ heads and put dinner on the table. ** Of course I’m referring to the tyrannical mandates that are shutting down small businesses. I’m pursuing both legislative and legal actions against President Biden’s executive order for the Department of Labor to force businesses with 100 or more employees to implement a vaccine mandate. How does this make sense in an economy where 7.7 million Americans are unemployed? When inflation is higher than it has been since Obama was president? When we’re adding fewer jobs to the economy than even low estimates? _How does this make sense at ALL in the land of the free and the home of the brave?_ **It doesn’t, and that’s why I’m fighting these unconstitutional mandates that are wrecking our country and economy. **
---

Businesses are having a hard enough time as it is. Now they have to contend with vaccine mandates, inflation, and the threat of sky-rocketing taxes if Biden’s $3.5 TRILLION spending bill passes. **The Democrats are out of control, and unless we stand up to the them, fight back, and stop them, America doesn’t stand a chance. ** Please help, before it’s too late. Hey friend, it’s Maddy, Laurie’s finance director. Last month, supporters like you really came through and helped us reach our first end-of-quarter fundraising goal. More than 1,000 grassroots donors joined our movement in the first three months of our campaign! But ever since October began, we’ve had a slow start to fundraising, and it’s got us a bit worried. While Republican Ryan Zinke is raking in hundreds of thousands of dollars from corporate PACs and the GOP machine backed by Donald Trump, we’re counting on grassroots support from folks like you to fuel our people-powered campaign for positive change here in Montana. **To get us back on track, we need to raise $5,000 by midnight tomorrow.** **[Can you pitch in a few bucks — any amount makes a difference — to help us reach our goal and have the resources we need for Laurie to take on Zinke and win next year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37573616/311691663/-295802285?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211014mm1_ma_active_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGEyYWU0Zi1kZDJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ctFwJH-e-mWizKqcD5WRg7KhOrDJsK6wYdsGPpGpAJY=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Hey friend, it’s Maddy, Laurie’s finance director. Last month, supporters like you really came through and helped us reach our first end-of-quarter fundraising goal. More than 1,000 grassroots donors joined our movement in the first three months of our campaign! But ever since October began, we’ve had a slow start to fundraising, and it’s got us a bit worried. While Republican Ryan Zinke is raking in hundreds of thousands of dollars from corporate PACs and the GOP machine backed by Donald Trump, we’re counting on grassroots support from folks like you to fuel our people-powered campaign for positive change here in Montana. To get us back on track, we need to raise $5,000 by midnight tomorrow. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ****** | **** | = = **** | = = **** | = = Thanks for anything you can give to support Laurie in this competitive, critical House race. — Maddy | Paid for by Laurie Bishop for Montana Laurie Bishop for Montana PO Box 2188 Livingston, MT 59047 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

| | Folks, New campaign finance filings just came out, and we’ll be honest — it’s not looking good. The RSLC, the Republican committee funding state legislative campaigns — _including ones right here in Virginia_ — have outraised their Democratic counterparts to the tune of 3 million dollars. This could have huge ramifications here in Virginia, where our 5 seat majority in the House of Delegates is on the line. If the Republicans take back the House, all the progress we’ve have made on the abortion rights, LGBTQ+ protections, climate change, criminal justice reform, and gun control will all be rolled back. Make no mistake, this election is going to come down to a handful of votes and the Republican ticket will do whatever it needs to in order to sway undecided voters — from spouting Trumpian talking points like calling for audits of the voting machines to lying to voters about their real radical agenda. Virginia needs to keep moving forward, not head back to the stone ages. **That’s why we’re asking for your help, Derek. We can’t do this alone.[ Rush a donation of whatever you can to help us re-elect Democrats in the House of Delegates and protect our strong and hardworking house majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37573732/311692469/272180825?refcode=dpva-em-211015-3million&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTY2MTY4Ny1kZDJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gqz3jnQ7ls51Ql8CQK-BbBHSVRFIGG4xgfOi7Nsrfwk=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

It’s time to put an end to Pelosi’s reign. |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=95a861c910a24ef1b05f9bd5f1c13d43&_e=i1C_PFgdKIRFcXyI3YHS4oNqoYYE1t8gKwgYFZeLrB_I4mViIsx1HcJFdlLlGrTeo2Ya-2B9yQIZo1Yo7h8an0aGg9SEgiGrj3kM0a7Ij80Znkaz1gY2Bk0Fa_ZRH46-3MleokuGFhiH3C9jq19OxWAK0OhaFN_QCTSDbqqBn03JGD8sfRN2hkd3cLGZeY6O4eweK2894MeCq9CbDWJKD4-fd_-1w5ddEKhXD-iCWY3obkaGIj3udVcgtI3ymNCXGVlE6OnhXNBlUj-Bj9hTTiQeDgi7Z9rJ3tm5l4tzHkNGmAkOJyMzmk-C16rXvXkH2yMIYZNwwANRhGD3DV1wiu5DfMW6GkdDwg49ixaxv0O9IbnR1_CjKZd5LTAaibZEtLIBC2k4zvBEAAIuWr9bsarjWZio-2uMxb0_RtBgeXBzlbJhT9EeJ-eoLmfeEVTh9ZJC2HXAzViwyllcttA_LaLcjOZANSqR8ZY-MNQidqXEYJO5ism6_vPu1f4TAHNoiJdNoCxURMxMVVTW9fMJY9DqAy_umfe1wmYh5sWvDBJMtI3TVlnXvzbCMCk8k8eWMPZfbKtej9OsivXBbtXXkQ%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative -

_It’s unsettling,_ isn’t it?

Democrats in Washington, D.C. are driving our great country down a very dangerous path.

Whether by incompetence, ignorance, or corruption - their arrogant, disastrous pursuit of open-border policies, useless spending and tyrannical mandates at home, are direct assaults upon American freedom, prosperity, and the rule of law.

Nancy Pelosi and her cohorts in Washington make millions of dollars off of companies they pretend to regulate - while using tyrannical mandates to shut your business down, keep our border open and enslaving us to debt in order to fund their endless spending in Congress.

The terrible results of the Biden-Pelosi Democrat are felt everyday by working American families at the gas pump and grocery store who are barely scraping by.

We’re even being told by Democrats to expect shortages - just as the holidays approach. It’s time to put an end to the radical Democrats destructive leadership._It’s time to put an end to Pelosi’s reign._

[**Fellow Conservative - will you sign my termination letter to Nancy Pelosi, letting her know that the American people are FIRING her from Congress?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=95a861c910a24ef1b05f9bd5f1c13d43&_e=i1C_PFgdKIRFcXyI3YHS4oNqoYYE1t8gKwgYFZeLrB_I4mViIsx1HcJFdlLlGrTeo2Ya-2B9yQIZo1Yo7h8an0aGg9SEgiGrj3kM0a7Ij80Znkaz1gY2Bk0Fa_ZRH46-3MleokuGFhiH3C9jq19OxWAK0OhaFN_QCTSDbqqBn03JGD8sfRN2hkd3cLGZeY6O4eweK2894MeCq9CbDWJKD4-fd_-1w5ddEKhXD-iCWY3obkaGIj3udVcgtI3ymNCXGVlE6OnhXNBlUj-Bj9hTTiQeDgi7Z9rJ3tm5l4tzHkNGmAkOJyMzmk-C16rXvXkH2yMIYZNwwANRhGD3DV1wiu5DfMW6GkdDwg49ixaxv0O9IbnR1_CjKZd5LTAaibZEP9TaVTy9gWYuUttQry6P6Dt840443p84RVmq-JEoXY51XCs9oH87sRqfVMfrI5hJM5BBRyySecIWIgZsLFZCUVtplmGC5KjaO9OETUHa14Rk93U0ACKIEOOSXCUVSzGafVP9CL7Gg56tcMN8K4IvOQuVRCVIoIfAK9n-Kl57RvBpVHfisPslUz2CXg1YsmxhDMPwLyK76fHMBUCXZinlIw%3D%3D)

| [ FIRE PELOSI: SIGN THE LETTER ➔](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=95a861c910a24ef1b05f9bd5f1c13d43&_e=i1C_PFgdKIRFcXyI3YHS4oNqoYYE1t8gKwgYFZeLrB_I4mViIsx1HcJFdlLlGrTeo2Ya-2B9yQIZo1Yo7h8an0aGg9SEgiGrj3kM0a7Ij80Znkaz1gY2Bk0Fa_ZRH46-3MleokuGFhiH3C9jq19OxWAK0OhaFN_QCTSDbqqBn03JGD8sfRN2hkd3cLGZeY6O4eweK2894MeCq9CbDWJKD4-fd_-1w5ddEKhXD-iCWY3obkaGIj3udVcgtI3ymNCXGVlE6OnhXNBlUj-Bj9hTTiQeDgi7Z9rJ3tm5l4tzHkNGmAkOJyMzmk-C16rXvXkH2yMIYZNwwANRhGD3DV1wiu5DfMW6GkdDwg49ixaxv0O9IbnR1_CjKZd5LTAaibZENihWk8SLuikVEZRYIWKao125zkjc9UvgwtBKZv4t9rQjeU7UrlIwuGKbMKIa0NiFDwEXaZU_8_02UAgMSU5lwmk9DcOhqGJ6kW63TD8I1jFOmrngbpwlXzdWn561gpQ3XsOC3e-ul_TuOa3Uya4b_62e9j0KUoQaPA9ttLULV_89Pc3azqzXtmBJCd_oLdxu4sfpI_44XDwp6vQx8WUImA%3D%3D)
---

As Americans we cannot continue down the path, we’re on... a path towards socialism. I stand for economic and personal freedom, America-First foreign policy and a strong defense, lower taxes, and building the wall to protect our country from outrageous immigration.

But we need big change - [**_we need to send Nancy Pelosi packing._**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=95a861c910a24ef1b05f9bd5f1c13d43&_e=i1C_PFgdKIRFcXyI3YHS4oNqoYYE1t8gKwgYFZeLrB_I4mViIsx1HcJFdlLlGrTeo2Ya-2B9yQIZo1Yo7h8an0aGg9SEgiGrj3kM0a7Ij80Znkaz1gY2Bk0Fa_ZRH46-3MleokuGFhiH3C9jq19OxWAK0OhaFN_QCTSDbqqBn03JGD8sfRN2hkd3cLGZeY6O4eweK2894MeCq9CbDWJKD4-fd_-1w5ddEKhXD-iCWY3obkaGIj3udVcgtI3ymNCXGVlE6OnhXNBlUj-Bj9hTTiQeDgi7Z9rJ3tm5l4tzHkNGmAkOJyMzmk-C16rXvXkH2yMIYZNwwANRhGD3DV1wiu5DfMW6GkdDwg49ixaxv0O9IbnR1_CjKZd5LTAaibZE4etQsgR5RiMvd2cXNcFiPyWKBGaKxYeoxP6-Rw-r2hGSEaqyp918IyruM625MW2z4mynQ3jdi2syESE3LnqD9DHlfsPEnR57Hp0lwShV41Z-DF2EsZQ7qryQG-4sNAP0QgmJrN_vYW1y74HMFaAqv6kVUy03Aickq2DNFwh_iBBHMGzQBcDwOMmd_V8Tbs87Y9R3Vw9vphqNlzOeXVbKZA%3D%3D)

A Red wave of GOP wins is on the horizon - and I’m leading the charge right here in Nevada. It’s time to take back the house. Pelosi’s days of putting America-Last are numbered.

[**Fellow Conservative, will you join my cause today to FIRE PELOSI by signing her termination letter?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=95a861c910a24ef1b05f9bd5f1c13d43&_e=i1C_PFgdKIRFcXyI3YHS4oNqoYYE1t8gKwgYFZeLrB_I4mViIsx1HcJFdlLlGrTeo2Ya-2B9yQIZo1Yo7h8an0aGg9SEgiGrj3kM0a7Ij80Znkaz1gY2Bk0Fa_ZRH46-3MleokuGFhiH3C9jq19OxWAK0OhaFN_QCTSDbqqBn03JGD8sfRN2hkd3cLGZeY6O4eweK2894MeCq9CbDWJKD4-fd_-1w5ddEKhXD-iCWY3obkaGIj3udVcgtI3ymNCXGVlE6OnhXNBlUj-Bj9hTTiQeDgi7Z9rJ3tm5l4tzHkNGmAkOJyMzmk-C16rXvXkH2yMIYZNwwANRhGD3DV1wiu5DfMW6GkdDwg49ixaxv0O9IbnR1_CjKZd5LTAaibZEQ4Nxl3JLIvCmpXc7zomfNhWcJlrrM2dSzQQVcHLF0_pZ8JTLpMYGaK8ZFwRT-_BGw15rAnOFYHYiPn9zg4mkocgEa4iGY0R_TelTebw3lF1SF97UiD_ytmbfE2qmwojaDO9XsVpzBVDFlkNmNd62OCw2oJhWWasnbyrz5KKcPydAl-ZobPP_miDGhvVg-ycyMpyYm6-budwi8zILA8b4ZA%3D%3D)

[ FIRE PELOSI: SIGN THE LETTER ➔](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=95a861c910a24ef1b05f9bd5f1c13d43&_e=i1C_PFgdKIRFcXyI3YHS4oNqoYYE1t8gKwgYFZeLrB_I4mViIsx1HcJFdlLlGrTeo2Ya-2B9yQIZo1Yo7h8an0aGg9SEgiGrj3kM0a7Ij80Znkaz1gY2Bk0Fa_ZRH46-3MleokuGFhiH3C9jq19OxWAK0OhaFN_QCTSDbqqBn03JGD8sfRN2hkd3cLGZeY6O4eweK2894MeCq9CbDWJKD4-fd_-1w5ddEKhXD-iCWY3obkaGIj3udVcgtI3ymNCXGVlE6OnhXNBlUj-Bj9hTTiQeDgi7Z9rJ3tm5l4tzHkNGmAkOJyMzmk-C16rXvXkH2yMIYZNwwANRhGD3DV1wiu5DfMW6GkdDwg49ixaxv0O9IbnR1_CjKZd5LTAaibZE0TEEG50kxlRMqbVCQhF3QxP3v6oG3HifJ6m3JiHhv6Gwirm21QxkIuSyfEXkk-SCpoE68wTacaqmRk-3y3zJzlbvPtnnCoKf8DPLD0WQscdsMByHxaGX3nqhNkeOVoRlnb9St8jxfc-CFmADBCzM2-3vtNF7vUmRYZlfZcvVAAINstys_f8rtdmcgKoWWo5EOTvz-TpNlyuAYIaLZC8InA%3D%3D)

I’m counting on conservative patriots like you to send a clear message to Democrats:**their disastrous agenda is coming to a screeching halt.**

For the future,

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: Democrats think we’re fools. They lie to our faces and hope we won’t notice.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
Millions of dollars are being spent attacking my name, trying to tarnish my reputation with lies and half-truths. The Democrats' arguments would hold The only thing I’m guilty of is making my opponent and national Democrats spend money to defend a congressional seat they think belongs to them | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=c13bd6dfe3ca4a8983f758dfd3d5bb6d&_e=c0FNVL0tesKCt65rIqvt8KM1raflnQZzPGAkDBlDsnfNbTagOeeW1G7S4bk5bqSWa1z_MvB1nlKeCtFH56pLbtH6XFgPrtl94UPP_CpFZSjNfjIVhgKMH9IRrrnMHswOPUAcGfNMjuLrvSQFpv3hwPxxa7jLUeZCc3azaVfBLsHuRQnFxHqjJJ6FBWgh-oj092yilSN89k1IGZMB-igMBfu540tSpvCP0mtWkGqbMsuiASzduKCV17GWN5AtVbwntifIujGaqyTdnJN-SqgESple2rFyNKqfZDPDEKUJgxkjPsSkNRZ14r05l-DtUKK04sCWGQ5pvNPOO6gEr76tow5h8ep1WmLzSN9oV-RkdZ8frpF81RTxLiDyursRC2IY_Zo11mBbPoutSWjdJOi3zsC_Z3AXRt3q3W6KADM7JyQoFI7D00G2M70NusmbBNny)
---
Peter,

**They’re coming after me.** Democrats saw how close my campaign came to ousting one of their own last November, so they’re doing what they do best – activating their base by spreading vicious lies about my character. When all else fails, Democrats just start lying and hope the electorate won’t notice.

I definitely don’t operate that way, perhaps _**that’s why I lost last my race last year.**_

Once upon a time there was something called moral fiber; national Democrats seem to have forgotten the meaning. Let’s dive a bit deeper.
1. In 2010, Nancy Pelosi and Barack Obama said that “** _if you like your doctor, you can keep them_**.” That was a lie Democrats told to help ensure passage of Obamacare.

**Lie.**

2. Democrats are now pressing forward with the fabrication that any candidate for school boards who don’t support teaching of **Critical Race Theory** in public schools has to be a member of QAnon. _How does that even make sense?_

**Another lie.**

3. Remember when Democrats – at the highest level – went on the national news circuit to claim that a Christian artists’ depiction of the prophet Mohammed resulted in the terror attack on the U.S. base in Benghazi?

**Lie.** The attack that killed a U.S. ambassador was coordinated and planned in advance.

When all else fails, Democrats just start lying and hope the electorate won’t notice. I definitely don’t operate that way, perhaps that’s why I lost last my race last year. Once upon a time there was something called moral fiber; national Democrats seem to have forgotten the meaning. Let’s dive a bit deeper. 1. In 2010, Nancy Pelosi and Barack Obama said that “ if you like your doctor, you can keep them.” That was a lie Democrats told to help ensure passage of Obamacare. Lie. 2. Democrats are now pressing forward with the fabrication that any candidate for school boards who don’t support teaching of Critical Race Theory in public schools has to be a member of QAnon. How does that even make sense? Another lie. 3. Remember when Democrats – at the highest level – went on the national news circuit to claim that a Christian artists’ depiction of the prophet Mohammed resulted in the terror attack on the U.S. base in Benghazi? name: Team Holly
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene doesn't want you to open this email.
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Dear Peter,
I'm Holly McCormack and today I'm announcing my candidacy against Marjorie Taylor Greene for Georgia's 14th Congressional District. We are kicking off our campaign today by reaching out to you because we need your support. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc]
I am a mother, small businesswoman, and a community activist. I have lived in this District most of my life and the issues our residents are facing are not addressed with conspiracy theories.
Rush a donation today:
$5.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $50.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $10.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $75.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $25.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $100.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vvydox3IxDY [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vvydox3IxDY]Northwest Georgia is currently represented by someone who parachuted into the District just before the election because she thought it would be an easy win. She likes to make noise and fuel hate while ignoring the needs of those who actually live in our District. That is not who we are ! We need someone from our community who knows our struggles and who can stand up for us to get things done in Congress.
We need a leader who has values and empathy for everyone in her District, not just those with the loudest voices. Let's cut through the noise and get to work.

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Sign the No Forced COVID Vax Open Letter
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal
_Sponsored message_
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z94np5s7dmi0e0r5l5nvr4tbtvlh2knmgrkitgso_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cph60o76c5h2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd956399gsheleven90kqlnu4d8tohca248oege8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cph60o76c5h2bs) [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu3ivirat46c3en9rmejl0djq6ovf23f79r6ahpg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cph60o76c5h2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zka1mmfj4jp947nmkvhka79uov29im15cqgv2dsg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cph60o76c5h2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf9318si6ehj8p7ejoq79j7ecuuelbmb4oms8p70_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cph60o76c5h2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0s6jlakluqd0uv4tt8spful791pi4hrdt4a31a8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cph60o76c5h2bs) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

clean_body: By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal Sponsored message Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has NO POWER to get involved in your medical decisions. PERIOD! But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are FORCING students to get the COVID vaccine... DEMANDING that they publicly share their medical history... and BANNING them from school if they don’t comply! My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a “NO FORCED VAX” campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. This move by the universities is not about vaccines AT ALL. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his ONLINE college classes until he takes the vaccine! If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next! We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. Thank you for your support! name: Eden McKissick-Hawley
subject: GROUP PHOTO: Campaign Staffer Training Retreat 📸
body:
We’re building a progressive movement, one staffer at a time.

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37576357/311703373/1300596418?refcode=211015_FR_midmonth2eden_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzMjI2YzBkLWU1MmQtZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0nWURlMzOKGiLsZmes6YYvc_UUBRhZgRvn1UMWVgP48=)
---
Peter,

We talk a lot about how Barrier to Entry provides cash assistance to working-class candidates facing socioeconomic barriers so that they can run successful campaigns.

But I want to echo Megan’s email from yesterday and underscore the importance of the training component we provide. Building progressive campaigns means investing resources and time into the actual talent behind these people-powered movements, making sure they feel prepared, valued, and energized. And, it also means making room for people of color, people who are LGBTQ+, and people from low-income backgrounds.

_**That’s why our first-ever group training retreat last month was so impactful: Our team is a reflection of our values and what we want our Party to look like.**_
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37576358/311703374/1300596418?refcode=211015_FR_midmonth2eden_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzMjI2YzBkLWU1MmQtZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0nWURlMzOKGiLsZmes6YYvc_UUBRhZgRvn1UMWVgP48=) It was nothing short of inspiring working with this inclusive team of progressive campaign staffers from all over the country and having the opportunity to leverage their talents so that they can bring their skills to help working-class candidates win races.

I’m looking forward to bringing together more progressives and those looking to break the barrier into the Democratic campaign space with further trainings -- **but in order to do that while still providing our BTE candidates with crucial financial aid, we need to hit our fundraising benchmarks._That’s where you come in._** **[We’re still short of our mid-month goal by $1,684, and we need to close the gap by MIDNIGHT. Can we count on you to support our growing progressive movement by pitching in $25 or any amount right now?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37576359/311703396/-2038882143?refcode=211015_FR_midmonth2eden_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzMjI2YzBkLWU1MmQtZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0nWURlMzOKGiLsZmes6YYvc_UUBRhZgRvn1UMWVgP48=)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | ********[**$10 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37576360/311703403/1300596418?refcode=211015_FR_midmonth2eden_EL10&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode2=EL10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzMjI2YzBkLWU1MmQtZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0nWURlMzOKGiLsZmes6YYvc_UUBRhZgRvn1UMWVgP48=)********

clean_body: We’re building a progressive movement, one staffer at a time. | | | = Peter, We talk a lot about how Barrier to Entry provides cash assistance to working-class candidates facing socioeconomic barriers so that they can run successful campaigns. But I want to echo Megan’s email from yesterday and underscore the importance of the training component we provide. Building progressive campaigns means investing resources and time into the actual talent behind these people-powered movements, making sure they feel prepared, valued, and energized. And, it also means making room for people of color, people who are LGBTQ+, and people from low-income backgrounds. That’s why our first-ever group training retreat last month was so impactful: Our team is a reflection of our values and what we want our Party to look like. = It was nothing short of inspiring working with this inclusive team of progressive campaign staffers from all over the country and having the opportunity to leverage their talents so that they can bring their skills to help working-class candidates win races. I’m looking forward to bringing together more progressives and those looking to break the barrier into the Democratic campaign space with further trainings -- but in order to do that while still providing our BTE candidates with crucial financial aid, we need to hit our fundraising benchmarks.That’s where you come in. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ******=**** **** **** | | ******=****** | ******=****** **** **** | | ******=****** | ******=****** **** **** | | ******=****** Your grassroots support is critical to our mission, and I can’t thank you enough. We also serve as a resource for individual mentorship and training to ensure candidates and their staff feel supported and equipped to enter the political space. Pitch in today to help provide necessary support and resources for working class candidates today! >> __= | || || Barrier To Entry PAC PO Box 6623 Cleveland, OH 44101 United States | |

Peter,
---
I warned you this could happen.
---
After 7 FBI agents raided my apartment at 6:00 in the morning, I said that the FBI could one day target private citizens like you.
---
Now, Biden's goons at the Justice Department have unveiled a plan to go after concerned parents at PTA and school board meetings who oppose left-wing indoctrination.
---
I set up the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to fight for my freedom. But this battle against the Deep State isn't just about _my_ freedom. **_Yours is at stake, too._**
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund as I battle for my freedom and justice against the Deep State.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58537406:Jwp63d2iN:m:1:3253819041:713E5482C37E5BBA0D386A65312CC19A:r)

---
Biden's Justice Department has zero interest in upholding justice in America.
---
_They ought to be investigating voter fraud, the Biden Crime Family, D.C. corruption, sanctuary cities that harbor illegal immigrants, and infringements upon innocent Americans ' constitutional rights._

But so long as I'm standing, I will keep fighting back against the Deep State no matter how hard they try to intimidate me.

clean_body: Can You Help? | TED BUDD IS THE TRUMP-ENDORSED REPUBLICAN CANDIDATE FOR U.S. SENATE IN NORTH CAROLINA Friend, October Mid‐Month is here and I need your help. My campaign needs your support, and it cannot wait any longer. I am sure you've gotten a lot of emails like this. I understand that it can be frustrating, but the alternative is one that I fear. Without Conservative Senate victories, the Biden Administration will destroy this country. Our government was founded on checks and balances, but when Dems have the power in every place, it all falls apart. Wouldn't you agree? | This is scary, friend. I do not want you to miss the gravity of the situation. I am working hard to bring America First policies back to D.C. and if that matters to you, please Can I count on you? It is time for all of us to step up.Step up for your family, your friends and for this country. I am running for Senate to do just the same. This is crucial: it is about all of us and about the future of this country. Thank you for your support. Sincerely, Ted Budd TED BUDD IS THE TRUMP-ENDORSED REPUBLICAN CANDIDATE FOR U.S. SENATE IN NORTH CAROLINA Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright © 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Sen. Raphael Warnock
subject: the honest truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
With the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to put Mitch McConnell back in power -- and election experts from The Washington Post to NBC News confirm that I'm the GOP's top target for defeat.
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37577055/311706321/-341253877?refcode=dd_em_211014_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDQzMzU3Ni1lODJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mNK5Endb3qsNeySs1wwoQukxcZgfXvKtNb27fqfpyS4=)
Peter,
In a moment, I'm going to ask you to pitch in to my reelection campaign before our critical midnight deadline -- so we can keep Georgia blue and protect our Democratic Senate majority. **But first, let me explain why your support is so critical -- and what could happen to the future of our progressive agenda without it.**
My journey to becoming Georgia's first-ever Black senator was an unlikely one. I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth -- I had 11 brothers and sisters and grew up in public housing. But through hard work and the support of my community, I went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, this kid from the housing projects is fighting in the Senate to build a government that works for _everyone_ \-- not just those at the top.
Since day one, I've made my priorities clear: Defend and expand voting rights to strengthen our democracy, raise the minimum wage to build an economy that works for everyone, and expand affordable health care so filling a prescription doesn't break the bank. But here's the honest truth: I simply can't win these critical fights for justice without grassroots folks like you by my side -- so I have to ask:
**[Will you split a $5 donation right now between our campaign and Senator Durbin so we can hit our crucial midnight fundraising goal, power our reelection campaign to victory, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37577056/311706322/-341253877?refcode=dd_em_211014_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDQzMzU3Ni1lODJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mNK5Endb3qsNeySs1wwoQukxcZgfXvKtNb27fqfpyS4=)**
With the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to put Mitch McConnell back in power -- and election experts from _The Washington Post_ to _NBC News_ confirm that I'm the GOP's top target for defeat. This means that Democrats' razor-thin majority in the Senate will be in serious danger if we don't have the resources to keep Georgia blue.
**But right now, we're not on track to raise the $15,000 we need to fight back against GOP attacks and win in Georgia. The ONLY way I can close this budget gap is with _your_ grassroots support, Peter.**
My last election was one of the most expensive races in history, and there's no _question_ that the GOP will spend MILLIONS on top of millions to try and crush our people-powered movement again. **We can't let them. If we want to keep the Senate in Democratic hands, we have to keep Georgia blue. So please, I'm personally asking:**
**[Before our critical midnight deadline, will you split a $5 donation between our campaign and Senator Durbin so we can win in Georgia, protect our Democratic Senate majority and continue fighting for our progressive values?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37577057/311706323/-341253877?refcode=dd_em_211014_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDQzMzU3Ni1lODJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mNK5Endb3qsNeySs1wwoQukxcZgfXvKtNb27fqfpyS4=)**
Thanks for fighting alongside me at moments like these -- I appreciate you.
Sen. Raphael Warnock

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37577058/311706324/-341253877?refcode=dd_em_211014_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDQzMzU3Ni1lODJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mNK5Endb3qsNeySs1wwoQukxcZgfXvKtNb27fqfpyS4=)**

_We’re not asking everyone to join this exclusive club -- only Top Republicans like you._

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: I am writing to ask if you can please make a $3 contribution to Mark's campaign for U.S. Senate before his critical mid-month fundraising drive comes to an end.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends -
In life, we all deal with setbacks — some minor, and some that can seem almost impossible to bear.
But what I have learned throughout my recovery is that it’s not the setback that defines us, but how we respond.
I know it can feel frustrating to hear how many people are chipping in to help re-elect Mark and then wake up to hear the polls are still close and some outside group is attacking him with yet another multi-million dollar attack ad.
We all knew from the start that this was never going to be easy. Nothing worth it ever is. It’s true of my recovery, it’s true in this election, and I’m sure it’s true about something important in your life, as well.
But in all those things, we must consistently resist complacency and recommit ourselves to keep moving forward.
And that is why, with Mark’s mid-month fundraising drive ending at midnight, I am once again asking:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to Mark’s re-election before our mid-month fundraising drive comes to a close tonight? I would not ask if it were not so important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-oct21?refcode=em211015-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1538_6688874_-FEic_&akid=1538%2E6688874%2E-FEic_)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-oct21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em211015-1-15&t=20&refcode2=1538_6688874_-FEic_&akid=1538%2E6688874%2E-FEic_)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-oct21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em211015-1-15&t=21&refcode2=1538_6688874_-FEic_&akid=1538%2E6688874%2E-FEic_)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-oct21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em211015-1-15&t=22&refcode2=1538_6688874_-FEic_&akid=1538%2E6688874%2E-FEic_)**
---
****

| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-oct21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em211015-1-15&t=24&refcode2=1538_6688874_-FEic_&akid=1538%2E6688874%2E-FEic_)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-oct21?express_lane=true&refcode=em211015-1-15&t=25&refcode2=1538_6688874_-FEic_&akid=1538%2E6688874%2E-FEic_)**
---
****
Withstanding so many attacks from corporate special interests isn't easy. It takes courage. But supporters like you have given Mark and me the strength to move forward every step of the way. Thank you for that.
In courage,
Gabby

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=26&akid=1538%2E6688874%2E-FEic_).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.
clean_body: Friends - In life, we all deal with setbacks — some minor, and some that can seem almost impossible to bear. But what I have learned throughout my recovery is that it’s not the setback that defines us, but how we respond. I know it can feel frustrating to hear how many people are chipping in to help re-elect Mark and then wake up to hear the polls are still close and some outside group is attacking him with yet another multi-million dollar attack ad. We all knew from the start that this was never going to be easy. Nothing worth it ever is. It’s true of my recovery, it’s true in this election, and I’m sure it’s true about something important in your life, as well. But in all those things, we must consistently resist complacency and recommit ourselves to keep moving forward. And that is why, with Mark’s mid-month fundraising drive ending at midnight, I am once again asking: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Withstanding so many attacks from corporate special interests isn't easy. It takes courage. But supporters like you have given Mark and me the strength to move forward every step of the way. Thank you for that. In courage, Gabby Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: The Violent College Left
body:
Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system.
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
Fellow Patriot, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It’s never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That’s why it’s of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I’m no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. [**HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsmp2aqurg73fb9h9nlg7n4eqmahu9gjfs604f20_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cph64o70c1h2bs) Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn’t disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event—with the likely intent to do harm.

It’s no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It’s about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn’t have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony—a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. _**The good news is the radical Left’s attempts to silence me completely backfired.**_**** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that’s more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren’t for the **Young America’s Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university —**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America’s universities has not yet been broken. **Young America’s Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation’s leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you contribute $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7reoa9854bqgfnodcodsh8fvhhvslpg5bq55t48_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cph64o70c1h2bs)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America’s Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, “Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness.” YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they’re told to trust. YAF’s team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here’s why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF’s Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D’Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes,** Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O’Keefe,** NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News’s**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan’s ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan’s lasting accomplishments.

_No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America’s Foundation._ _That’s why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events._ They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can’t do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it’s become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn’t want a fair discussion of ideas. But that’s why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment’s notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF’s rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zek6m76u3alnfbjniq3tj6ab7kbpikpis3o4g8ng_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cph64o70c1h2bs) Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can’t be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can’t think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, “There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds.” I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America’s Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8i2ptu4puev3rrd27s4quuall6s35tl7glualco_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cph64o70c1h2bs) [**DONATE**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze1rlctldlb3dec3re4t0u7jft0g71kk4ghfoks8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cph64o70c1h2bs) [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zudsoqvi4mtn7mkqlerasuqdf8a9i275sbkr0688_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cph64o70c1h2bs) | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z34ebt3497qc9h7giol54eck8dnlcjuleum9ijb8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cph64o70c1h2bs) | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1e38l0tt90i66jrj474ddjr89u5q04pmvhqauco_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cph64o70c1h2bs) | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5qb65p9dfo77ai3okls9tvkbjk3dm37uooq4rpg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cph64o70c1h2bs)

Friend, Did you have a chance to read Nancy’s last email? Nancy knows you are one of her TOP supporters and she was concerned when you didn’t respond. She is doing everything she can to take back Congress from the far-left, but she can’t get far without your support. Can she count on you to donate ANY amount you can afford before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT?
