name: Patrick McNulty
subject: You can’t even leave the house without feeling the sting of Biden’s incompetence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin |
body:
A whopping 55% of Americans agree that the Biden Administration is too “incompetent” to run the country. You can’t even leave the house without... [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=4afc4d7ac66d46fca361a7a10deb2ea9&_e=qHzYXCJmpbhCVLFBwSURDafzm1nOOnGvNHr0Wj7HNzURv7bnj7P53u5aqrGjd8FI2kOusSBavocsSrJAXVZg5bWzjm3Z7M6Tfq84LEIdEzNvTF7paq2myBQJZJ9RjdENM6MpZKIXvm1CD5GH39XxmuxWEwRBpw7W82AjKwQF0ZIUjxYQr1GQyDtgs1yu1yHkH96VrInREV4e2LUJLHyVYptLwXiv3bjcMrlbaEnQaroq1uNKKMZRTXQLQslMVElbwnqN1Gm-5Kxjd8yvP0vLf5uNWtNDDe8ljqYH8r94DZhL6MbVz2pJUYN51roXvis1iMzvgFk1jptmBLC-dOQ3qxNOom_wS6wBc1EcIBmkHgH-p-UQKe29mp2PmkVFo3fLG22UQIJRJrGXqkyg6S0usU3gjkk0BSdCg1VcWNmin4B6u-D1H034qxxEUdbir6KdsBGkf6Wfg0ZccHXQGId7Fg%3D%3D) Peter, Have you seen the latest approval polls? **A whopping 55% of Americans agree that the Biden Administration is**** _“too incompetent”_****to run the country.** _It’s easy to see why:_ Gas prices here in Wisconsin are **55%** higher today than they were one year ago. **Thanks to Biden, you’re paying a LOT more just to do everyday things like:**
* Picking up your kids or grandkids from school.
* Running to the grocery store –– _where you’re also paying more!_
* Going to work and making a living.

body:
Let’s take a look...
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211015-3018-header&t=1&akid=3018%2E434096%2Etbw7cz)
It’s already halfway through October, Peter — so I want to quickly share some calculations the finance team and I did as we head into the weekend.
I’ve been crunching the numbers as we pass the mid-month mark, **and I’m seeing that we’re going to need about 12,000 individual contributions to meet our goal for this month.** I know — that’s a lot of people. 🥵 But we’ve got about 15 days left to do it, and I think with your help we can make it.
It’s a big effort to run a campaign to elect John Fetterman as a voice for working families (and our 51st Democratic vote!!) in the U.S. Senate, but that’s why we want to be honest with you about what it takes to get there every step of the way.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33012?refcode=em20211015-3018&t=2&akid=3018%2E434096%2Etbw7cz)
Because math is math, Peter. And this is exactly what we need to do to meet our goal. And as I run the numbers, I wanted to show you what I came across when your record popped up.👇
**_Peter's Official Team Fetterman Record_** **Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **2021 Donor:** No — not yet! **2021 Total:** $0.00 **Suggested Donation: $5** **[Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33012?refcode=em20211015-3018&t=3&akid=3018%2E434096%2Etbw7cz)**
---
On behalf of John and our entire campaign, we’re so grateful for the support you’ve shown so far. The campaign has grown a lot since launching back in February, and it’s all thanks to our uniquely dedicated online supporters.
John's refused to take a penny from corporate PACs or the shady special interests. _But that also means we’re relying on online supporters like you in an especially big way._
**[Can we count on your support for the very first time today ahead of tonight's mid-month fundraising deadline? If you’re in a place to do so, please make an online contribution to our campaign to elect John Fetterman for U.S. Senate.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33012?refcode=em20211015-3018&t=4&akid=3018%2E434096%2Etbw7cz)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33012?refcode=em20211015-3018&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=3018%2E434096%2Etbw7cz)**
In unity,
Eric 💙
Eric Stern
Deputy Campaign Manager
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected
This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zql222b00aruc5jqjl7fj88mvaqeblai09as6mn8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cph6cor4s5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you’re having a good day today. You may have heard a lot of talk in the media lately about how our Constitution, as designed by the Founding Fathers, is flawed and outdated. It may make you wonder, as it does me: How should defenders of the Constitution respond to these charges? Well, a few early defenders of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given us the guide: _The Federalist Papers_.[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvruoikg4mmvovmkj7bmnkke9uqp15oujn8ebtm0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cph6cor4s5h2bs) These essays were written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ , and were published initially as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” And Mark Levin—the “Great One”—gave Hillsdale a rare first edition set of these famous essays. They’re on display at our Allan P. Kirby, Jr. Center in Washington, D.C. It’s safe to say we’re pretty fond of _The Federalist Papers_ around here. In fact, that’s why we developed a course dedicated just to these important essays. There is no better guide to understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than through the words of the Founders themselves. That’s why I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, [_**"The Federalist Papers,”**_ ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5qa78icidrltl0ggmila2v0ugkt5es56j7emg2o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cph6cor4s5h2bs)on DVD today with your generous donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. You can learn more about this special DVD box set using this secure link: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5i4j78ipqetisknl1qqsnnktqdoq5b8hed499sg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cph6cor4s5h2bs)** Thanks for reading my email, and I hope you’ll reserve your copy of **[_“The Federalist Papers”_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd7uvn5mpu2l79c9b7863kaicq3p67f3enp1o4jo_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cph6cor4s5h2bs)** _****_ DVD box set today. Supplies are limited and I’d hate for you to miss out. Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2ztimfmgmvmot0rlgq8iprqq8phivibvfi5fuou58).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkgbsuf9lk7llar6l7sjjacfttf6b00c8ehp7o88_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6c5j64pj3cjgm49fg)

subject: Former L.A. Mayor Antonio Villaraigosa endorses Karen!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
Breaking news, team -- **Former Los Angeles Mayor Antonio Villaraigosa just endorsed Karen Bass for mayor of Los Angeles!** And he's not the only one.

Elected officials, organizations, and activists have come out in droves to support Karen for mayor of Los Angeles. Momentum is building behind this movement, and we're honored to have so many folks on board. **Take a look at who 's supporting Karen:**

subject: Are You Mostly Conservative or Republican?

body:
| | [](https://www.votebundy.com)
---
| Peter,When I tell people that Idaho was the first State in the United States to arrest someone for holding church, it makes them think about what is really happening to Idaho. Then, I tell them how the Idaho State Police (ISP) is one of the first policing agencies in the country to raid a business for not complying to a governor's lock-down orders. Finally, I show them that Governor Brad Little has received $18 billion (yes, that's a B) from the federal government for "COVID relief". Hearing these facts helps Idahoans understand the imminent problems we are experiencing here in our beautiful State. Overall, Idaho is facing an identity crisis; are we CONSERVATIVE or are we REPUBLICAN? Being republican is not the same as being conservative and unfortunately, because of people like Speaker of the House, Scott Bedke and Governor Brad Little, the Idaho government is becoming a perverted version of the Republican party. This version of republicanism does not care about lowering taxes. It is not concerned about the massive growth and spending of government. It does nothing to stop the destruction of infants in the womb. It is not concerned with government overreach and abuse upon the people. It cares nothing about private property. It's NOT Conservative! However, it is very concerned about protecting it's power and using the offices of the Idaho government to enrich those who subscribe to the party ideology (IACI).So what will it be? Will Idahoans choose Conservative or Republican? The scary reality is, Oregon once faced this same question. Oregon was once very conservative, then it became republican and finally this same perverted version of republicanism lead Oregon into the cesspool of woke liberalism that is destroying the State today. Idaho is only a few steps behind!I don't want to lose Idaho! So, I am determined to do all I can to make sure that the people of Idaho have a choice between conservatism or perverted establishment republicanism. If the people choose conservative then as Governor of Idaho I will do all within my power to protect and preserve the values that built Idaho and the United States into the bastion of freedom it once was.Ammon BundyP.S. If you are not already donating $20 a month or more to the Ammon Bundy for Governor Campaign then start today. [**Click Here to Donate**](https://www.votebundy.com/donate/)
* * *

* * *

If you did not authorize use of this email address, or no longer wish to receive such messages, please simply [unsubscribe](https://team.votebundy.com/unsubscribe?id=8d545fe0-6532-4b1e-8220-7189428a1194) to immediately have your address removed from our mailing list.

body:
You’ve been selected for our Majority Makers Program!

body:
I'm proud to announce that we not only met our fundraising goal last quarter, we officially outraised Doug LaMalfa. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37578655/311713255/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWNiZWM5Mi1lZDJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UtyxPAfbh5EpIU_LcTsXOns9GOPt5xSu8g-jNeEzlVM=)
Friend,

**I'm proud to announce that we not only met our fundraising goal last quarter, we officially outraised Doug LaMalfa.**

This is huge news, and we couldn't have done it without your support, friend. While we're still combing through LaMalfa's report, here's where we landed on some key stats: \- 99.7% of our fundraising came from individuals (while over half of LaMalfa's money came from PACs)
\- Our average online contribution was **$34.55**
\- We had **2,722 unique contributions** I've been so humbled by the encouragement and energy this community has shown for our campaign to put people before partisan politics in CA-01. It's clear we are ready for a new representative, and it's our time to lead by example to create the change we need to see in Washington.

Now that we have the early momentum in this race, we need to double down.

**[Will you chip in our average online contribution of $34.55 today in order to show Doug LaMalfa that we have what it takes to flip this district from red to blue? Anything you give will go toward making sure voters know I'm the viable Democrat running to replace him.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37578656/311713256/-209993060?refcode=em-101521-all-b&amount=34.55&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWNiZWM5Mi1lZDJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UtyxPAfbh5EpIU_LcTsXOns9GOPt5xSu8g-jNeEzlVM=)**

The more we're able to raise from grassroots supporters like you friend, the more undecided voters we're able to reach in CA-01. And remember: It's not how much you give that matters, it's the number of individual donors chipping in. That's why I'm asking:

**[Chip in $34.55 to help me double down on our grassroots fundraising momentum today>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37578659/311713259/-209993060?refcode=em-101521-all-b&amount=34.55&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWNiZWM5Mi1lZDJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UtyxPAfbh5EpIU_LcTsXOns9GOPt5xSu8g-jNeEzlVM=)**

While we're still combing through LaMalfa's report, here's where we landed on some key stats: \- 99.7% of our fundraising came from individuals (while over half of LaMalfa's money came from PACs) \- Our average online contribution was $34.55 \- We had 2,722 unique contributions I've been so humbled by the encouragement and energy this community has shown for our campaign to put people before partisan politics in CA-01. It's clear we are ready for a new representative, and it's our time to lead by example to create the change we need to see in Washington. body:
| | | _Jill Biden is coming to Virginia.
Stacey Abrams is coming to Virginia.
Even Barack Obama is coming to Virginia!_

**These Democratic heroes are all coming to Virginia to help prevent a TOTAL Republican takeover, ELECT Democrats, and PROTECT our progress --_including our crucial House Majority!_**

But they can't get the job done without help from grassroots Democrats like you.

****[So before our Mid Month Deadline expires in just 14 hours, we're calling on 3,500 more of our best supporters to join Jill, Stacey, and Barack in the fight by chipping in $3 to protect our House Majority at this make-or-break moment for Democrats nationwide.](https://links.e.dccc.)****
| [MID MONTH DEADLINE: ](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ra_)[MIDNIGHT](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ra_)
[NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com

_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ra_)

---

There's no sugarcoating it: Right now, Republicans have the money and the momentum to not only fight to take back Virginia, but also work to DESTROY our Democratic Majorities.

They're **SURGING** in the polls.

They're **SHATTERING** fundraising records.

And now, with just 18 days left before Election Day in Virginia, they're on the verge of **SWEEPING** victories in this must-win state.

If Trump's Republicans retake power in Virginia, we know it will only embolden them -- and let them think our Democratic Majorities, including our House Majority, are theirs for the taking.

**But we refuse to sit idly by and watch as Republicans attempt to pack the government with Trump's loyalist cronies.**

**[That's why we're calling on 3,500 of our best grassroots supporters -- including YOU \-- to unite behind our Democratic heroes and step up to DEFEND our House Democrats. Can we count on you before time runs out on our mission-critical Mid Month Deadline in just 14 hours to show Republicans that no matter what happens in Virginia, our House Majority is here to stay?](https://links.e.dccc.)**
| _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

body:
|
| | | Hey, it's Taylor over here at House Conservatives Headquarters. I just got this voicemail from Dan Crenshaw and I needed to share it with you.
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58537794:JWQwad2NQ:m:1:3253819041:7AA7AD3AA43956D08197F918B96C98BF:r)
---
**[CHIP IN NOW>>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58537794:JWQwad2NQ:m:1:3253819041:7AA7AD3AA43956D08197F918B96C98BF:r "CHIP IN NOW>>>")**

Nancy Pelosi's Majority is hanging on by a thread... and she's panicking. We're in a great position to take back the House, but you know as well as I do that everything can change in an instant.

The Democrats are already attacking us - they're spending millions against top conservative patriots and investing millions more in their grassroots activist networks.

Peter,

In August the radical left began talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond. **Now, President Biden wants to "compel" the private sector to mandate vaccinations or face fines up to $14,000 PER VIOLATION!**

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 19 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://links.conservativesforrevival.com/u/click?_t=a30b75a9476243838bdfb190856f8157&_m=e8473022ff21406b8e18e61a605df8b2&_e=QgSVCz6UNjJ7eWZY_ZtZc8n_Xf4hXCEneEe_RBiktY4scOHkyZL7uivfVRo1tYur-HR5e1pqxZYNoCBUbiG8PkjBc-HKuh0rQ_dlbuIvaEOpxZu1Up7ErgZEGCKsnwQwoy1VXNB8MQR03H_W_roDrQ1ZHdWjoyI1_hFPwCan0Xx3NhyZ_hoKye-jM2OBQVYLuAc2-Ru4crEd4Nln9CgIlkddTv2lRNtOM5rYG1Bubm1hC9AgxrO-zenmwAR6PxYbeLv2Uy3qlmqhdIWp-9d2MPTfZGnt5OjGXEndhdhez7K9B968EXnQB8ZRcn6X1vW_Ez5ackiu3G7K3q_l2y3PuWjsGCgFWLFwGevVKQTWmwqhsxcnYtPlzfi65RnZfu5wVnEeN9dFkcBPzBZUAinLjbk_CYFLbh4HOa7MfdF72sRmeuguw0pJieln2IIVL5-m0mleWyNQDiOsYSLL9IVIK4ucBnxaMqg8LDW5eTCydVkW_cuapjaIVHoMJNuVq2cSh-3JeFW6gRZPqw1_67aYNg%3D%3D)**

| _**

[WOULD YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON FORCED COVID-19 VACCINATIONS??](http://links.conservativesforrevival.com/u/click?_t=a30b75a9476243838bdfb190856f8157&_m=e8473022ff21406b8e18e61a605df8b2&_e=QgSVCz6UNjJ7eWZY_ZtZc8n_Xf4hXCEneEe_RBiktY4scOHkyZL7uivfVRo1tYur-HR5e1pqxZYNoCBUbiG8PkjBc-HKuh0rQ_dlbuIvaEOpxZu1Up7ErgZEGCKsnwQwoy1VXNB8MQR03H_W_roDrQ1ZHdWjoyI1_hFPwCan0Xx3NhyZ_hoKye-jM2OBQVYLuAc2-Ru4crEd4Nln9CgIlkddTv2lRNtOM5rYG1Bubm1hC9AgxrO-zenmwAR6PxYbeLv2Uy3qlmqhdIWp-9d2MPTfZGnt5OjGXEndhdhez7K9B968EXnQB8ZRcn6X1vW_F47pF0v44CxzJWgfgVy0y510lXasDHfRE0xUukFcBD34k4blgM8I_tmSArLuD-Ql5sUrDq7Ct--NgV3GYn2ypXnEMZBsGAt6du-dhWywRyiiiOSxJj9AGwZ2J45VnB2bwqrMvPvp6sS2nOfGnQyAFpTAWUhxrLb4_z9JzfiKYOsdiieTr4l8S-COQSqx6igYPo04GTVuRVB5zNaZ651KaQ%3D%3D)** _

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!** Now, if you work for a company with more than 100 employees, the government is going to try to force you to get vaccinated!

The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them.**

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine mandates but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

_Will the hypocrisy ever end?_

**[Let us hear from you today. Would you support a federal ban on forced covid-19 vaccinations?](http://links.conservativesforrevival.com/u/click?_t=a30b75a9476243838bdfb190856f8157&_m=e8473022ff21406b8e18e61a605df8b2&_e=QgSVCz6UNjJ7eWZY_ZtZc8n_Xf4hXCEneEe_RBiktY4scOHkyZL7uivfVRo1tYur-HR5e1pqxZYNoCBUbiG8PkjBc-HKuh0rQ_dlbuIvaEOpxZu1Up7ErgZEGCKsnwQwoy1VXNB8MQR03H_W_roDrQ1ZHdWjoyI1_hFPwCan0Xx3NhyZ_hoKye-jM2OBQVYLuAc2-Ru4crEd4Nln9CgIlkddTv2lRNtOM5rYG1Bubm1hC9AgxrO-zenmwAR6PxYbeLv2Uy3qlmqhdIWp-9d2MPTfZGnt5OjGXEndhdhez7K9B968EXnQB8ZRcn6X1vW_Xy6gqnWXH7grhFNbLmSGqOd3AYFBE0SYA-YGn63DMO5SY6oFCn33FEQB_PPVf6x54SMHu0Ni3zF2_6IEsqiPF-ruIz2kKBHFfPGD56K-eji2wZuVESesEp-_XcJWaVPCN63MyPf2dE0BJ3NB3I4S2Q0695yFPXcCGHag9EtJmTkHw50BLxmQSscvEAn_aAMMvEPVSe49cTK05BHbKXO4TA%3D%3D)**

Thanks for letting us know –

Thank you,
[](http://links.conservativesforrevival.com/u/click?_t=a30b75a9476243838bdfb190856f8157&_m=e8473022ff21406b8e18e61a605df8b2&_e=QgSVCz6UNjJ7eWZY_ZtZc8n_Xf4hXCEneEe_RBiktY4scOHkyZL7uivfVRo1tYur-HR5e1pqxZYNoCBUbiG8PkjBc-HKuh0rQ_dlbuIvaEOpxZu1Up7ErgZEGCKsnwQwoy1VXNB8MQR03H_W_roDrQ1ZHdWjoyI1_hFPwCan0Xx3NhyZ_hoKye-jM2OBQVYLuAc2-Ru4crEd4Nln9CgIlkddTv2lRNtOM5rYG1Bubm1hC9AgxrO-zenmwAR6PxYbeLv2Uy3qlmqhdIWp-9d2MPTfZGnt5OjGXEndhdhez7K9B968EXnQB8ZRcn6X1vW_Mk72mA5B9IkBXI8gZFPn55WmwFDHSSx_UT-_dVD8IcFA1YA8ns1Ksxv7eg9j5hT-mkBWwSWtva0VrM5CalFLOlb7UxouNkiCPJmSeoj7COjxrHCNdPAhEhRt7FQ2hatZudZavRH-1sj_CJaE58TJN_3FQCawNrh9o2wz45NPdCLTcYYjZMJljoEpcc9GKRWgVgHDEPKs-8_n_PLLMVdfFw%3D%3D)

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Some numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
First, some good news:

**Thanks to folks all over Wisconsin pitching in, ours is the first campaign in this race to receive donations from all 72 counties, 93% of our contributions were under $100, and our average grassroots contribution was just $23.**

All without accepting a single corporate PAC contribution! That's remarkable, and it's what this campaign is all about. I couldn't be more grateful.

**More good news:** _CNN_ has once again called Ron Johnson the most vulnerable Republican senator up in 2022, making it clear that we can flip this seat and expand our Senate majority. And with National Republicans already attacking me directly, they clearly don’t want to face our campaign next year.

**Now the not-so-great news:** We've got a big fundraising deadline coming up. If we want to beat Ron Johnson, our team will need every available resource from supporters like you to help us combat the millions of dollars in attacks that will surely be heading our way in this race.

That's why I'm respectfully asking today:

**Will you use this personal link to add a donation to support our U.S. Senate campaign in Wisconsin before the mid-month fundraising deadline? I wouldn't ask if it wasn't important -- you can chip in any amount right here:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-oct-21&refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37579519/311716184/-1146540901?refcode=em21_211015_mm2_fndd_gq_act___SG_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211015_mm2_fndd_gq_act___SG_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzllZTUwYi1mMTJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F6sMTP9aGIP-J8qZ0q1mRkPNzhQIvvRr6-R9zTWJXE8=)**

I’ve never taken a dime of corporate PAC money, and I never will. I don't have a rolodex full of right-wing megadonors powering this campaign, and I certainly don't have the "full support" of Donald Trump (not that I'd want it).

Instead, I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to chip in a few hard-earned dollars at a time to keep us going strong, which is why I send these requests every so often. They're important to building a campaign that can go the distance and defeat Ron Johnson.

Thank you, as always, for stepping up.

— Sarah

| Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put hard-working Wisconsin families first. She's the only Democrat in this race who has won statewide twice. With your help, she can defeat Ron Johnson, too. Chip in to join our grassroots campaign: | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37579520/311716185/-1146540901?refcode=em21_211015_mm2_fndd_gq_act___SG_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211015_mm2_fndd_gq_act___SG_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzllZTUwYi1mMTJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F6sMTP9aGIP-J8qZ0q1mRkPNzhQIvvRr6-R9zTWJXE8=)

clean_body: First, some good news: Thanks to folks all over Wisconsin pitching in, ours is the first campaign in this race to receive donations from all 72 counties, 93% of our contributions were under $100, and our average grassroots contribution was just $23. All without accepting a single corporate PAC contribution! That's remarkable, and it's what this campaign is all about. I couldn't be more grateful. More good news: CNN has once again called Ron Johnson the most vulnerable Republican senator up in 2022, making it clear that we can flip this seat and expand our Senate majority. And with National Republicans already attacking me directly, they clearly don’t want to face our campaign next year. Now the not-so-great news: We've got a big fundraising deadline coming up. If we want to beat Ron Johnson, our team will need every available resource from supporters like you to help us combat the millions of dollars in attacks that will surely be heading our way in this race. That's why I'm respectfully asking today: Will you use this personal link to add a donation to support our U.S. Senate campaign in Wisconsin before the mid-month fundraising deadline? I wouldn't ask if it wasn't important -- you can chip in any amount right here:= I’ve never taken a dime of corporate PAC money, and I never will. I don't have a rolodex full of right-wing megadonors powering this campaign, and I certainly don't have the "full support" of Donald Trump (not that I'd want it). Instead, I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to chip in a few hard-earned dollars at a time to keep us going strong, which is why I send these requests every so often. They're important to building a campaign that can go the distance and defeat Ron Johnson. Thank you, as always, for stepping up. — Sarah | Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put hard-working Wisconsin families first. She's the only Democrat in this race who has won statewide twice. With your help, she can defeat Ron Johnson, too. Chip in to join our grassroots campaign: | = Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin Sarah for Wisconsin PO Box 166 Madison, WI 53701 United States

name: Maya
subject: A Weekend You Won't Wanna Miss with the NHGOP!
body:
Special Elections, Fall Festivities, & Volunteer Opportunities

| | | | |
---
| |
---
|
# Sullivan County Harvest Dinner

**10/15/2021 6pm-8:30pm**
Join Sullivan County Republicans TONIGHT for their annual Harvest Dinner. With a $75 ticket purchase, you'll experience a fall-style buffet dinner with delicious items including roasted turkey, cranberry chutney, seasonal roasted veggies, and local apple cider as well as featured fall favorites for dessert! Guest speakers include: Bar Chau Kelley and Rep. Michael Yukobovich.
---
| [Buy Tickets HERE](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.nh.gop%2Fsullivan_county_gop_harvest_dinner/1/0100017c84a9b230-a5610a9e-b1a9-4494-85fa-cda242cc597f-000000/EZ3rPuMKiE6G3rvKErzaTTcTjk0=240 "Buy Tickets HERE")
---
|
# Volunteer with Victoria!
_Help Manchester Mayoral Candidate Victoria Sullivan provide new leadership to the community_
**10/16/2021 All Day **
Knocking doors is the BEST way we can target voters and ensure they not only have ample information regarding our candidates, but making sure they show up on Election Day to vote for them too! Whether you are willing to donate an hour of your time, or an afternoon, every bit helps. It comes down to every single one of us sacrificing a small bit, so that we can ensure strong leadership that allows our communities to flourish in the years to come. Sign up now!
---
| [Sign up HERE](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.eventbrite.com%2Fe%2Fday-of-action-for-victoria-sullivan-tickets-187077262127/1/0100017c84a9b230-a5610a9e-b1a9-4494-85fa-cda242cc597f-000000/JShznBPS9j6raDjVXnfCcdpMqCI=240 "Sign up HERE")
---
| |
# Chesterfield Republican Women's Luncheon

**10/16/21 11am******
CRWC is hosting their annual luncheon at the Chesterfield Town Hall with special guest speaker Drew Cline. Members of the club, as well as non members are welcome to attend. Tickets are $20 each.
---
| | [RSVP: cheshirerepublicanwomen@gmail.com](http://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/cheshirerepublicanwomen@gmail.com/1/0100017c84a9b230-a5610a9e-b1a9-4494-85fa-cda242cc597f-000000/x6ODCoU--JXfdSsEVzPt0Qg1hDQ=240 "RSVP: cheshirerepublicanwomen@gmail.com")
---
# Rally & BBQ For Candidate Rita Mattson

**10/16/21 10AM - 4PM**
This is a series of events and volunteer happenings in support of Candidate Rita Mattson who is running for State Representative in Cheshire County 9! This election takes place on October 26th so please show your support if you can. _Special guests include Senator Kelly Ayotte and local Reps! _
10AM - Rita and Senator Kelly Ayotte will be holding signs at the Jaffrey
Recycle Center until 12pm

1pm \- Join Kelly Ayotte and Rita for a meet & greet at Pelletier's Sports in
Jaffrey NH

2-4pm - BBQ Reception at Rick MacMillan's home in Dublin

---
| [RSVP: fmac39@gmail.com](http://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/fmac39@gmail.com/1/0100017c84a9b230-a5610a9e-b1a9-4494-85fa-cda242cc597f-000000/HMS4WmTP7XJ9QRuLOAfJQrfIytM=240 "RSVP: fmac39@gmail.com")
---
|
# Merrimack GOP Oktoberfest

**10/16/2021 4pm-8pm**
Finish off your Saturday with the Merrimack GOP at the Able Ebenezer brewery. This event is donation-based (suggested donation is $25) and fun for the whole family with great local beer, raffles, and a food truck! Please RSVP beforehand if you can, but last minute attendees are welcome!

---
| [RSVP HERE ](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.nh.gop%2Fmerrimack_gop_oktoberfest/1/0100017c84a9b230-a5610a9e-b1a9-4494-85fa-cda242cc597f-000000/qg6lMoq5RCyLL-x3wzpny-oa7p0=240 "RSVP HERE ")

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Fast Facts Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | **\- October 15****, 2021-** **\- Sen. Tim Lanane and INDems tell Gov. Holcomb to Do His Job, Prioritize Statewide Vaccine Campaign -** This week, Senator Tim Lanane and the Indiana Democratic Party called out Governor Eric Holcomb for continuing to choose extreme partisanship over Hoosiers' lives. It has been 199 days since Holcomb has formally addressed the state on the pandemic -- even though Indiana ranks last (About 49-percent fully vaccinated) in vaccination compared to neighboring states. This is a fact: Indiana has passed the grave milestone of 16,000 Hoosiers lost to COVID-19. It's past time for state leaders to hold an aggressive, statewide effort to get more people vaccinated. In 2017, Indiana Republicans supported legislation that had vaccine requirements for colleges and universities. But now, the INGOP is sticking to their extreme partisanship and it's only putting Hoosiers' lives in jeopardy. President Joe Biden and Indiana Democrats have used every possible option to deliver for Hoosier families. Indiana Democrats like Congressman André Carson and Frank Mrvan passed the American Rescue Plan, which delivered vaccines in arms and relief for both families and cities and towns across Indiana. Now, the Democrats' Build Back Better agenda - which also includes the American Jobs Plan - will take this effort to the Next Level. This vision for the nation is approved by a large majority of Americans. Democrats will deliver on these policies and Hoosiers will have a better future created because of it. **\- The INGOP's Failed PR Stunt on "Defund the Police" Backfires -** Indiana Republicans this week made an attempt to flip the script on who supports our first responders - and it sure isn't them. Despite using claims that have been debunked by the media, Indiana Republicans are still choosing to abide by a national GOP strategy and use misinformation about the Democrats' support for law enforcement. In fact, Democrats have been "super-funding" law enforcement by providing an all-around effort to recruit new law enforcement officials and fight crime across Indiana. Further Indiana Democrats are happy to remind Hoosiers that every Indiana Congressional Republican voted "NO" on the American Rescue Plan and this additional "super-funding" to law enforcement and first responders. Republicans put their extreme partisanship and agenda to stoke unnecessary culture wars ahead of actually delivering for the Hoosiers who keep our communities safe. Indiana Democrats are tired of the INGOP's political stunts and are ready to deliver once more for Hoosier families. This will be done when Congress passes President Joe Biden's Build Back Better agenda, including the American Jobs Plan. Indiana Republicans' extreme partisanship continues to be hypocritical and is dividing our families and communities across Indiana. The time is now to solve today's most pressing problems facing Hoosier families. Indiana Democrats are ready to answer this call by putting partisanship aside in favor of creating better opportunities for every Hoosier regardless of their Zip code. **\- Opportunities -** **\- Hispanic Heritage Month -** **Power of the Black and Brown Vote** ****

name: Team Hageman
subject: Liz Cheney’s True Colors
body:

clean_body: | | | | HINT: They’re blue. Friend, Wyomingites deserve to be represented by a real conservative that will always put America First. Liz Cheney isn't that person. Liz Cheney does not fight for Wyoming; she fights for the agenda of DC and Northern Virginia Insiders and against President Trump. Cheney is a thorn in the side of the America First agenda; she has shown her true colors by joining Team Biden and Team Pelosi. It’s time to free Wyoming from Liz Cheney. For Wyoming, Team Hageman | | | |

name: Finance Update via Team Kilmer
subject: Don't need to explain to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter: we wanted to send a quick email to check in before tonight's mid-month fundraising deadline.

We saw a surge of grassroots donations after Derek's email earlier this week. These donations put us in a great position to reach our goal, and we're hoping we can count on your support one last time before the deadline to push us over the edge.

**[Will you rush a donation of whatever you can afford before midnight? Help us reach our $6,000 mid-month goal.](https://act.myngp.com/el/kFltI-lSK3I2DvdXtf0ToyN7kcLC48NpftFmFoktayg=/wUZXFnkn6SdrSQMlmCQBepOEghwOHCct0iL3-PchOFs=?refcode=em21_211015_mm2_fndd_gq_act___FUTK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211015_mm2_fndd_gq_act___FUTK_ettx&utm_medium=email)**

Look, we know we don't need to remind you how much is at stake in next year's elections. As one of our team's top supporters, you get it. But to defend the House majority we need to extend outreach and voter contact efforts, and all of that takes resources.

That's why we set fundraising goals each month: because staying on track at this point in the campaign cycle will allow us to succeed later on. **You 've stepped up countless times in the past, and today we're counting on you to do it again.**

**[Please rush a donation of any amount before midnight to help us reach our mid-month fundraising goal. Your support will help defend this seat -- and the House majority.](https://act.myngp.com/el/kFltI-lSK3I2DvdXtf0ToyN7kcLC48NpftFmFoktayg=/wUZXFnkn6SdrSQMlmCQBepOEghwOHCct0iL3-PchOFs=?refcode=em21_211015_mm2_fndd_gq_act___FUTK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211015_mm2_fndd_gq_act___FUTK_ettx&utm_medium=email)**

Thank you,

Team Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/kFltI-lSK3I2DvdXtf0ToyN7kcLC48NpftFmFoktayg=/wUZXFnkn6SdrSQMlmCQBepOEghwOHCct0iL3-PchOFs=?refcode=em21_211015_mm2_fndd_gq_act___FUTK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211015_mm2_fndd_gq_act___FUTK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

subject: America needs new leadership

body:
As father of four who has lived the American Dream and fought for my country so others could achieve it, I am disturbed by our lack of leadership. | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=b8f836899c48424488328d3007007fb0&_e=g1OOKe0vY3QNYfVWM1M8jN0toE7I_P-kmIcq7tsjV5wCDMNvpEqnFeB3Wpti0bA39RctHhbJWqcM-LvyQN50on5erMgvLEemeI5GP2Yle5cTZq8W-9MR0IIJl66KNrn0VUnsLyPsbyeyr9Ers3qRwU4-WrcRW9Ln5xXDIHH2CFPcj9S4nhjj1EiqGgqnkfa-6cDYmiZ5T8z1uyElswiPwURNMmcBOl_Q-mDTmFliOPlTBCxkrq0ptzmX3IKcv2yAOL0NVHHmAFsBV1bVXFnQ-RBqsrsCsaWFUugOm8DAQJ7gqMU2-RnfW-19DXTkkEltfZxfBC3Z8YulaGqZVtWM25vig4VGFXBNa7NWGckZynNXhDFqRMoUXkROd4MsulQJFQtfMQTPC3DRwfQnIs4sDpV2RakOufd2cAGj1dm2H18s7xWzbcs8mZFyR2Tof5mZbCH1JKcX8k5ubk78aST1LUnLbDzF-PD3yIjCrRBLvV0%3D)

Peter,

I want to re-introduce myself. I’m Shawn Collins – I’m a black conservative, a U.S. Navy combat veteran who served in Afghanistan, an active U.S. Navy reservist, a husband, and a father.

I’m running for Congress in California’s 45th District – a seat that was represented by Republicans for decades until Democrat Katie Porter flipped it in the 2016 “Blue Wave”.

This seat is one of the best chances we have to flip a seat back to Republican in 2022, [**and I’m going to need your help to do it.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=b8f836899c48424488328d3007007fb0&_e=g1OOKe0vY3QNYfVWM1M8jN0toE7I_P-kmIcq7tsjV5wCDMNvpEqnFeB3Wpti0bA39RctHhbJWqcM-LvyQN50on5erMgvLEemeI5GP2Yle5cTZq8W-9MR0IIJl66KNrn0VUnsLyPsbyeyr9Ers3qRwU4-WrcRW9Ln5xXDIHH2CFPcj9S4nhjj1EiqGgqnkfa-6cDYmiZ5T8z1uyElswiPwURNMmcBOl_Q-mDTmFliOPlTBCxkrq0ptzmX3IKcv2yAOL0NVHHmAFsBV1bVXFnQ-X9fis6nXe_a5GRxo5K4QPgVymqldKaOMzGDhEd-AEAcz7XNMWnFLep3UNu0QmUY86iOzJdzegX9qRYE6n_Akzi-L-NNp3Bstwcurr2Pk7NegYn8c1wBq-vIekD9ObrOmScSwMFzhqdkn9OjaiaM8a5s3UdqZh4IHaYndvXHpsUf2Maz4Pcy6Rv_Kpr0538oeMAauT_e0jjzcLrA3vqhDC8%3D)

But let me tell you why I’m running. **We need new leadership in America.**

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=b8f836899c48424488328d3007007fb0&_e=g1OOKe0vY3QNYfVWM1M8jN0toE7I_P-kmIcq7tsjV5wCDMNvpEqnFeB3Wpti0bA39RctHhbJWqcM-LvyQN50on5erMgvLEemeI5GP2Yle5cTZq8W-9MR0IIJl66KNrn0VUnsLyPsbyeyr9Ers3qRwU4-WrcRW9Ln5xXDIHH2CFPcj9S4nhjj1EiqGgqnkfa-6cDYmiZ5T8z1uyElswiPwURNMmcBOl_Q-mDTmFliOPlTBCxkrq0ptzmX3IKcv2yAOL0NVHHmAFsBV1bVXFnQ-W5WZHLW70qDVMIaxk3u2RZMNgH3oZ6Xx6oFwxMHSpWvdzqGGwgDA5OBmOg57aXFzmh2EE_yOM6270t2M7JvpXbDrrr9VZJKZ8Xgc0eI54jDr5VhZGlZYXGGek5J63834BGoTx2WZxbCqMcXUlV3NKUyztstWrFIvAacLXL96jeSVbaEJ1vz0nqMxkCjxsdodNw9geyrDbKZ6wa_N84LfNs%3D)
I grew up in a disadvantaged home in a poor suburb of Dallas. My parents divorced when I was three years old. I had every reason to be convinced that I could not change my circumstances.

But fortunately for me, the American Dream was alive and strong.

My parents both taught me about hard work, accountability, and resiliency. Those traits combined with my love of basketball lead me to attend Rice University, where I played Division 1 basketball.

After law school, when I was admitted to the bar, I took an oath to support the Constitution. _But eventually I realized that was not enough for me_ – **so I made the decision to fight for the Constitution I swore to defend and joined the U.S. Navy.**

Shortly after my wife Zeina – who is an immigrant – and I were married, I deployed on a combat mission to Afghanistan. While in Afghanistan, I helped negotiate with key leaders in the region **and even survived two assassination-attempt bombings.**

Now, as father of four who has lived the American Dream and fought for my country so others could achieve it as well, I am greatly disturbed by the lack of leadership in America.

I’m running for Congress to help give our country the leadership we so badly need in order to keep America a safe, secure and prosperous nation full of opportunity.

[**Will you support my campaign, help me flip CA-45, and restore a conservative majority to Congress by chipping in $10, $25, $50 or even more today?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=b8f836899c48424488328d3007007fb0&_e=g1OOKe0vY3QNYfVWM1M8jN0toE7I_P-kmIcq7tsjV5wCDMNvpEqnFeB3Wpti0bA39RctHhbJWqcM-LvyQN50on5erMgvLEemeI5GP2Yle5cTZq8W-9MR0IIJl66KNrn0VUnsLyPsbyeyr9Ers3qRwU4-WrcRW9Ln5xXDIHH2CFPcj9S4nhjj1EiqGgqnkfa-6cDYmiZ5T8z1uyElswiPwURNMmcBOl_Q-mDTmFliOPlTBCxkrq0ptzmX3IKcv2yAOL0NVHHmAFsBV1bVXFnQ-eDJK6zXj9e0zZANWwzp6SSZLz9aLEK8i5v6Fdh8cE5grEAD97lJnG1HMtBPNVZZVS7qX8b-l79vQEYSBsHoGm7cgSdAwt8MIcQoeJVHCGDDz6tjSIcPyO_qmCEkR_N_5ekmsbwKeUD-LmlBMLIOAJ70NJMFFsA5Iy-W2E1uyjzhJv_jiGFyCvzv61e9ler3J6AuBk_jnjsW7H_MwUixcl8%3D)

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=b8f836899c48424488328d3007007fb0&_e=g1OOKe0vY3QNYfVWM1M8jN0toE7I_P-kmIcq7tsjV5wCDMNvpEqnFeB3Wpti0bA39RctHhbJWqcM-LvyQN50on5erMgvLEemeI5GP2Yle5cTZq8W-9MR0IIJl66KNrn0VUnsLyPsbyeyr9Ers3qRwU4-WrcRW9Ln5xXDIHH2CFPcj9S4nhjj1EiqGgqnkfa-6cDYmiZ5T8z1uyElswiPwURNMmcBOl_Q-mDTmFliOPlTBCxkrq0ptzmX3IKcv2yAOL0NVHHmAFsBV1bVXFnQ-YUnkMiNrGHaYHUVtZwjpz5VTYbN4zDbXvVut-H272sYW_jslBCTjVhws4p75uxgs6DPO85IDpERR3jL-JamYh-2jZhx_RE9jwrj_15-df3ZBUIOfvwfQeDoeV2467xzoSeATbZyFPnn18Pclu7lZt2Z0KRsW0-sqI6ZDJllyj4ReJd6w1Gc0ipztV0OX8Dsw8LjXehK9jc2q0Z25bOzo5s%3D)
On Biden’s watch, we have had a disastrous and dishonorable withdrawal from Afghanistan that undid everything I fought for, and thousands died for, over the last twenty years.

Democrats are spending trillions of dollars we don’t have on pet projects we can’t afford which is driving up debt and inflation and hurting our economy.

Since Democrats took over, nothing has gotten better – in fact, **it’s getting worse.** No one – not Biden, not Katie Porter – is providing America with the leadership we need.

We must be **spending wisely** and _lowering_ (not raising) taxes, especially in this difficult economic climate.

We must be supporting our **military** AND our **law enforcement** as they work to protect us.

We must improve our **education** system, put more emphasis on STEM fields, and secure a brighter future for our children.

We must address the national security and humanitarian crisis at the border by securing it and streamlining the legal immigration process so more people like my wife can have the opportunity to come to our country legally and achieve the American Dream.

**We can do all these things and more, but only if we have new leadership in America.**

[**I’m running for Congress, and I need support from patriots like you to not only flip this target seat in CA-45, but ensure we have a new conservative majority in Congress. Will you stand with me by supporting my campaign with a contribution of $10, $25, $50 or even more today?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=b8f836899c48424488328d3007007fb0&_e=g1OOKe0vY3QNYfVWM1M8jN0toE7I_P-kmIcq7tsjV5wCDMNvpEqnFeB3Wpti0bA39RctHhbJWqcM-LvyQN50on5erMgvLEemeI5GP2Yle5cTZq8W-9MR0IIJl66KNrn0VUnsLyPsbyeyr9Ers3qRwU4-WrcRW9Ln5xXDIHH2CFPcj9S4nhjj1EiqGgqnkfa-6cDYmiZ5T8z1uyElswiPwURNMmcBOl_Q-mDTmFliOPlTBCxkrq0ptzmX3IKcv2yAOL0NVHHmAFsBV1bVXFnQ-WXrzFmeHGsvTDA_5T7Tny_B_kFXep9LZ0M6sVyBXLBjpNbf4hO8vxeDMMScQznX7f_KsMH55Wku21rUhbLsrSKgFrAWeM3nQGSn7rm6bhiHiGOaRYGLCgWmWPdV7goHx6NWq6yQMbzvo1XJXUX80Qcu7qzbL9x7kJ8FXLDTvoH4ZoJ3Qd6kjgqGnNOQzpRrQjAJbDDcy-Edu05w562Dq3A%3D)

Thank you for your support!

For America,

Shawn Collins
U.S. Navy veteran
Republican for Congress

name: Hoan Huynh
subject: We Need to Build Forward
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Hoan
body:
image of ... [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/89231/images/Web%20Cover%20%20%281%29.png]Hi Peter,
Happy Autumn! Over the past week, we have traveled through many different communities, meeting folks where they're at, and listening to the concerns of our neighbors and community members.
Small businesses are struggling to make ends meet. We have a housing crisis on our hands. Our children are being killed in our streets. The pandemic continues to kill our friends, neighbors and family. This is simply unacceptable.
I'm running for Congress to build forward, because things were not working for a lot of folks before the pandemic. What our communities need right now are bold and innovative solutions to address these challenges. We cannot expect different results by voting for the same career politician. We had a busy week meeting with folks all around the city and neighboring suburbs.
We met with our neighbors at several community events. We got a chance to meet folks at the Mid-Autumn Moon Festival, where we celebrated the end of the harvest season, and spoke about our campaign to fight for small businesses, end gun violence in our city, and protect our kids.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/89231/images/midautumn.jpeg]
We've met with small businesses owners.
We met small business owners, vendors, and families at the 34th annual Apple Fest in Lincoln Square. We listened to stories of resiliency, and folks holding on to stay afloat during this pandemic. We listened to the burdens that families are going through. We need leadership in Congress that will fight for our working and middle class families, and represent us.
This campaign is about fighting for a more equitable future.
Our working and middle class families are being left behind. Our small businesses are being left behind. Our teachers, students, veterans, and our senior citizens are being left behind. It is time that we address the everyday needs of our communities, not the needs of Big Defense, Big Pharma, and Wall Street.
This is our movement, so please chip today!
Chip in Today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hoan_for_congress]Chip in $44 today to send a powerful message to the Corporate Establishment that our communities matter, that we matter!
You can make a secure donation at this link [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hoan_for_congress] .
We are also growing a strong volunteer base. Sign up to volunteer and tell your family, friends, and neighbors about our campaign. Get involved at this link [https://www.hoanforcongress.com/get-involved] – we need every single one of us to fight for our collective future.
We need to build forward and build fair. Join our growing movement today!
In Solidarity,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/89231/images/Hoan%20Sig.JPG]Hoan Huynh
Progressive Democrat for Congress IL-05
Take Action [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hoan_for_congress]https://www.facebook.com/hoanforcongress [https://www.facebook.com/hoanforcongress] https://twitter.com/HoanDHuynh [https://twitter.com/HoanDHuynh] https://instagram.com/hoandhuynh/ [https://instagram.com/hoandhuynh/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/hoan-for-congress/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/hoan-for-congress/]

clean_body: image of ... [ Peter, Happy Autumn! Over the past week, we have traveled through many different communities, meeting folks where they're at, and listening to the concerns of our neighbors and community members. Small businesses are struggling to make ends meet. We have a housing crisis on our hands. Our children are being killed in our streets. The pandemic continues to kill our friends, neighbors and family. This is simply unacceptable. I'm running for Congress to build forward, because things were not working for a lot of folks before the pandemic. What our communities need right now are bold and innovative solutions to address these challenges. We cannot expect different results by voting for the same career politician. We had a busy week meeting with folks all around the city and neighboring suburbs. We met with our neighbors at several community events. We got a chance to meet folks at the Mid-Autumn Moon Festival, where we celebrated the end of the harvest season, and spoke about our campaign to fight for small businesses, end gun violence in our city, and protect our kids. [] We've met with small businesses owners. We met small business owners, vendors, and families at the 34th annual Apple Fest in Lincoln Square. We listened to stories of resiliency, and folks holding on to stay afloat during this pandemic. We listened to the burdens that families are going through. We need leadership in Congress that will fight for our working and middle class families, and represent us. This campaign is about fighting for a more equitable future. Our working and middle class families are being left behind. Our small businesses are being left behind. Our teachers, students, veterans, and our senior citizens are being left behind. It is time that we address the everyday needs of our communities, not the needs of Big Defense, Big Pharma, and Wall Street. This is our movement, so please chip today! Chip in Today! [ in $44 today to send a powerful message to the Corporate Establishment that our communities matter, that we matter! You can make a secure donation at this link [] . We are also growing a strong volunteer base. Sign up to volunteer and tell your family, friends, and neighbors about our campaign. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: strengthening our supply chain, strengthening our economy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/8osTXu26lnh3yTTeRgWboEPL9G2DBzI_fuk00OXkDGo=/pbspTpxkxcywWo5UQrOCyVw8C41fyUSNNDnYFVIbOWQ=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211015-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| | | ** "As we all know far too well, the COVID-19 crisis demonstrated the vulnerabilities of our supply chain."**

_-Abigail Spanberger via the Richmond Times-Dispatch_
---
Peter,

Since I was first elected in 2018, I have worked tirelessly to ensure that all Central Virginians have access to quality, affordable healthcare. And while we have made progress, there is still a long way to go.

The coronavirus pandemic has revealed many of the shortcomings in our healthcare system. As lawmakers, it's our role and responsibility to investigate these aspects that need improvement and work to make them better. I am committed to ensuring we make this progress.

**One of the areas I have been focused on is improving the supply chain for prescription drugs and making the U.S. more self-sufficient in our prescription drug production.** The majority of medications Americans need -- including drugs as common as penicillin -- are not produced here**.** We are dependent on foreign production and supply chains, and the COVID-19 pandemic clearly demonstrated the vulnerabilities that exist in relying on foreign supply chains. We saw massive disruptions in our ability to procure N95 respirators and nasopharyngeal swabs. We cannot risk the same disruptions occurring in our prescription drug supply chains.

That's why I'm advocating for our country to build a stronger biopharmaceutical infrastructure by producing and storing active pharmaceutical ingredients -- the base ingredients for a vast array of life-saving medications -- here at home. Doing so would ensure that we have the ability to produce necessary medications here at home, particularly in the event of disrupted supply chains. Also, producing these ingredients domestically can be an economic driver -- **that means more good-paying jobs for Central Virginians.**

**I am honored to represent Central Virginia in Congress, and as long as I serve, I will continue to work on making healthcare more affordable, more accessible, and more efficient.**

[_**If you want to ensure I remain in Congress fighting for issues that matter, like healthcare, please contribute to my re-election campaign today.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/8osTXu26lnh3yTTeRgWboEPL9G2DBzI_fuk00OXkDGo=/pbspTpxkxcywWo5UQrOCyVw8C41fyUSNNDnYFVIbOWQ=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211015-1-EM&amount=25)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/8osTXu26lnh3yTTeRgWboEPL9G2DBzI_fuk00OXkDGo=/pbspTpxkxcywWo5UQrOCyVw8C41fyUSNNDnYFVIbOWQ=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211015-1-EM&amount=25)
---
Thank you,

Abigail Spanberger

name: Jake Evans
subject: Election Integrity Is Everything.
body:
It should be easy to vote and impossible to cheat...
---
| | | | | |
---
| | Dear Friends,
It should be easy to vote, and nearly impossible to cheat in our elections.
And when fraud is exposed, it should be proven in the court of law, and it must never be certified.
When we talk about election fraud, most people think about the 2020 Election, but it's been going on for decades in this country, and very few people have had the courage to stand up against it.
I don't just talk about election integrity, as an election lawyer, I have legally proven fraud and fought all the way to the Supreme Court of the United States to DEFEND the integrity of our elections.
Nearly three years ago I was the [first election lawyer in the state](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h7J7X9tF-x-Y5HUlU6fI9PCSvAyxHivuNebWNY1an2QVzbTPQq2_2nE4Gur6GCA5CnIyY8WwwA4vyse_4JXUknnY4oCGtIL61DcVNJ1SiTv9OvQDcVHNYz_lt4pCBajg1KDWoXkTM1p4Z6z_QAR2p_D1KRxaomTYPA233gww3B6hzfgGMvLYE_vEi1FPOVy80M7BH5HvgD7u9aWJZzssJQ==&c=WYmkL6tT6-f3Dda4MBn08d_y7ZbXBaBD_u49nIcyqGEFicVV6-1yLw==&ch=2QFctnhsApXQUEVbRc3pd5My9dVqOE6WMwazQSd8sEtubSJuGnNrbA==) of Georgia to not just overturn an election in the courts once, but twice.
I don't just talk about election integrity, I fight for it every single day. Without secure elections and confidence that every legal vote is counted, we don't have a constitutional Republic.
Help me defeat radical leftist Lucy McBath in 2022 and I will fight for safe and secure elections in the halls of Congress every single day.
[A donation of $5, $10, $15, $25, or more will help us fund our war chest to retire Nancy Pelosi as Speaker and STOP the Democrats from passing far-left bills designed to weaken our elections like HR1.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h7J7X9tF-x-Y5HUlU6fI9PCSvAyxHivuNebWNY1an2QVzbTPQq2_2g90Dwr0aTUH9DHIIk1x4ny5wh-TdjpjnI3VyUJpgDOjPAmrmKm-4M9xTpQlpyhvWf0UBNk_khkfOXMLi2fDfmnwmnegYy6SDv4sz7tA8bXlbHCtYf5EeyViwxtkOWb7gEvC3ZeGlbMk&c=WYmkL6tT6-f3Dda4MBn08d_y7ZbXBaBD_u49nIcyqGEFicVV6-1yLw==&ch=2QFctnhsApXQUEVbRc3pd5My9dVqOE6WMwazQSd8sEtubSJuGnNrbA==)
Support my America First Campaign TODAY and we will stop the radical left's federal takeover of our elections.
---

Securing our elections and weeding out the fraud is one of the most important battles of our time and there is no one more equipped to take on the challenge than me.
[Thank you, for your support of my campaign.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h7J7X9tF-x-Y5HUlU6fI9PCSvAyxHivuNebWNY1an2QVzbTPQq2_2g90Dwr0aTUH9DHIIk1x4ny5wh-TdjpjnI3VyUJpgDOjPAmrmKm-4M9xTpQlpyhvWf0UBNk_khkfOXMLi2fDfmnwmnegYy6SDv4sz7tA8bXlbHCtYf5EeyViwxtkOWb7gEvC3ZeGlbMk&c=WYmkL6tT6-f3Dda4MBn08d_y7ZbXBaBD_u49nIcyqGEFicVV6-1yLw==&ch=2QFctnhsApXQUEVbRc3pd5My9dVqOE6WMwazQSd8sEtubSJuGnNrbA==)
Sincerely,
Jake Evans GOP Candidate for GA-6

name: Team Bennet
subject: How has the Child Tax Credit temporary expansion helped your community?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
With just two payments left before this expansion of the Child Tax Credit expires, Michael is working overtime to extend this tax cut for working families. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37587482/311729960/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWFhMjIwMC1mYTJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9D-drRvOUlUw4F72Hemnq7MCMVETyb28OgkcEcrgugA=)
Today, families in Colorado and nationwide are receiving another monthly payment thanks to Michael’s work to expand the Child Tax Credit. With just two payments left before this expansion of the Child Tax Credit expires, Michael is working overtime to extend this tax cut for working families. The temporarily expanded Child Tax Credit has already helped one million Colorado children and kept three million children out of poverty nationwide with the first round of payments alone. Even folks without children can see its impact. Take a look: _“I... don't have children but have a huge community of young families in my life who live at the edge of poverty. This CTC has been great for them. I hope it becomes permanent.”_ **—** _Deborah B, Boulder_ Research shows that this tax cut is pumping hundreds of millions of dollars into Colorado’s economy _every month_ — it isn’t just good for parents, it’s good for the economy that all Coloradans rely on. Now, Michael wants to hear from you so we’re collecting stories about the impact of the Child Tax Credit. **How has the Child Tax Credit temporary expansion helped you or those in your community? Michael is fighting to extend it in the years to come, so your feedback is critical to his negotiations.** | **[Share your Thoughts](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37587483/311729961/1449545915?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20211015_PM2_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWFhMjIwMC1mYTJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9D-drRvOUlUw4F72Hemnq7MCMVETyb28OgkcEcrgugA=&emci=b8aa2200-fa2d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=b9aa2200-fa2d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1295540)**

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Jackson Lahmeyer's US Senate Campaign Picks Up County GOP Endorsements
body:
[](https://100726.trk.directiq13.com/hit?sid=kkwykmtowq01inykw&linkid=0&link=3505af67dc054a8facc60507617f75cc) **JACKSON LAHMEYER'S US SENATE CAMPAIGN PICKS UP COUNTY GOP ENDORSEMENTS** NEWCOMER SCORES DOUBLE DIGITS IN RECENT POLL, RAISES $450,000 FOR SENATE BID The insurgent campaign of America First candidate Jackson Lahmeyer challenging former four-term Congressman and US Senator James Lankford in the Oklahoma Republican primary next year continues to pick up traction with significant Republican Party organizational support. In recent weeks, the GOP County committees in Logan, McClain, Cimarron Counties, have endorsed Jackson Lahmeyer's candidacy.

Jackson Lahmeyer has been endorsed in the Republican primary for the US Senate by General Michael Flynn, who served as President Trump's first National Security Advisor, as well as Oklahoma Republican State Chairman John Bennett, and Oklahoma State Senator, Warren Hamilton, who represents Hughes, Pittsburg, Latimer, and Haskell Counties. Lahmeyer also posted impressive numbers with the Federal Election Commission, raising $450,000 from nearly 4,000 donors, 95% of whom live in Oklahoma. Lahmeyer raised $200,000 in the last quarter.

"_I am both encouraged and humbled by these endorsements generated by rank and file Republicans who recognize that these are not ordinary times, and that in the current crisis facing America we need tough, aggressive, new leadership, not "go-along-to-get-along" Washington insiders_ ," said Lahmeyer. _"I am also gratified to have the strong financial support of thousands of Oklahomans who understand the challenges we face as a state and Nation_."

Lahmeyer campaign manager John Killian said, "_this is just the beginning of what will be a tidal wave of both activist and financial support for Jackson's campaign from the grassroots. We are building a coalition of regular Republicans, Trump supporters, Christians, Second Amendment supporters, Libertarians, and others, to send a fighter to Washington._ "

Killian also addressed a widely publicized recent poll which showed him trailing the 14-year Washington veteran, Republican Senator James Lankford. "_That Jackson's support is already in double digits according to this poll is most heartening. Although our fundraising has been strong, we have not yet spent any of our resources on the kind of advertising necessary to reach everyone who will vote in next year's primary,_ " he said.

"_I do find it interesting that a supposedly unbiased pollster describes Jackson Lahmeyer as a 'far-right' candidate, when in fact, Jackson Lahmeyer is an America First Republican, as is President Donald Trump, and is well within the conservative mainstream that included Barry Goldwater, Ronald Reagan, and former Governor and US Senator, Dewey F. Bartlett_ ," added Killian.

"_The pollsters further discredit themselves by describing the documented irregularities and evidence of voter fraud in the last election as a 'conspiracy theory,'" said Killian. "Nonetheless, we are pleased with our growing support in the poll which may in fact be understated, given the obvious bias of the pollster. Needless to say, we are also gratified by the contributions of so many citizens who support Jackson's campaign for reform and new leadership._ " ### Jackson Lahmeyer is a 4th generation Oklahoman, devoted father, faithful husband, successful businessman, teacher, and pastor running for the U.S. Senate. Lahmeyer never thought he would run for political office, but after James Lankford betrayed President Trump on January 6, Lahmeyer said he was ‘fed up’ and decided to enter the race. During Covid's lockdowns and mask mandates, Lahmeyer kept his church open, despite escalating legal threats from Tulsa County – and Lahmeyer won. As a business owner, Lahmeyer took on far-left activists from groups like Black Lives Matter in the face of death threats – and Lahmeyer did not back down. Lahmeyer is a proven leader who does not compromise his Christian principles under political or legal pressure. [https://www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://100726.trk.directiq13.com/hit?sid=kkwykmtowq01inykw&linkid=1&link=b34e1674af404ba7889b45e8f655ae34)
---
| [ [View in Browser](https://100726.trk.directiq13.com/view?sid=kkwykmtowq01inykw) ] [ [Unsubscribe](https://100726.trk.directiq13.com/unsub?sid=kkwykmtowq01inykw&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) ] [ [Report Spam](https://100726.trk.directiq13.com/unsol?sid=kkwykmtowq01inykw&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) ] Email Marketing by [ [DirectIQ ] ](https://100726.trk.directiq13.com/hit?sid=kkwykmtowq01inykw&linkid=6&link=http://www.DirectIQ.com?utm_source=footer&utm_medium=email&utm_content=3001764&utm_campaign=)
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: HE'S A PHONY
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Enough with fake moderates |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=d0feaca37a&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

You know, I can't stand RINOs.

But I REALLY can't stand fakes. And politics is FULL of fakes!

_As a career military guy, I am the REAL DEAL- and I have to expose a fake for you here!_

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a Christian and a combat vet [running to take back Florida's 9th district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=30f50b33ae&e=afa21b7626), in the Orlando area. It's currently held by Darren Soto, a Democrat who pretends to be a moderate!**

I guess we should call him a "trans-moderate"?

He always claims to be a moderate to this increasingly conservative district. But his actions say the opposite.

Wait until you hear what he's done this time.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=0ca337ca6e&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Our Congressman, Darren Soto, signed onto a emeritus brief that is tied to the case NEW YORK STATE RIFLE & PISTOL ASSOCIATION, INC., ROBERT NASH, BRANDON KOCH, Petitioners, v. KEITH M. CORLETT, in His Official Capacity as Superintendent of New York State Police.

This case is set to go before the United States Supreme Court on November 4, 2021.

This case deals with concealed carry rights, and not only in New York! If this case is defeated, it would set a precedent to stifle concealed carry in the other 49 states.

_That's right- Darren Soto is trying to weigh in on a case in New York to impose restrictions on concealed carry rights!_

**This guy is NO moderate. He's every bit as radical as the Squad- he's just not as shrill.**
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=1fcb640555&e=afa21b7626)
---
| _I can only say it one way. Congressman Darren Soto is a leftist disguising himself as a moderate._

Sure, he keeps his “head down”, while voting “YES” for every leftist policy and spending boondoggle!

Did you know that he votes with the openly socialist “Squad” around 99% of the time? Well, he does!

"Trans-moderate".

[I need to defeat Darren Soto.](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=41f0e085c4&e=afa21b7626) He's an open borders Biden cheerleader. This district is trending red, and I'll be the one to flip it!

_I will stand up for America against Biden. I'll stand up for our gun rights! Darren Soto will not._

Help me bring America First policies to Congress! [Help me get elected and close the border!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a0af652cf9&e=afa21b7626)

Lets put a real check on Biden. [Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=df290e368d&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=ea110bc416&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=c937eb2917&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I am in the fight of my life against the Democrat machine here in Florida. [Will you contribute before the end of this month to help me reach my goal?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=de248484cc&e=afa21b7626)
---

clean_body: I'm going to pull back the curtain a bit... | | | I needed you to hear this directly from me. — I just learned that Republican Don Bacon raised $417,000 to defeat me. — That’s $260,000 more than we have in the bank. = = First, Joe Biden defied the odds and flipped this district blue. Then, major news outlets said my race will be even MORE competitive this time around. Now, I’m close to making history and turning this critical seat blue. = = | | = | = | = | = | = | = I can't thank you enough, Tony | Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon. This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream. This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue. Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. We know we send a lot of fundraising emails -- but that’s because his campaign is fueled by grassroots donations from folks like you. = If you only want to receive our most important emails, click . We don’t want to lose you completely -- but if you want to unsubscribe, you can do so here: ** We can't tell you how much we appreciate your grassroots support! name: Peter =?utf-8?b?RnJhbmNob3TigJlz?= Finance Director
subject: Grassroots Fundraising Update
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Dear Peter,
If I haven’t had a chance to meet you yet, my name is Tom, and I’m Peter’s Finance Director. I’m just reaching out to let you know that we need our grassroots fundraising to pick up in the second half of October, so we can hit our fundraising goal for this month.
As I’m sure you’ve already heard us tell you, this election is shaping up to be the most expensive in our state’s history. We rely on supporters like you to help us deliver the progress that Maryland needs, and your help is critical to ensure that we keep hitting our monthly fundraising goals.
Will you rush a donation to help us match the first half of the month so that we can stay on track? We’re looking to raise an additional $2,000 from our grassroots supporters by 11:59 PM tonight.
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021midmonth?amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021midmonth?amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021midmonth?amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021midmonth?amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021midmonth]I’ve been serving with Peter for years, and I know first-hand how dedicated he is to delivering results for Marylanders. He’s running for Governor to lift our communities into the quality of life that they deserve, and he’s been busy traveling across the state to build our growing coalition of support. The feeling of momentum at Franchot HQ is palpable -- and I know that with supporters like you powering this movement at the grassroots, we’re in a strong position to win this.
If you are able, click here to chip in whatever you can to help us clear our fundraising goal today, so that we can power this movement to victory. I know that a groundswell of grassroots donations can easily help us reach our goal tonight. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021midmonth?amount=20.22]
Best,
Tom
Finance Director
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021midmonth?amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/096b9094-ca2d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208/23091e4d-fb2d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzA5MWU0ZC1mYjJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EhgZcEEZuRJ_TqVATOzQ61Rdb4PG3OggVQnPqx3Upi4=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

Dear Friend,

Sen. Mike Lee needs your help.

We are facing the ultimate Establishment vs. conservative battle in Utah.

It’s Never Trump vs. Trump.

RINO vs. Freedom Fighter.

Evan McMullin vs. Mike Lee.

**[Will you stand with Mike Lee, Donald Trump, and the conservative movement today?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d57825f5d8504d3e84c282ae887dc021&_e=h1LpcJWABpv7ztY7RMGUVOdqd5CzXgwSp0fEGfyLERXtCk1fO_Jan_B_eo9Ym2B2sAx94rUA_PAQAyYPCRZOFR7hMRf4lKr0CTdPTKRgxt6nubKLuDpIKtG37Yh0emedSOswfLRRlm1cmFR5RUpXrjqbfA5ikfAG3yyYPHIkO_I9Jd2yXdCRac8i0lBZ-kBR6QmLWc8KyfMX2pOf3t1b5MgvBw3kwyXru-q4-YnDzEqoXP5Slx8rc-d5B0lrCZG8WBjBnQ2CYF_YCGeyphq5ZN_tiGad2VZyG8rp2-h1VXPud3GsUcnNz0NS6Xfjj3Mp)**

[**Yes, I will!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d57825f5d8504d3e84c282ae887dc021&_e=h1LpcJWABpv7ztY7RMGUVOdqd5CzXgwSp0fEGfyLERXtCk1fO_Jan_B_eo9Ym2B2sAx94rUA_PAQAyYPCRZOFR7hMRf4lKr0CTdPTKRgxt628Y-vI47n25MV0sRTRuTxu4iGT3H3CY13SQfvblI2QLBvObnBH_vcvAYnDEJj9rf5WCLYgCqXsxzSJ0Z4ipcKP_pcu78PKIZVHSN1QFrOeMB8ffTEcWO9O140H-VYF2lW7dtjXs1zKLWduKa5BbpVaYaUvgul4BpuLlrMxwYmpWZ2hNgcqQKZr613TqTNTdDSrsR1XQcEfQNMd2Bm4F4m)
The name **Evan McMullin** might sound familiar. That’s because he’s a Never Trumper who ran against Donald Trump as an Independent in 2016.

Of course, McMullin got destroyed in that race, so now he’s trying to claw his way back again by challenging Mike Lee.

**[I need you to stand with Senator Mike Lee today by donating whatever you can to his campaign.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d57825f5d8504d3e84c282ae887dc021&_e=h1LpcJWABpv7ztY7RMGUVOdqd5CzXgwSp0fEGfyLERXtCk1fO_Jan_B_eo9Ym2B2sAx94rUA_PAQAyYPCRZOFR7hMRf4lKr0CTdPTKRgxt7Z0hRMUo1PZ8-_wALlCPEssPWU4Q7BQzEb1j6VA0ZmHqUh9dqmXPFn7V59iFBlxZ6F0bYHi3vJB28t-Ts-siQV_ycunKAokx8bOH5XK47ewXfu8BZA1p8w4vFcwkLkiP0xLbclInpP8Dw57W7n27zXMbK6a8thoGkGgltInttuIVAsaXpbRzi9XALYsZ3oD9NsjptYrAqVQNxGwCiAS3GT)** Mike Lee needs **[every grassroots conservative](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d57825f5d8504d3e84c282ae887dc021&_e=h1LpcJWABpv7ztY7RMGUVOdqd5CzXgwSp0fEGfyLERXtCk1fO_Jan_B_eo9Ym2B2sAx94rUA_PAQAyYPCRZOFR7hMRf4lKr0CTdPTKRgxt5HwEGEacHEMPBuMPju6oty-aobiTu5KHNAU2dTFdxqhdPGY6lV-madKh48ggDItJOZNEk892EcyxtVl0nfU4DZz9qDIiU_ZmqHYZ09Dcnzl2K4fSYbd1dTBLu0umV-xaxziPP5_kiuhjHnFdOTimX--kE1sP1vBA6Q3znGUuxMpg711Qvx1FIu3m_yuPgrzluH1tMeSpxZSdrAryiqUjHT)** to chip in so he can defeat Evan McMullin.

[**Stand with Sen. Mike Lee >>>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d57825f5d8504d3e84c282ae887dc021&_e=h1LpcJWABpv7ztY7RMGUVOdqd5CzXgwSp0fEGfyLERXtCk1fO_Jan_B_eo9Ym2B2sAx94rUA_PAQAyYPCRZOFR7hMRf4lKr0CTdPTKRgxt6gd9aI8U0G7K4rrorOdPX8tklEQ9G3K4wzJHvoFMaf85xSupMuQRk-IegfJi4bFagZvX5M4OqFdSD-sRpm3snWIqubR5wwLeepGnPugK98NnAKNqa4qPdWTlR59ObhKW6jMaRyTJvl5LWLwCbpjqdb5mTYHJGBSKGNIaWHB_fu_YXf16IvCk_xTBEz8YfnMa0V-d8H7ViKehlsftIwzU1e)
You see, **Mike Lee is one the most conservative senators in America.** He stands up for taxpayers and fights against Big-Government policies no matter which party they come from.

But his conservative track record makes him a target.

The moderates, the liberals, and the special interests don’t want conservative rock stars in the U.S. Senate. **They want status quo politicians** who will compromise their principles, “work with Democrats,” and expand government.

Most importantly, they want to wipe out President Trump’s economic legacy and destroy the Republican Party.

clean_body: Sen. Mike Lee needs your help. | Dear Friend, Sen. Mike Lee needs your help. We are facing the ultimate Establishment vs. conservative battle in Utah. It’s Never Trump vs. Trump. RINO vs. Freedom Fighter. Evan McMullin vs. Mike Lee. The name Evan McMullin might sound familiar. That’s because he’s a Never Trumper who ran against Donald Trump as an Independent in 2016. Of course, McMullin got destroyed in that race, so now he’s trying to claw his way back again by challenging Mike Lee. Mike Lee needs to chip in so he can defeat Evan McMullin. You see, Mike Lee is one the most conservative senators in America. He stands up for taxpayers and fights against Big-Government policies no matter which party they come from. But his conservative track record makes him a target. The moderates, the liberals, and the special interests don’t want conservative rock stars in the U.S. Senate. They want status quo politicians who will compromise their principles, “work with Democrats,” and expand government.
