name: Ben Shapiro
subject: The Violent College Left
body:
Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It’s never been more important that we expose it, bec
_Sponsored message_
Fellow Patriot, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It’s never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That’s why it’s of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I’m no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. [**HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsvtv1966gkt1sb14b4djocki0va1hfins2dgtv8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpj68or2c9h2bs) Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn’t disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event—with the likely intent to do harm.

It’s no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It’s about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn’t have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony—a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. _**The good news is the radical Left’s attempts to silence me completely backfired.**_**** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that’s more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren’t for the **Young America’s Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university —**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America’s universities has not yet been broken. **Young America’s Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation’s leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you contribute $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za83j04v3pi2mblqn8ugdbpbnj9qg5krvml0tsf8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpj68or2c9h2bs)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America’s Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, “Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness.” YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they’re told to trust. YAF’s team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here’s why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF’s Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D’Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes,** Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O’Keefe,** NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News’s**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan’s ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan’s lasting accomplishments.

_No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America’s Foundation._ _That’s why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events._ They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can’t do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it’s become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn’t want a fair discussion of ideas. But that’s why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment’s notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF’s rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvaevjqppbculqh3msje9b6mp9ia4lq8an0cls2o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpj68or2c9h2bs) Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can’t be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can’t think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, “There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds.” I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America’s Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zai625tv68uj8gvd03jtc55ehr3hsirm399mibo0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpj68or2c9h2bs) [**DONATE**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhdhokf7s5rpmj8stq6f6o39q7lmcllo62osfc4g_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpj68or2c9h2bs) [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfkhiiid306966pbfkj6p6pg4hmsak567tce0u70_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpj68or2c9h2bs) | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2f316fl6nqg7hql8gvv3puq63k8lq16e7qkcne8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpj68or2c9h2bs) | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2il38d1pgj0j3ia8j2u5puaroaoaps05iplq1fg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpj68or2c9h2bs) | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjdiprvq2tg39fipp1b4alpefitbkgptb8m7n800_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpj68or2c9h2bs)
---|---|---
**[www.yaf.org](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr4l0drm30ba33cvml78vd1egbf6a0vjur7hamu0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpj68or2c9h2bs)**

11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor
Reston, VA 20191-1556

**[Privacy Policy](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztqsnahluk33il225pnlpas6mkoghru7q9p4ioo0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpj68or2c9h2bs) **
Trump Train News

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to unsubscribe](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z70ucqna2dg33f1tdt7l67t5iugjroif7ta9gflg_)

name: Rod Dorilas
subject: Would you support a Black Trump Republican for Congress?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
body:
My parents came to the U.S. homeless to give me the American Dream. Now, I'm running for Congress to keep the American Dream, which saved our lives, a |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=bf39e4f53e094bf08dec0c44fe16fcd2&_t=HI0nHaKvIt_8Jr0m6pHb9lzeDnFBTCIwZwyMm3VBABwfy88QW5S8pP3cPkbqC4sFDlr7dw9LOsKqI3mN3_7nd6HiqnKfKvEFv9y7fBxERJEEGCO-AE1acCVQhPFBZCrGTN60d2rBvQcFwWQR25i9UlC0p_HqZc1tLEdsphVRpBw%3D).

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bf39e4f53e094bf08dec0c44fe16fcd2&_e=ZFJbbZbpvjlHbLLIWuWTLCxScDHRzVUZNXBZXiU-rsxDD_SdIB4b9ZuZwmMMO9KqPGAOKfy67MeKutOVZ2IpMsfSOC_XEeKuTVZm6hcT0ycKdqnA9xPBu3gbwKUH_HY5zBX0zL8QeNVxQv7Y7A_PxfLEE3mO6WMZ4HsH1QvO742D7lpSpG6HVts7V3jan3FgYHgXzDOdNlyGTBq0_fHWRnBDDTnl3FNHQMyBHUMah0uF8F7f6d1fyYd96bt_89QH-M7XtgPyksdNHKC0RjgJpdi_4V6X5GQPHb11BUu4438GjnnRCxz1nM-seBEXvJ6H4jmw7EAl6yEy9mkzMSDVyPzqvzPs2CtxhAKakgD7CgpEKlW2ihXsBujGqmg_d-Z7hKrJJENpihYug0UCgFDTN6R0GsZTG3AsocM_ScwspJRiiSYRPLqEPKcQDhLCHD1OgTwq7Zx-jV38nGosgmQu5XQXiKbSLYm5nLOL4W_XrZE%3D)

---
Fellow American,

Never believe the Left’s narrative that America is a racist country; that the American dream doesn’t exist anymore; or that the Constitution is a relic of the past that disproportionately benefits Anglo Americans.

I’m speaking with authority on the matter: **I’m a first generation Haitian-American whose parents came to this country, quite literally penniless, to pick crops in South Florida during the 1980s**. Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. **I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative**.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bf39e4f53e094bf08dec0c44fe16fcd2&_e=ZFJbbZbpvjlHbLLIWuWTLCxScDHRzVUZNXBZXiU-rsxDD_SdIB4b9ZuZwmMMO9KqPGAOKfy67MeKutOVZ2IpMsfSOC_XEeKuTVZm6hcT0ycKdqnA9xPBu3gbwKUH_HY5zBX0zL8QeNVxQv7Y7A_PxfLEE3mO6WMZ4HsH1QvO742D7lpSpG6HVts7V3jan3FgYHgXzDOdNlyGTBq0_fHWRnBDDTnl3FNHQMyBHUMah0uF8F7f6d1fyYd96bt_89QH-M7XtgPyksdNHKC0RjgJpUMbs3BQYe_nU6SRIgQMMWui0gpN0gh7vMGs4PExZGbJmlnMNm8t_2lTuuvd1HxGFZ1cbBMTyGLptLNvNSQzX5lTihwd8mXFiOC5uKuOGh0-JzqriTa7AywawSugMKhH3g6V_fqDIppls3DKMz7bAySK0-PmZsQslcraqE9FQWl6I7_8MyVqu-ylS4eQmimJ-PrtZ1Vtci1JbU87n7wNgDc%3D)
My name is Rod Dorilas and I’d like to tell you a few important things about me and why I’m writing to you today.
* I’m a military veteran (**I joined at 17**),
* I’m a lawyer (**I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school**)
* I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office.

**The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success.**

In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ _**freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction**_.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is.

Every morning that I read the news, it’s more doom and gloom. No one talks about the American Dream anymore. But, my parents and I are living proof that it still exists – and will continue to exist for future generations of immigrants and native-born Americans alike if we wake up to the dangers posed by socialism NOW. Having the option to attend a high school of my own choosing enabled me to become the man I am today.

**I’d love to know where else in the world, immigrants from one of the Earth’s poorest nations could rise from homelessness and become successful business owners in a matter of two decades. All the while, raising their children with such success that one of them decides to seek federal office. **

Rising from poverty in Haiti to the middle class in South Florida wasn’t quick or easy, but _**what is worth having in life that is easy?**_ I learned from my parents that hard work and grit – along with perseverance – pays dividends. | _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

As our nation continues its transformation into the digital age, the future for thousands of industrial workers grows more and more uncertain. With vital manufacturing work disappearing from the Midwest region, _robbing workers of their sense of job security,_ many are left feeling betrayed and abandoned.

Over the past several years, this breach of trust has revealed itself in Democrats’ ability to perform at the polls. Between 2012 and 2021, we’ve lost over 500,000 rural voters -- and without transformative change, _we risk losing ground._

For years, I have fought to ensure good-paying jobs and training opportunities designed to modernize the manufacturing sector. My focus has never wavered from ensuring that the working families of the Heartland have a high quality of life, even as we progress toward a more sustainable future.

My service in Congress is fully dedicated to the continued success and prosperity of our nation’s workers. **As a strong voice for Ohioans, it will be an honor to continue this fight in Congress. I need you by my side to withstand Republican attacks.**

**[Please join the fight for the Heartland’s working-class and donate $10 today.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCEkdHNItV39y3s-lvKgkMA4wdHHN35CFRCbAMDF5yZdKKQ8_q_i-5MU1_3bqsfJJXiuPyb4eF6bmjI1z54PosvuDNcoEz2TPTaEtVcSYblE81pkeF_bBp5PZPzqmf1O2p0cemK4cFSg_xPZLMpzeJEhxOZe5K5fKoh7Z4LjHFs5_bfRdFZ4Wy6jTVkZ8pU5s-uM7EkkR3Wy6pkp_1W7GKSDZjUqkO-w9iBRyZXlLQtk3tbaVlSK8BGfcuZvSVD-00o0BEQ6RatlCVzkrcMCDSOS41fzioAZoAjikAaC0O7qqfzZziTjuJ3eZIZKWO82mX1CcnOnvPEcKZD1uKlBZA3YkJRGfWwGFtjzVHrN0jm6vyCb8xdGKPVnyBssOLbcvk/3g6/D0yPI707REKPCxzqv-WmCg/h4/BbGnkSGQgyqIkDuVvo-0GQ3nxLOvBXPwLJt_iUhoivw)**

clean_body: My time in Congress is fully dedicated to the continued success and prosperity of our nation’s industrial laborers. | Marcy Kaptur | | | | , As our nation continues its transformation into the digital age, the future for thousands of industrial workers grows more and more uncertain. With vital manufacturing work disappearing from the Midwest region, robbing workers of their sense of job security, many are left feeling betrayed and abandoned. Over the past several years, this breach of trust has revealed itself in Democrats’ ability to perform at the polls. Between 2012 and 2021, we’ve lost over 500,000 rural voters -- and without transformative change, we risk losing ground. | For years, I have fought to ensure good-paying jobs and training opportunities designed to modernize the manufacturing sector. My focus has never wavered from ensuring that the working families of the Heartland have a high quality of life, even as we progress toward a more sustainable future. My service in Congress is fully dedicated to the continued success and prosperity of our nation’s workers. As a strong voice for Ohioans, it will be an honor to continue this fight in Congress. I need you by my side to withstand Republican attacks. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you for your support, Marcy Kaptur Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. She is focused on getting big money out of politics, holding Wall Street accountable, fighting against bad trade deals that harm workers, ensuring access to health care for all, and restoring our Great Lakes. Can you help us send Marcy Kaptur back to Congress? ****** | **** **** **** **** | | Paid for by Marcy Kaptur for Congress Checks may be mailed to: P.O. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: A quick note about corporate spending
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We’re up against Wall Street, Big Pharma, and corporate America.
#
Peter,
This is a big moment for our movement. I’ve been leading Congressional Democrats in a fight to deliver the core of our popular agenda — the agenda we won the House, the Senate, and the White House on. On our side, we have President Biden, 96% of Democrats, and the people. On the other side, there’s Wall Street, Big Pharma, and corporate America.
Our side has grassroots energy, strength, and resolve. The other side has unlimited amounts of money to dump into attack ads to influence policy and public opinion. We have the power to pass a Democratic agenda that invests in working people, families, and our communities. We can address the climate crisis too. But only if we keep showing the power of our progressive movement.
**[So, Peter, can you chip in $3 towards our mid-month fundraising goal? My team set an important goal to hit $25,000 by midnight and we’re 90% of the way there. Let’s show corporate America and Big Pharma who has the real power to set our legislative agenda.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7854?refcode=em20211015-723&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=723%2E420207%2EXKHF_A)**
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7854?refcode=em20211015-723&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=723%2E420207%2EXKHF_A)**
The popular Build Back Better Act is on the line right now. That means investments in child care, paid leave, universal pre-K, community college, climate action, affordable housing, Medicare expansion, climate action, a roadmap to citizenship for immigrants — it’s all on the line.
That’s why we need to keep this fight strong, and show Big Pharma and the corporate lobbyists trying to stop us that we won’t back down. **[Can you chip in to show everyone that our fight remains strong? We’re only 10% away from our midnight goal! Help us hit it before it’s too late.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7854?refcode=em20211015-723&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=723%2E420207%2EXKHF_A)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211015-723-footer&t=23&refcode2=723_420207_XKHF_A&akid=723%2E420207%2EXKHF_A)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Paul Schimpf
subject: Schimpf from the Trail 10/15/21
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P
body:
| [](http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_15&n=1)
---
Friend, The time to fix Illinois is now! The only thing standing between us and a better Illinois is JB Pritzker. **To defeat Pritzker, we need a Republican candidate who can unite our party and get crossover votes. I am that candidate.** When I ran against the former Lt. Governor in 2016 for State Senate, we got the crossover votes needed, winning by almost 22 points despite being significantly outspent. We received those crossover votes because voters trusted me and knew I would keep my promises to them. No one in this race has a stronger voting record when it comes to our 2nd Amendment, law enforcement, or fiscal responsibility. When I told my Senate district I would fight for them and their values, I did so. When I am your Illinois Governor, you will have a leader who understands you and the challenges you face. When I am your Governor, it will no longer be business as usual under the Capitol Dome—the days of special interest groups calling the shots will be over. S/F, Paul Schimpf
* * *
**Volunteer of the Week** This week's volunteer to single out is Brandon Hepner. Brandon is our McLean County Director and helps deliver signs throughout central Illinois. He also recently set up and coordinated our successful Apps & Answers event in Springfield. Thank you, Brandon, for your friendship and tremendous support!
* * *
**In the News** I joined WHCO 97.3 FM & 1230 AM to talk about my plans to renew Illinois if elected! [Listen to my conversation on WHCO here.](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=954wJVfXJnGDSMt_j90vIl2I9Mts3vNP7Yqes3Kf2OPFBhqeK5vTRlzR0BHtnqMGguRlKGQaeUkLglhlhNVD9A&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_15&n=2)
* * *
**Social Media Spotlight** Over the past several years, Illinois parents have seen governments infringe upon their ability to raise their children in the manner of their choosing. Too often, the Illinois House and the Illinois Senate act as if they are 118 and 59 member school boards, making curriculum decisions for school districts and passing unfunded mandates. The time has come to reset and readjust the relationship between the parents of Illinois and their government which is why a Parents' Bill of Rights is so needed. [Comment, share, or like our post here!](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqAW2yVvl1h3I5Gksd6Hzbhrj9qi4IzIC7pyu7qNFVS4Pc&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_15&n=3)
* * *
**Get Involved** Want to make a direct impact on our campaign? **[Pitch in $5, $25, $50, or $100 NOW](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/donate?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_15&n=4)** so we can share our above Facebook post on Pritzker's lack of leadership for our children with more people across Illinois! Have a hand in helping our digital advertising efforts today! ___
Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P.O. Box 16, Waterloo, IL, 62298\. A copy of our report, filed with the State Board of Elections, Springfield, IL, will be available for download or purchase from them. We do not pay for email addresses. We have your email address either because you signed up for our list at an event, you entered your email address online, or you gave your email address to Paul.
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/unsubscribe?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_15&n=5).
You can also keep up with Paul Schimpf on [Twitter](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEGmWwYfQ_yWb41Zx1QyVyU&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_15&n=6) or [Facebook](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6g5cWifaQHs4q1ylFw89qVcMpLCIQGbbcgOLvTMfF-ic&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_15&n=7).

clean_body: | Friend, The time to fix Illinois is now! The only thing standing between us and a better Illinois is JB Pritzker. To defeat Pritzker, we need a Republican candidate who can unite our party and get crossover votes. I am that candidate. When I ran against the former Lt. Governor in 2016 for State Senate, we got the crossover votes needed, winning by almost 22 points despite being significantly outspent. We received those crossover votes because voters trusted me and knew I would keep my promises to them. No one in this race has a stronger voting record when it comes to our 2nd Amendment, law enforcement, or fiscal responsibility. When I told my Senate district I would fight for them and their values, I did so. When I am your Illinois Governor, you will have a leader who understands you and the challenges you face. When I am your Governor, it will no longer be business as usual under the Capitol Dome—the days of special interest groups calling the shots will be over. S/F, Paul Schimpf Volunteer of the Week This week's volunteer to single out is Brandon Hepner. Brandon is our McLean County Director and helps deliver signs throughout central Illinois. He also recently set up and coordinated our successful Apps & Answers event in Springfield. Thank you, Brandon, for your friendship and tremendous support! In the News I joined WHCO 97.3 FM & 1230 AM to talk about my plans to renew Illinois if elected! Social Media Spotlight Over the past several years, Illinois parents have seen governments infringe upon their ability to raise their children in the manner of their choosing. Too often, the Illinois House and the Illinois Senate act as if they are 118 and 59 member school boards, making curriculum decisions for school districts and passing unfunded mandates. The time has come to reset and readjust the relationship between the parents of Illinois and their government which is why a Parents' Bill of Rights is so needed. Get Involved Want to make a direct impact on our campaign? so we can share our above Facebook post on Pritzker's lack of leadership for our children with more people across Illinois! Have a hand in helping our digital advertising efforts today! _ Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P.O. Box 16, Waterloo, IL, 62298\. A copy of our report, filed with the State Board of Elections, Springfield, IL, will be available for download or purchase from them. We do not pay for email addresses. We have your email address either because you signed up for our list at an event, you entered your email address online, or you gave your email address to Paul.

subject: 18 Days Left!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Youngkin for Governor, Inc
body:
I travelled all over the Commonwealth this week and the energy is infectious! It is hard to believe that just a few months ago I started
| [ ](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/MW2kNbTLLR-W3lT-Lm4QnsPdV_gMC14yJt5CMrH-SB3lSbNV1-WJV7CgTWhW7WRgHG4SGvQzW4bbfdD4Qn-73VXYcmn8XCFdSMZ098dM9Dp6VgcQBp4rDz-LW3Mj0CY6SD3d1W2pXlJR6KThjyW4D2z1v1thwPPW4FsT3d4ctHfkW92Pyq045g075W8vMc3n7g4wbcW3g0VKH7908Y8W4wWCFT4TfQxdW5HT3D31tlXJYW81Z7Zt8xc9jjW6CzH447HtbvGW3tsSmn3NFd9yW2lt9RP4M10YNW7vyGTd7p-xCMW3bpjZK1_n9JtW26W1br5Z9PLmW3KYXtS6QsCz-3k-v1)

| | |
---|---|---
Dear Friends, I travelled all over the Commonwealth this week and the energy is infectious! It is hard to believe that just a few months ago I started this journey to become your next Governor, and it will be coming to an end _in just 18 days._ Election Day is right around the corner, but you don't need to wait until November 2nd to show your support! Early voting numbers have Terry scared, as you can probably tell by his absurd lies and baseless claims. We are ready to win in November. Let's go, Virginia!
---
| [ **I'M VOTING FOR GLENN!** ](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/MW2kNbTLLR-W3lT-Lm4QnsPdV_gMC14yJt5CMrH-SB3lSbNV1-WJV7CgzWGN74JqRwVZRRQW6M9M932rVctvW6H98nd3hW-s-N4dd3NLF4ddZVwv5LR4-7btXW64793K6S_nzdW81y3tY7NzNMnW1qLLqf8WgMkLW8HHkRD4X4hw3W1fqxpd5mstCDW2VRQFl3lcXZsW2lk5zH5Yh7kVW8f_88d4cr5hgN4jr-5RLld56W7bJVCt1mNF7GW7D3QS88PFpnHN6rvG1BssX7-W8V19VX5PWWfXW66bPTt6n_1KbW4SV6V52nRn5QN2nmCq2HdtKnW2X1rbP2jlNSp3fy61)
---
---
| | |
---|---|---
This week, we celebrated our law enforcement heroes all over the Commonwealth. Thank you to the Sheriffs and other officers who joined me to knock doors in Northern Virginia and to everyone who showed up at our Lynchburg rally on Wednesday! On [Day One](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/MW2kNbTLLR-W3lT-Lm4QnsPdV_gMC14yJt5CMrH-SB3lSbNV1-WJV7CgYY2W7G8jmv7fYrpnW7fgzKb52nNfHVGKHsR6wQS5TW3bBks87yX-BkW7rw8R57K1blDW7l8JZw4Mtb_mW6S3D5r7RXjSWW7zcBgQ3066FQW921LwH6TGCPrW7w80nq83SHdMW6Brgfc23pYRVW7yXBCC13DQmFN6bkjXhQFHvMW5xX7KB4D2GfrW4tvZH47xD51sW1M7s45820Tv3W5ZyCYl29M-LxW84LYYL8NDcHVW2RTx1R8N0ds6W5RKMDH10310QW3t32KW7JTL2xW3m2rSL7CLQDT33R_1), I promise to defend - not defund - our law enforcement heroes because they stand for us. I will have their backs by protecting qualified immunity, firing the parole board, and fixing our broken mental health system. Keeping our communities safe is my number one priority and it would not be possible without our heroes! Please join me in celebrating their sacrifices and courage during National Police Week.
---
---
---
---
| | |
---|---|---
I am so encouraged by the energy and support I saw all over the Commonwealth this week. Thank you to everyone in Luray, Lynchburg, Warrenton, and Yorktown who turned out to show how much they care about returning excellence to Virginia! I will make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family by never allowing government bureaucrats to come between parents and their kids. Terry McAuliffe [does not think that parents should have a say in their child's education](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/MW2kNbTLLR-W3lT-Lm4QnsPdV_gMC14yJt5CMrH-SB3lSbNV1-WJV7CgJ8vN2L2V6Lc2txqW962GgC4X-78PW2MZsJ050JXZjW8lN1cY1pzMw0VxGDjy7fLzdrW6XJCPB4tNmHWW7C3nLH3C7kxJW4Y4N0P35zNQMW7VjCsK51rqPlW5XScnR599_sBW3zxrK832sxJLW3x9ySK65XymXW7ffXSw8z4HCXVVQ4gn1mPCY8W4Hbtyw7nWn3gW27FJYH6VSx_DW3w5btP919zc8W88X66P6L_JMYW178l453jh5TgVNRZ7J22yw6PW2h90DN3Z6JXnW2HWZdG23zMdn2NK1), but I will empower parents to restore excellence and commonsense in education. I responded to my opponent's claim by launching Parents Matter, which is a movement of families, parents, children, and caring neighbors who will stand up to Terry and reject his attack on a parent's fundamental right to their children's education. You can let him know what you think about his comments and join our movement but clicking the button below:
---
| [ **PARENTS MATTER!** ](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/MW2kNbTLLR-W3lT-Lm4QnsPdV_gMC14yJt5CMrH-SB3lSbNV1-WJV7CgS_-W3fTy6R5y8xRfW6YWltk8-1QrzW5SXk7466Jb83W8kzhKT2RrkxSW8qRNht6v1lNQW7XW0Y86CSCj2VlgBZd1C_qpcW2DyjPP1z0ZpbW80JH7W7BQ1QNW33Trkd1zh00lW27VlXf7Ws2Q7W4Fj-Wb3kL2tnW3jWm9j3Dmfz7W12phLv5gGPVGW5wXlNR6mg4HRW37hhf88zkMDhW7MFSqF4ZPrZ9W89lzWY5JvKSLW4KVsWL53xxqZW6ycBkj4T1jbkW8qTxFK4545v9N6GkDv7pMLTK3kWg1)

name: Tim
subject: We were outraised
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1170%2E3611125%2EFj_ykH ][IMG]

Folks, this is serious. One of my GOP opponents outraised us big
time.

Look, we knew going up against billionaire donors and big-money super PACS
would be a challenge. But we didn’t account for my opponent writing a $3
million check to his own campaign this early.

I don’t want to cause a panic, but we’re scrambling. We have to rework our
entire fundraising strategy to keep up with the BIG money from my
opponents. If we don’t, they can easily drown us out in Ohio and we could
lose this race before it even begins.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5385?t=1007&akid=1170%2E3611125%2EFj_ykH ]Can we count on you to rush a grassroots donation to help reach our
mid-month goal of $25,000 before 11:59PM tonight? We don’t have to
outraise my opponents, we just have to outwork them.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5385?t=1008&akid=1170%2E3611125%2EFj_ykH ]Rush a donation >>

We rely on your donation to spread our message with digital ads, invest in
early voter outreach, and fight back against attacks through our rapid
response program.

We know we have what it takes to beat these far-right extremists. But it
only works if folks like you pitch in today.

There’s so much at stake.

We’ve got to flip this Senate seat blue or Trump’s lackeys Josh Mandel and
JD Vance will destroy any chance we have of cutting workers in on the
deal. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5385?t=1009&akid=1170%2E3611125%2EFj_ykH ]Will you chip in toward our mid-month goal ASAP to help us
compete against my GOP opponents and their massive slush funds?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5385?t=1010&akid=1170%2E3611125%2EFj_ykH ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5386?t=1011&akid=1170%2E3611125%2EFj_ykH ]Donate $50

Let’s get to work!

Tim

name: need your support (Left Action)
subject: Don’t Let McConnell crush this bill (re: voting rights)
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [DEMAND CONGRESS PASS THE FREEDOM TO VOTE ACT >> ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taf757842-8e23-4569-ab34-4066e398ccb0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T761c2854-decd-4dfa-af88-5a620ae4d768/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | **Our right to vote is under attack.** In state legislatures across the country, Republicans are pushing hundreds of bills that unfairly restrict voting rights for millions of Americans. In the Senate, Mitch McConnell and the GOP are working around the clock to take back the majority by any means necessary. We need to protect our democracy from Republican voter suppression efforts once and for all by passing federal voter protection laws. **That’s why top Democrats like Sen. Amy Klobuchar are fighting to pass the Freedom to Vote Act. This bill will expand vote by mail and automatic voter registration, and protect the right to vote to ensure everyone can make their voices heard in our elections. ** **The Senate is planning to vote on this bill next week** , and we know Republicans will do ANYTHING to crush this bill. So we need to show a flood of support right now. [**Sign your name to demand Congress pass the Freedom to Vote Act >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8c0be43f-e04a-44e4-b0bb-f1b0e26f8ccc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

body:
It’s unfortunate to say, but Republicans will stop at nothing to derail President Biden’s agenda -- even if it jeopardizes our recovery from the COVID-19 pandemic.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37589180/311737552/-35646090?amount=3&refcode=TCFC_20211015_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTE2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWE1OTYyNi0wMTJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X3ivpW1IakTMy3SsdfZJDbkuNjoHEpst2_3HO-lb4j0=) Peter, I’m scared — Republicans will stop at nothing to derail President Biden’s agenda and overturn our Democratic House.

**[I’m sorry to be upfront here, but I’m counting on 800 of my best grassroots Democrats to support our movement against this GOP onslaught. Will you pitch in $3 to protect our progress now? » ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37589182/311737554/-35646090?amount=3&refcode=TCFC_20211015_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTE2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWE1OTYyNi0wMTJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X3ivpW1IakTMy3SsdfZJDbkuNjoHEpst2_3HO-lb4j0=)** | [800 Democrats Needed: Pitch in $3 Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37589183/311737555/-35646090?amount=3&refcode=TCFC_20211015_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTE2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWE1OTYyNi0wMTJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X3ivpW1IakTMy3SsdfZJDbkuNjoHEpst2_3HO-lb4j0=)

Republicans are up to their old tricks:
* They’re pushing anti-Democratic voter suppression bills
* They’re fabricating scandals to deter President Biden’s agenda
* And they’re stopping stimulus in red states -- _despite Americans still needing that aid_

**As we recover from a global pandemic, there’s too much on the line to let Republicans play political games with our progress --_and our lives._ **

In this critical moment, I need your steadfast support to ensure House Democrats can keep Republican attacks at bay.

**[So I must ask again: Can you pitch in $3 to support my campaign now? name: National Republican Polling
subject: A dangerous ideology
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that sup
_Sponsored message_
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from National Republican Polling is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z6bumvqmb6p8r2uvua1jmuo7g8tbka3ug5nravdg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpj62p31cph2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zeeaikuf6fhu28bhkfbsik296t5ckjhq0f63i2p8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpj62p31cph2bs)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ztpmk80veniommgdn4evg9jfmiktoskupi7cgcng_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpj62p31cph2bs)
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for National Republican Polling, [please use this preferences page](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/prefs/9z2z2eueqgag24e6d9t4464th3vibnhhsjjiapn7e0g).

[It's time to legalize marijuana in Florida -- add your name if you agree](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37589247/311737650/1855061977?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmE1OTYyNi0wMTJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pxVz_qCortlqYzN0x5zquh35G99PiD_tkxnF324dfs0=&emci=61291dbb-e62d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=cfa59626-012e-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=8807089)
---
Friends,

**After more than fifty years, it's clear that the war on drugs has been an abject failure.**

That's why, when I'm Florida's governor, I pledge to:
| ✅ | Fully legalize marijuana for adult use and allow up to six plants to be grown for personal use
---|---|---
| ✅ | Use the proceeds from marijuana legalization to fund drug treatment and diversion programs
| ✅ | Expunge criminal records for marijuana-related misdemeanors and third-degree felonies
**Policies like these have been successfully implemented in _nearly two dozen states_ across the country -- and it's far past time for Florida to follow suit.**

**[_We need to send a strong message that the overwhelming majority of Floridians agree with these commonsense policies. If you’re on board, will you add your name now?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37589250/311737653/1855061977?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmE1OTYyNi0wMTJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pxVz_qCortlqYzN0x5zquh35G99PiD_tkxnF324dfs0=&emci=61291dbb-e62d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=cfa59626-012e-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=8807089)**
[Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37589253/311737656/1855061977?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmE1OTYyNi0wMTJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pxVz_qCortlqYzN0x5zquh35G99PiD_tkxnF324dfs0=&emci=61291dbb-e62d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=cfa59626-012e-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=8807089)

\-- Charlie

| Dear Patriot, Biden's Department of "Justice" is persecuting innocent Americans. And you or I might be next on their list. It's no secret that the Obama DOJ targeted members of the Trump campaign in 2016. Their actions during that election are well-documented and shameful. But since then it has gotten so much worse. They are now targeting ordinary Americans for having dissenting political views. Mothers who simply want to advocate for their children's education. Citizens who want to peacefully make their voices heard. All of those people are now in immediate danger of being labeled "domestic terrorists" and detained by a rogue DOJ. Attorney General Merrick Garland announced that he will be using the brute power of the DOJ to suppress parents who dare question the teaching of Critical Race Theory by their local schools. **The message is clear: if you speak up, they will come after you**. This is surely one of the darkest moments in American history. You and I have two options in front of us today: **1\. Cower in fear as Joe Biden's DOJ criminalizes dissent, and attacks the very fabric of American liberty** **... or ...** **2\. Stand up against the DOJ, refuse to be silenced, and fight for our freedom** I know which path I am going to take. I will not let American liberty die at the hands of a rogue Department of "Justice." But I need you to stand with me in this fight. My advisors are worried that the DOJ will use the same tactics that they used against President Trump, to defeat me in my upcoming Senate race. I must be prepared for whatever they throw my way, and that means I have no choice but to ask patriots like you for help. clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Patriot, Biden's Department of "Justice" is persecuting innocent Americans. And you or I might be next on their list. It's no secret that the Obama DOJ targeted members of the Trump campaign in 2016. Their actions during that election are well-documented and shameful. But since then it has gotten so much worse. They are now targeting ordinary Americans for having dissenting political views. Mothers who simply want to advocate for their children's education. Citizens who want to peacefully make their voices heard. All of those people are now in immediate danger of being labeled "domestic terrorists" and detained by a rogue DOJ. Attorney General Merrick Garland announced that he will be using the brute power of the DOJ to suppress parents who dare question the teaching of Critical Race Theory by their local schools. The message is clear: if you speak up, they will come after you. This is surely one of the darkest moments in American history. You and I have two options in front of us today: 1\. Cower in fear as Joe Biden's DOJ criminalizes dissent, and attacks the very fabric of American liberty ... or ... 2\. Stand up against the DOJ, refuse to be silenced, and fight for our freedom I know which path I am going to take. I will not let American liberty die at the hands of a rogue Department of "Justice." But I need you to stand with me in this fight. My advisors are worried that the DOJ will use the same tactics that they used against President Trump, to defeat me in my upcoming Senate race. Peter, with two and a half weeks until Election Day I wanted to reach out personally and highlight once again why this race is so important.

**I’m fighting to build upon the historic progress of our Democratic majority.** We must safeguard our right to vote, expand accessible health care, preserve abortion access, and so much more to do what’s best for our Commonwealth.

**My far-right Republican opponent is jeopardizing this progress.** Winsome Sears won’t be the leader Virginians need to move forward out of this pandemic — but she is climbing in the polls.

**As Lt. Governor, I will be a brick wall between Republican victory and protecting Virginians’ livelihoods.** Our current Lt. Governor has cast a staggering 52 tie-breaking votes in the tied Virginia Senate!

[**So I’m humbly asking for your support, Peter: Will you chip in $3 toward our final $30,000 goal? name: Team DeSantis
subject: Standing Up for the Rights of Floridians
body:
When it comes to protecting the right of Floridians to earn a living, Governor DeSantis will stop at nothing.
To view this email as a web page, go [here.](https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1aca32c470c0b95feb7d59e46e1d00c5a479972b19dfb2c0adff7c2d8146d743b9fac850483ff6f0682f2a2c01a53979a790b03d19ba08f6d84555e7bafc6330a8805a62df0dd36a)
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=0e788fe973c971c7299456a01cf1533222b1074bf167bfe2684ddfb29d98b4cbb830236b15fbf4e560c029abeee48a92897e4596921be322)
---
Peter,

**Authoritarian mandates have no place in America, but especially in Florida.**

Last week, Leon County violated Florida law and fired 14 county employees for failure to comply with the county's illegal forced vaccination mandate.

_**This WILL NOT stand and WILL NOT be without consequences.**_
---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=0e788fe973c971c7299456a01cf1533222b1074bf167bfe2684ddfb29d98b4cbb830236b15fbf4e560c029abeee48a92897e4596921be322)
---
Leon County is now being assessed a fine of $3.75 million for violating Florida's law AGAINST vaccine mandates.
_**[PROTECT OUR FREEDOM AND LIBERTY](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=0e788fe973c971c7790753b7502c1a1a73d5913f2dc9010c4ba8eb445eda05f61c4c3de3129b91969e22378f88abcbee5538747884ade93a "PROTECT OUR FREEDOM AND LIBERTY")**_ When it comes to protecting the right of Floridians to earn a living, Governor DeSantis will stand STRONG. _**Governor DeSantis is committed to protecting the livelihoods of Floridians**_ , particularly those who are vilified and targeted through unjust mandates. He will continue fighting to protect the right for families to determine what is in their own best interests and make medical decisions that are right for them.

These mandates that are nothing more than an exercise in government officials abusing their power. _**We need to come together and fight back against these oppressive policies.**_

_**[Add your name if you're ready to join the fight for our freedoms and liberties >>>](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=0e788fe973c971c7f7d4b89be231623aaee40701b6fa5a3155ecaf3aaa2ae0c5ce9a307964d592b221c81aa65cc4485be953cd64940aef1b "Add your name if you’re ready to join the fight for our freedoms and liberties >>>")**_

Sincerely,
Team DeSantis

---

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: Why I took the No Fossil Fuel Money Pledge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37589913/311740900/-2037180865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGEyOTRmMC0wMzJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z81XDMzRDbKSjDz7jLd1OwKyDOM9uWjCuVMQaxd5kg4=&emci=0a55145c-422d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=c8a294f0-032e-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=12898431)
---
Hello friend,
The world's top scientists are telling Members of Congress and policy makers around the globe that we cannot wait any longer. We're already feeling the consequences of climate change with extreme temperatures, drought, and devastating wildfires.
The stakes of this crisis demand nothing less than the most ambitious plan for clean energy and resilient infrastructure in American history. **That's why I have taken the pledge to reject fossil fuel money, and I'd like to challenge my fellow candidates to do the same.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37589914/311740901/41694283?refcode=X_101521_NoFossilFuelMoney&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGEyOTRmMC0wMzJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z81XDMzRDbKSjDz7jLd1OwKyDOM9uWjCuVMQaxd5kg4=)
---
It’s past time for our politicians and political candidates to reject support from the fossil fuel industry and prioritize the health of our communities and our democracy.
Dirty fossil fuel money has a long and dark history within our political system and has blocked bold action on climate change.
In exchange for their cash, these companies receive billions in subsidies and lenient laws that benefit them and their corporate profits -- not everyday people.
**Climate leadership means saying "NO" to the fossil fuel industry and its money.** Taking the No Fossil Fuel Money pledge is a core part of my commitment to our environment, our children, and our future.
I'm ready to fight for bold climate action -- and signing this pledge is just the start.
Onward,
Kirsten

---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37589915/311740902/41694283?refcode=X_101521_NoFossilFuelMoney&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGEyOTRmMC0wMzJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z81XDMzRDbKSjDz7jLd1OwKyDOM9uWjCuVMQaxd5kg4=)

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: The endorsement Sen. Grassley just accepted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa
body:
I know that together we can defeat him and flip Iowa blue, but right now I need your help ...
| | |
---
Hey, Peter. I'm reaching out to humbly ask for your support in my race for Iowa's Senate seat. **My opponent, Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA), recently announced his reelection campaign and was just endorsed by Donald Trump at a MAGA rally in Iowa last weekend.** I know that together we can defeat him and flip Iowa blue, but right now I need your help ahead of tonight's mid-month fundraising deadline.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37589917/311740905/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk279-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGEyOTRmMC0wMzJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UHxYBxFCgvDdm8SnesEqar-_Glz0J100h9_NXVg8C3A=)
We know Sen. Grassley will be heavily backed by Mitch McConnell and his allies, and we need a surge of grassroots resources to flip Iowa blue. [**Can you help us get back on track by making a contribution of $5 or more right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37589918/311740906/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk279-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGEyOTRmMC0wMzJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UHxYBxFCgvDdm8SnesEqar-_Glz0J100h9_NXVg8C3A=)
Peter, our Senate majority is as thin as it can possibly be – and Democratic control of the Senate is the only reason we’ve been able to pass critical legislation like the American Rescue Plan to help working families in Iowa. Meanwhile, Sen. Grassley has lived in Washington for decades and turned his back on the interests of everyday Iowans. It’s long past time for new leadership.
But we can only win – and protect our Democratic Senate majority in the process – if we muster enough grassroots support to compete with a deeply entrenched incumbent like Sen. Grassley, who now has the unwavering support of Donald Trump. **[So please, can you help us make up this fundraising shortfall by rushing a contribution of $5 or more right now? body:
Where do you stand on Biden's vaccine mandates? I'm not seeing your name on the list of conservatives who have taken our four question vaccine mandate Democrats want to require covid vaccine mandates but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border. ---

Fellow American,

In August the radical left began talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond. **Now, President Biden wants to "compel" the private sector to mandate vaccinations or face fines up to $14,000 PER VIOLATION!**

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 19 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=07fa73c6e3724afdad8fc0d9035a95cd&_e=pUrwIEyXnyPq0-VY1bRNxH_5T9djpfW2rHETJUTU0lB8KyASenSl0vGWbt2J-XG5UJANPQz7MGrUtr5rhChkFPInkWPku8OgLzjwYFXPH6mRNTFCxyn6qhWUmPKyCiBswpaCmb7lfcPQzRwR9ro9PUjXJsgaB8X2y8Gaz0pAzGqHsDhn1A5XURb3JfY0_GBHShAHxV6fgEcHcIqptE-JrsGDeufMBzcbWsP8wJxmUFnP3EBVvpjvCW0jkYdaUtyScVmiY8f3AqyZKluxIESTIykEKy6ImixA8Nm_f_kdqXkL_4ouFG8TpDRThCoCRpJkDr1PvGgKhsNT2dWzPN2JtgQ9cR27NFihkAo3_AUZgVUrye5fle3zszhHe9TGymjlrtQpKbRAWWvqnwabeCEnhniwBLY236zxnniIibSfCjwIjucZSahrxhiYqm-BXeopqMFVtynNxMEw6eIwI8wkTG8BUl7l05xBUFGFL2V1wlD5iiaquwmMgztET8xwgfFtyfXzYsG8wFqJWJmbieV-Bg%3D%3D)**

| _**

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!** Now, if you work for a company with more than 100 employees, the government is going to try to force you to get vaccinated!

The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them.**

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine mandates but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

_Will the hypocrisy ever end?_

**[Let us hear from you today. Would you support a federal ban on forced covid-19 vaccinations?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=07fa73c6e3724afdad8fc0d9035a95cd&_e=pUrwIEyXnyPq0-VY1bRNxH_5T9djpfW2rHETJUTU0lB8KyASenSl0vGWbt2J-XG5UJANPQz7MGrUtr5rhChkFPInkWPku8OgLzjwYFXPH6mRNTFCxyn6qhWUmPKyCiBswpaCmb7lfcPQzRwR9ro9PUjXJsgaB8X2y8Gaz0pAzGqHsDhn1A5XURb3JfY0_GBHShAHxV6fgEcHcIqptE-JrsGDeufMBzcbWsP8wJxmUFnP3EBVvpjvCW0jkYdaUtyScVmiY8f3AqyZKluxIESTIykEKy6ImixA8Nm_f_kdqXkL_4ouFG8TpDRThCoCRpJks-GhpdnkVyezLwclBcLUF0Pf5m3NLhgo_dB_Tkvy6dZ6EV9d2I4_5nplh-6VHhMfGWSKzp3E0OEBZ8XkN1W4Bsef9vtx4RL54J4OErK6TAAZOpcM70usiN2N9Nqeg34ZsK_7JOdB5er1LatJFbbo0pAu98XfuFiQgagZI8AJx9wav_PjYWSSFaUgcUGq-U__pPGZBtuNY4RXAl7o-8b8zw%3D%3D)**

Thanks for letting us know –

Thank you,
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=07fa73c6e3724afdad8fc0d9035a95cd&_e=pUrwIEyXnyPq0-VY1bRNxH_5T9djpfW2rHETJUTU0lB8KyASenSl0vGWbt2J-XG5UJANPQz7MGrUtr5rhChkFPInkWPku8OgLzjwYFXPH6mRNTFCxyn6qhWUmPKyCiBswpaCmb7lfcPQzRwR9ro9PUjXJsgaB8X2y8Gaz0pAzGqHsDhn1A5XURb3JfY0_GBHShAHxV6fgEcHcIqptE-JrsGDeufMBzcbWsP8wJxmUFnP3EBVvpjvCW0jkYdaUtyScVmiY8f3AqyZKluxIESTIykEKy6ImixA8Nm_f_kdqXkL_4ouFG8TpDRThCoCRpJkPAgMkflD4W3n1L1zGOMtODBsxOcc98E8GsCeAQwjbde_2gLp6j-My1C70GsR5OMYFDSG-p-0SpCV0oHyj1aB7b7VGzak5uxjDAEU2TloQkf4m0J4OqtL2q_NbM2un86vWPEAxv6JyqBlXaa6gAgYD6OsAfbWe4U35P9R6deBq-Sgt_PS2-V9yfnNIHZYZOkWlluF-ZT9TrIARPiJExZKlA%3D%3D)

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our natio
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zs06j2t1nngvqr710sb3uca7m982gq7cbe41hcv0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpj6aoj4c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American,
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.
A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.
That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.**
By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.
You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below:
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z7h79lhmjeast9ifdq593jt1ep8rcib32p508ql8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpj6aoj4c9h2bs)**
For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.
**But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.**
This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.
Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states.
These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College.
**And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.**
So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.
**You can take the survey using this secure link I 've provided below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zg03al8c45snl5n93pdc0p63n45tj5t1ob7nb02g_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpj6aoj4c9h2bs)**
And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.
Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.
Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Folks, Ben Ray here. I have the privilege of representing New Mexico in the U.S. Senate along with my friend and Senior Senator Martin Heinrich. And Sunday is Martin’s birthday! I’ve known Martin for a long time and I’ve seen how hard he works for New Mexico, our country, and our planet. name: American Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8811%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=rrQDoXsvjF4Q16dOP9r3EA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15368%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=glAl5lXtlqI14FRnWb2FqA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15369%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=R98a3Esqm%2bhZ3y5j19Ceag&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15369%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=R98a3Esqm%2bhZ3y5j19Ceag&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8811%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=rrQDoXsvjF4Q16dOP9r3EA&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8811%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=rrQDoXsvjF4Q16dOP9r3EA&sysid=1)

subject: How to volunteer this weekend:
body:
Allison will be in Lancaster this Saturday at noon! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8975cd2cafbe/how-to-volunteer-this-weekend?e=400a181d5a)
---
|
---
| | |
---
# _How to volunteer this weekend:_
[](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=9b8f6879d4&e=400a181d5a)
## _Knock on Doors:_
* [**Athens Weekly Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=7a8e0fff2e&e=400a181d5a) _, Saturday and Sunday at 10am, 12pm, and 2pm_
* [**Grandview Heights Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=f04295627d&e=400a181d5a)****_hosted by Reps. Adam Miller & Kristin Boggs, Saturday at 10am_
* [**Grove City Weekly Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=d498a18ce9&e=400a181d5a) , _Sunday at 1pm_
* [**Hilliard Coordinated Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=b814c6fd9f&e=400a181d5a) , _Saturday at 9:30am and Sunday at 2pm_
* [**Lancaster Weekly Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=2ea33dedbd&e=400a181d5a) , _Saturday at 12pm**WITH ALLISON!**_
* [**London Weekly Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=e05586bf98&e=400a181d5a) , _Sunday at 1pm_
* [**Pickerington Weekly Coordinated Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=a2197676b0&e=400a181d5a) , _Saturday at 10am_
* [**Ross Co. for Russo Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=94fd9ef398&e=400a181d5a) _, Sunday at 2pm_
* [**Upper Arlington/NW Columbus Weekly Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=7bab71fe80&e=400a181d5a) , _Saturday at 10am_
* [**Victorian Village GOTV Canvasses**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=d9785c334f&e=400a181d5a) _featuring Rick Neal, Saturday at 10am and Sunday at 12pm_
* [**West Jefferson Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=2ed4aeb0f6&e=400a181d5a) _featuring State Rep. Beth Liston, Saturday at 10am_

| [VIEW ALL CANVASSES](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=aecbaf9e18&e=400a181d5a)
---
## _Make Phone Calls:_
* [**GOTV Virtual Phone Bank**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=644fe45949&e=400a181d5a)**with OPAL!**
* _Trainings are Sunday at 4pm and Tuesday at 6pm_
* _Once trained, make calls every day of the week!_
* [**Rural Voters for Russo Virtual Phone Bank**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=ff43b52d23&e=400a181d5a)
* _Trainings are Monday and Wednesday at 6pm_
* _Once trained, make calls every day of the week!_
* [**Seniors for Russo Virtual Phone Bank**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=9e7f869435&e=400a181d5a)
* _Trainings are Tuesday and Thursday at 5pm_
* _Once trained, make calls every day of the week!_

| [VIEW ALL PHONE BANKS](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=3860fb2fd0&e=400a181d5a)
---
## _Write Letters to Neighbors:_
Research shows that neighbor-to-neighbor conversations are some of the most impactful political conversations you can have. The campaign can pay for flashy mailers and TV commercials, but [**only YOU can help us send a letter to your folks.**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=deed4e3617&e=400a181d5a) We'll ask you to write a short note on each letter, and to hand-address each envelope to our targeted voter list. This, along with a return address folks can recognize, makes a huge difference.
_Letters should be mailed no later than October 25th_
| [VIEW TEMPLATE LETTER AND SIGN UP](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=bd36502550&e=400a181d5a)
---
|
---
| | | | [](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=ee71e3af5b&e=400a181d5a)| [](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=38b5569d8e&e=400a181d5a)| [](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=1979142083&e=400a181d5a)
---|---|---

Our mailing address is:
RUSSO FOR CONGRESS545 E Town StColumbus, OH 43215-4801
[Add us to your address book](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/vcard?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=1655de56ed)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/profile?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=1655de56ed&e=400a181d5a&c=d7d6d2ac6a) or [unsubscribe](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=1655de56ed&e=400a181d5a&c=d7d6d2ac6a)
