name: Rod Dorilas
subject: Do you know how many black Republicans there are in Congress?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
body:
My parents came to the U.S. homeless to give me the American Dream. Now, I'm running for Congress to keep the American Dream, which saved our lives, a |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=22b3db1aa99a4f1cbc2e132c4cefe5c1&_t=wQpHfudQsc2xCVtQJUR3X1wvcMcGyJRtND8vjuR6aA9-Nrp_IOUjIe_NFg__DpX8kxaO-mGl_Z-1Ghmd3I49dk8cEINPxnmuD1SvSHUMG6fCkLdi7vft-3OLEMCHNZdNeZmpR6C3zS6sqN19yyfeBXewH6kYLNx7ZmRJ3XOzHtg%3D).

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=22b3db1aa99a4f1cbc2e132c4cefe5c1&_e=qC4iUC09NzrshhEgL_26go5-TB_zdV3afwjaVukK3xl8HhlFTLfQ8vyOXOc52nQ7DQ6_QvdFySr1B3wSGFNsEFfIJ4K7DLVnwL4VYoUjwgooAfZPFvYCOX5EPtvxqoVTbROJMp3YcZvcLyW29xoAzmO3zMWC3Eorb9_hq0FAIBT-3HtGAbodk7J34G5F5HoOO78iMdgTxeTAsQaGADYigpY1G6m69detSSXTDOQQpyeqk1Yyk3a5MjkfjY7FmETIMCgXh_LxI7OtCF2-6fioy_sIOspoFXh0uc-8A8hVU8R9jXuYf1SpQW_u9frPCf8niOdXUXrri5n5Dbu55Xj7W4AvsiGb1fby_kfypPMfrRNetkAh-NP_zhVlTzz3eQIfsSiW8FmKubQGzHdltoIoVntUtfNLj235Rb6w_kzFQxOtEm9QObMRUXJdla8NvzboYpDOtJxp8pba9YybZRK6xKsKyNZdztGd9vsd2iH660y30rTMfLCOAeAsqBYhP6bV)

---
Fellow American,

Never believe the Left’s narrative that America is a racist country; that the American dream doesn’t exist anymore; or that the Constitution is a relic of the past that disproportionately benefits Anglo Americans.

I’m speaking with authority on the matter: **I’m a first generation Haitian-American whose parents came to this country, quite literally penniless, to pick crops in South Florida during the 1980s**. Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. **I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative**.

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=22b3db1aa99a4f1cbc2e132c4cefe5c1&_e=qC4iUC09NzrshhEgL_26go5-TB_zdV3afwjaVukK3xl8HhlFTLfQ8vyOXOc52nQ7DQ6_QvdFySr1B3wSGFNsEFfIJ4K7DLVnwL4VYoUjwgooAfZPFvYCOX5EPtvxqoVTbROJMp3YcZvcLyW29xoAzmO3zMWC3Eorb9_hq0FAIBT-3HtGAbodk7J34G5F5HoOO78iMdgTxeTAsQaGADYigpY1G6m69detSSXTDOQQpyeqk1Yyk3a5MjkfjY7FmETIMCgXh_LxI7OtCF2-6fioy_sIOspoFXh0uc-8A8hVU8TitNtkU-1gZsSxweom-W1AfoLKVwbOYNq09QOFTH5KDoG7I637QLJe0JEaFGZr4yi8ywJHzUq3fzlntaWHkfadzFpZUELTT9myiAeP5W3LtjHuwZyqESP4NAuiJbHfxyMtRGZGU0IrVqSegH-Van3LUvJ1B4_999jadhCXCEHUQvWvSv73JT18m30powMcSMWhORhsIBkH1NwAp78BKady)
My name is Rod Dorilas and I’d like to tell you a few important things about me and why I’m writing to you today.
* I’m a military veteran (**I joined at 17**),
* I’m a lawyer (**I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school**)
* I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office.

**The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success.**

In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ _**freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction**_.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is.

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=22b3db1aa99a4f1cbc2e132c4cefe5c1&_e=qC4iUC09NzrshhEgL_26go5-TB_zdV3afwjaVukK3xl8HhlFTLfQ8vyOXOc52nQ7DQ6_QvdFySr1B3wSGFNsEFfIJ4K7DLVnwL4VYoUjwgooAfZPFvYCOX5EPtvxqoVTbROJMp3YcZvcLyW29xoAzmO3zMWC3Eorb9_hq0FAIBT-3HtGAbodk7J34G5F5HoOO78iMdgTxeTAsQaGADYigpY1G6m69detSSXTDOQQpyeqk1Yyk3a5MjkfjY7FmETIMCgXh_LxI7OtCF2-6fioy_sIOspoFXh0uc-8A8hVU8RlpwaWXq_Np2um3Hl0VIh3wxPtH2hVF2sutj6hFJVUwxKQ-r6sNIMwlKMkIelfNdNsa2dPjoSuEY0wHQM0QCvbUq1zn652Iupk4E5apluZEJjChDXTPLV-3dxwLT4iI2GkL6W_3DBVlcXBE1H5KvU6sPvxhsR08Dv2_bUXM6ksJxlQShNEOUH6_wF5YGhDFs89tqnq6sCUgWOXNk2GA9Nw)
I’m asking you to continue reading the rest of this email, but if you cannot, **[please consider chipping in whatever you can spare to my campaign today](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=22b3db1aa99a4f1cbc2e132c4cefe5c1&_e=qC4iUC09NzrshhEgL_26go5-TB_zdV3afwjaVukK3xl8HhlFTLfQ8vyOXOc52nQ7DQ6_QvdFySr1B3wSGFNsEFfIJ4K7DLVnwL4VYoUjwgooAfZPFvYCOX5EPtvxqoVTbROJMp3YcZvcLyW29xoAzmO3zMWC3Eorb9_hq0FAIBT-3HtGAbodk7J34G5F5HoOO78iMdgTxeTAsQaGADYigpY1G6m69detSSXTDOQQpyeqk1Yyk3a5MjkfjY7FmETIMCgXh_LxI7OtCF2-6fioy_sIOspoFXh0uc-8A8hVU8Rhd_-7WHDo7kNvQoCM20RiUxCTFHhJkGH7Uy2gBoYiaucZmubRpB5ZnKN57_sq42ymkyAq8lqA97I0QKqq6Xx4DXCM51kahfdvYB8qW5Bv_PDBwEnIA5hDTBw004RnemE2Hnzhnn2oPpKLoZAkd1Eez2yCJu5beElzkouwZJiwsjbQoIyYscmtpecQiEaJOocJE7hWTaLd_qCgkyhFijud)**. I’ve accomplished a lot in my short career, but I’m not independently wealthy and can’t fund my own campaign. I know I would be an effective voice for our party – I just need to make sure people in my district know who I am and what I stand for.

[** Send a 1st Generation American to Congress >>**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=22b3db1aa99a4f1cbc2e132c4cefe5c1&_e=qC4iUC09NzrshhEgL_26go5-TB_zdV3afwjaVukK3xl8HhlFTLfQ8vyOXOc52nQ7DQ6_QvdFySr1B3wSGFNsEFfIJ4K7DLVnwL4VYoUjwgooAfZPFvYCOX5EPtvxqoVTbROJMp3YcZvcLyW29xoAzmO3zMWC3Eorb9_hq0FAIBT-3HtGAbodk7J34G5F5HoOO78iMdgTxeTAsQaGADYigpY1G6m69detSSXTDOQQpyeqk1Yyk3a5MjkfjY7FmETIMCgXh_LxI7OtCF2-6fioy_sIOspoFXh0uc-8A8hVU8TPe_eVt1sTCCMMXxXek2DtiWZFL-wO5HTwnAjMHWV-FXStiSMci3x9qNHYhD0FLK6BKU8TfF-eIMpszagSMs891Z573MDaKeRPHnYBo-ZcIzIBXBjkIPjUcN5RNmim6aybuvbinYmRmIgLYqlPHW77-_GZ9-elUwYuum8muqiz6lMy3CH3wFVQMITNRHEvR2j9MFsSMfoswmV4wBq0ouF8)
Every morning that I read the news, it’s more doom and gloom. No one talks about the American Dream anymore. But, my parents and I are living proof that it still exists – and will continue to exist for future generations of immigrants and native-born Americans alike if we wake up to the dangers posed by socialism NOW. That is going to take hard work on all of our parts.

I know a thing or two about hard work, which I believe is one of the key characteristics missing in the folks representing us in Congress today. **I wasn’t happy with the high school I would have had to attend based off my parents address, so I traveled via public train and bus every day to attend one of my choice**. Having the option to attend a high school of my own choosing enabled me to become the man I am today.

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative. My name is Rod Dorilas and I’d like to tell you a few important things about me and why I’m writing to you today. I’m a military veteran (I joined at 17), I’m a lawyer (I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school) I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office. The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success. In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is. I’m asking you to continue reading the rest of this email, but if you cannot, . I’ve accomplished a lot in my short career, but I’m not independently wealthy and can’t fund my own campaign. I know I would be an effective voice for our party – I just need to make sure people in my district know who I am and what I stand for. Every morning that I read the news, it’s more doom and gloom. No one talks about the American Dream anymore. But, my parents and I are living proof that it still exists – and will continue to exist for future generations of immigrants and native-born Americans alike if we wake up to the dangers posed by socialism NOW. 1. We knew Georgia was going to be a critical battleground – _again_ – but now, POLITICO reports that our race will decide which party controls the Senate.
2. Republicans have made me one of their top targets for next year's critical elections, and they're already outspending us on misleading attack ads in order to smear my record and turn Georgia red.
3. Our grassroots campaign is **falling $17,871 short** of what we need to fight back, hit our midnight fundraising goal and win this race. **Unless we close this budget gap by midnight, the GOP's attacks could leave a major mark.**

**We cannot hand Georgia – and our critical Senate majority – back to Mitch McConnell and the GOP when everything from our voting rights to health care is under attack.** But according to analysts at _The Washington Post_ , that's exactly what could happen if we lose this battleground race.

My parents came to the U.S. homeless to give me the American Dream. Now, I'm running for Congress to keep the American Dream, which saved our lives, a |

Peter,

Never believe the Left’s narrative that America is a racist country; that the American dream doesn’t exist anymore; or that the Constitution is a relic of the past that disproportionately benefits Anglo Americans.

I’m speaking with authority on the matter: **I’m a first generation Haitian-American whose parents came to this country, quite literally penniless, to pick crops in South Florida during the 1980s**. Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. **I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative**.

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=2400ef4c7b3841d0a1730a49d5d80007&_e=DYFCdw9N5Vqfx1wgP9L_rSxEqWjrNqIQcGb-UwNqMxVFJvWzYFOAoz4zTa3hbrZ0gvjtkKlPW-6HGiPXto3QtiNT1pf1VseLPUZPZU6SH1RszGTlI4s99mmTag-tAd2p4k9GE4reSldlu3AzGnizwBfPKTA3DrEndIvpB7VrtIk6bvEjcuHlbz6JfUUu3LDYnhjL5soTpa2UlzlY4mBzxLSDh-N_5KYrxc5O1khr3ptXq_zpuaJuE6uSRX7ooAD3l-vPgzpPR5MUPeLhY1w-YRNfaPFeUO7LxY_wqS4fNVRsXsQzGYHUpzRu-S5YbUh8Hq5zaLxlPOYV5jZ4rziCB6NiLV4uY2m_Ok8RX6zLt0HGjT0xtaXranLX6E_43NgwzTYksgnWDjYwzDi0uUKlAFWf-NORU7hTvFu8WfnDqkNTAomcShjOp8DcRq-n3lKU7G_Y9QzEESYlquVTXwUKM0p1T6CQlVScvyA0RSs7-_g%3D)
My name is Rod Dorilas and I’d like to tell you a few important things about me and why I’m writing to you today.
* I’m a military veteran (**I joined at 17**),
* I’m a lawyer (**I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school**)
* I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office.

**The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success.**

In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ _**freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction**_.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is.

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=2400ef4c7b3841d0a1730a49d5d80007&_e=DYFCdw9N5Vqfx1wgP9L_rSxEqWjrNqIQcGb-UwNqMxVFJvWzYFOAoz4zTa3hbrZ0gvjtkKlPW-6HGiPXto3QtiNT1pf1VseLPUZPZU6SH1RszGTlI4s99mmTag-tAd2p4k9GE4reSldlu3AzGnizwBfPKTA3DrEndIvpB7VrtIk6bvEjcuHlbz6JfUUu3LDYnhjL5soTpa2UlzlY4mBzxLSDh-N_5KYrxc5O1khr3ptXq_zpuaJuE6uSRX7ooAD3l-vPgzpPR5MUPeLhY1w-YcWl_Y2_wRkKdOitWKnvQK-lRmjbx9cbEk-pHDU1eJxcJ9OBInSORQL18XjjU-yyQe1g5iLi9LXyuzUuM1UprXpjPnCKucz5fKZZ1CL3riPmPUPl27w-Q46vGTuyw-HT0yNAr065DMz7ADR0_xAkN8n36_W5TU_WVzqCQ8bOS_O6NW_LT67OcEjfboC8PlHpCM7Ef5uV4G2N34wGhB6zgdk%3D)
I’m asking you to continue reading the rest of this email, but if you cannot, **[please consider chipping in whatever you can spare to my campaign today](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=2400ef4c7b3841d0a1730a49d5d80007&_e=DYFCdw9N5Vqfx1wgP9L_rSxEqWjrNqIQcGb-UwNqMxVFJvWzYFOAoz4zTa3hbrZ0gvjtkKlPW-6HGiPXto3QtiNT1pf1VseLPUZPZU6SH1RszGTlI4s99mmTag-tAd2p4k9GE4reSldlu3AzGnizwBfPKTA3DrEndIvpB7VrtIk6bvEjcuHlbz6JfUUu3LDYnhjL5soTpa2UlzlY4mBzxLSDh-N_5KYrxc5O1khr3ptXq_zpuaJuE6uSRX7ooAD3l-vPgzpPR5MUPeLhY1w-Yc2EfBtfZKgQ0ztpDWWlV_gLm_RnaejT_GlGFy1o6kotlV-0kCTYEBtttC_9O6nCtlZ0rOzJU9jf4kdIiUsrBjcvBDvopW9wNY9bMQ3N5jzCaIZr83C7o1FozW2OCndoRGiFmqzYdZ1TC3fAwvXceXJoVJMVvWyz5ZbFseoOiUBjX54fyWvOgVTIs9j6fmzZAsu6tU9beEcz0PaBvtwXsLg%3D)**. I’ve accomplished a lot in my short career, but I’m not independently wealthy and can’t fund my own campaign. I know I would be an effective voice for our party – I just need to make sure people in my district know who I am and what I stand for.

[** Send a 1st Generation American to Congress >>**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=2400ef4c7b3841d0a1730a49d5d80007&_e=DYFCdw9N5Vqfx1wgP9L_rSxEqWjrNqIQcGb-UwNqMxVFJvWzYFOAoz4zTa3hbrZ0gvjtkKlPW-6HGiPXto3QtiNT1pf1VseLPUZPZU6SH1RszGTlI4s99mmTag-tAd2p4k9GE4reSldlu3AzGnizwBfPKTA3DrEndIvpB7VrtIk6bvEjcuHlbz6JfUUu3LDYnhjL5soTpa2UlzlY4mBzxLSDh-N_5KYrxc5O1khr3ptXq_zpuaJuE6uSRX7ooAD3l-vPgzpPR5MUPeLhY1w-Yend76ImFUP9HDpOgn64CakOsUIqTVpnviknNzreUJzDAtFSdsCMBOilP1cPKvRbgHQuy_3wA1pRVkU4a6z1BMaSBHyBd1f5R_qfzr4if-FAygF872bWmUitKHpQaXy_TYg7pbaN5ZDr99LS9rJc7827eDJbICsPEYJGlFgXsWU6Bu57Iw7xwF-ksJ-e8ZXkWhwFBGy4O6K6ba5wy7t4rLE%3D)
Every morning that I read the news, it’s more doom and gloom. No one talks about the American Dream anymore. But, my parents and I are living proof that it still exists – and will continue to exist for future generations of immigrants and native-born Americans alike if we wake up to the dangers posed by socialism NOW. That is going to take hard work on all of our parts.

I know a thing or two about hard work, which I believe is one of the key characteristics missing in the folks representing us in Congress today. **I wasn’t happy with the high school I would have had to attend based off my parents address, so I traveled via public train and bus every day to attend one of my choice**. Having the option to attend a high school of my own choosing enabled me to become the man I am today.

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=2400ef4c7b3841d0a1730a49d5d80007&_e=DYFCdw9N5Vqfx1wgP9L_rSxEqWjrNqIQcGb-UwNqMxVFJvWzYFOAoz4zTa3hbrZ0gvjtkKlPW-6HGiPXto3QtiNT1pf1VseLPUZPZU6SH1RszGTlI4s99mmTag-tAd2p4k9GE4reSldlu3AzGnizwBfPKTA3DrEndIvpB7VrtIk6bvEjcuHlbz6JfUUu3LDYnhjL5soTpa2UlzlY4mBzxLSDh-N_5KYrxc5O1khr3ptXq_zpuaJuE6uSRX7ooAD3l-vPgzpPR5MUPeLhY1w-YWv_aw86AnX-Z3NVtbQdQvihZ5nzRuF1lvOucxFFvSQogwB4Pm3DYxPR_3peNnzE2AYzd2Kh_xcVONBNFK1gBHNEw5F7dZYlgyDugSiWnn2CUhnOS12agn5p7OIzHldS_sZTlPEoAYA14Gj0ciCWRieDFKgtTqasoEUdi3A1fLRoLFz9CdRF8FBwi4xjPIx4P_bPdrIjBcqQYHJ1EXwm1MA%3D)
**I’d love to know where else in the world, immigrants from one of the Earth’s poorest nations could rise from homelessness and become successful business owners in a matter of two decades. All the while, raising their children with such success that one of them decides to seek federal office. **

Rising from poverty in Haiti to the middle class in South Florida wasn’t quick or easy, but _**what is worth having in life that is easy?**_ I learned from my parents that hard work and grit – along with perseverance – pays dividends. Yet today, many Americans would rather depend on government handouts.

If you’ve found this email inspiring on any level, **[would you please consider a contribution to my campaign for Congress today?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=2400ef4c7b3841d0a1730a49d5d80007&_e=DYFCdw9N5Vqfx1wgP9L_rSxEqWjrNqIQcGb-UwNqMxVFJvWzYFOAoz4zTa3hbrZ0gvjtkKlPW-6HGiPXto3QtiNT1pf1VseLPUZPZU6SH1RszGTlI4s99mmTag-tAd2p4k9GE4reSldlu3AzGnizwBfPKTA3DrEndIvpB7VrtIk6bvEjcuHlbz6JfUUu3LDYnhjL5soTpa2UlzlY4mBzxLSDh-N_5KYrxc5O1khr3ptXq_zpuaJuE6uSRX7ooAD3l-vPgzpPR5MUPeLhY1w-YW5S3vdLNkqbykHSYihcwQ7wokB8nhsLvJzHByAtnAZwCl0VVzNlum6qZYsD5d1M0ubB5ESJHr8LikiFfoDhA9fmjMHhXhpJ5Jp_FXbcTyMT4-ClmBoWrGen5asCL9ahShendMkaMsorgnge55YX1fU9xXk8Ih6wLBgl0TKnW5R-IHTjhns1iXq9z6_bahqJIQv0zdM3xbALX3KSi0QfTWg%3D)** I don’t believe in handouts of any kind, but I won’t be able to do anything about the ones that exist – or stop new entitlements – without first making my way to Congress.

[** Send a 1st Generation American to Congress >>**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=2400ef4c7b3841d0a1730a49d5d80007&_e=DYFCdw9N5Vqfx1wgP9L_rSxEqWjrNqIQcGb-UwNqMxVFJvWzYFOAoz4zTa3hbrZ0gvjtkKlPW-6HGiPXto3QtiNT1pf1VseLPUZPZU6SH1RszGTlI4s99mmTag-tAd2p4k9GE4reSldlu3AzGnizwBfPKTA3DrEndIvpB7VrtIk6bvEjcuHlbz6JfUUu3LDYnhjL5soTpa2UlzlY4mBzxLSDh-N_5KYrxc5O1khr3ptXq_zpuaJuE6uSRX7ooAD3l-vPgzpPR5MUPeLhY1w-YU3komwogdXGTZq1THa5VlZAVfk7n3RDkznOk04B0Q2HTDKJvL5c9fCj_yodOzzroVo8GOCCyMTXYI2f6SSCOL_DObiO1oujdd86G6Y5GGbKj2LGjWS-6Xm1IRsPQdm3OxhlXOuGZ2WARdAZI1D_RqNlaQoidtqfun-P26ujiQFmohZFigbztK1Gx6dh21hteM-IgZnNOlfuKNMHitawngM%3D)
Thank you for taking the time to read this email today. I sincerely appreciate your consideration.

For Country,

Rod Dorilas

[** I'M WITH ROD >> **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=2400ef4c7b3841d0a1730a49d5d80007&_e=DYFCdw9N5Vqfx1wgP9L_rSxEqWjrNqIQcGb-UwNqMxVFJvWzYFOAoz4zTa3hbrZ0gvjtkKlPW-6HGiPXto3QtiNT1pf1VseLPUZPZU6SH1RszGTlI4s99mmTag-tAd2p4k9GE4reSldlu3AzGnizwBfPKTA3DrEndIvpB7VrtIk6bvEjcuHlbz6JfUUu3LDYnhjL5soTpa2UlzlY4mBzxLSDh-N_5KYrxc5O1khr3ptXq_zpuaJuE6uSRX7ooAD3l-vPgzpPR5MUPeLhY1w-YSLnQwPMFeg8tlOZV2Hulk2RUOvrWALU1G_XH_yPTGKlT0NaoqDIvAz6qxllP1lpZcoz8K_XIAlaxkZ_4iY9_XGtaLO-xQVbIMJMGUrU-PyoSyYFQQHT-mzKUx-drgtQ4u_kgkqkwAawOb4FwliyTTTsI6n2ASzGIjrVfznB2lbd1v4wldVD25BRvc8SBg3HT8C-Sm63VXi9hL7dIvaGSfc%3D)

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=2400ef4c7b3841d0a1730a49d5d80007&_e=DYFCdw9N5Vqfx1wgP9L_rSxEqWjrNqIQcGb-UwNqMxVFJvWzYFOAoz4zTa3hbrZ0gvjtkKlPW-6HGiPXto3QtiNT1pf1VseLPUZPZU6SH1RszGTlI4s99mmTag-tAd2p4k9GE4reSldlu3AzGnizwBfPKTA3DrEndIvpB7VrtIk6bvEjcuHlbz6JfUUu3LDYnhjL5soTpa2UlzlY4mBzxLSDh-N_5KYrxc5O1khr3ptXq_zpuaJuE6uSRX7ooAD3l-vPgzpPR5MUPeLhY1w-YX5uznaAkRMCX7fKnlbfP_DmGMZZTGyZfN4Im7bEJ2zU7kzgywyZRpoRdPSh8oZq7iJvAGfT_DySUmv8VdBpYlsVwg57b25aVmfVTMWl9qvbZAMBqwdtPjbXMNoB2TEPop34B-rHFhh0XtuIKoABDLhzojBhIyCu3KkfzK25fBHCyGnAsDwkwVY4BtxWm3hWEjZmUpEr6ZXfPfWTtM5i_Bw%3D)

I’m speaking with authority on the matter: I’m a first generation Haitian-American whose parents came to this country, quite literally penniless, to pick crops in South Florida during the 1980s. Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative. My name is Rod Dorilas and I’d like to tell you a few important things about me and why I’m writing to you today. I’m a military veteran (I joined at 17), I’m a lawyer (I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school) I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office. The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success. In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is. I’m asking you to continue reading the rest of this email, but if you cannot, . I’ve accomplished a lot in my short career, but I’m not independently wealthy and can’t fund my own campaign. I know I would be an effective voice for our party – I just need to make sure people in my district know who I am and what I stand for. Every morning that I read the news, it’s more doom and gloom. No one talks about the American Dream anymore. But, my parents and I are living proof that it still exists – and will continue to exist for future generations of immigrants and native-born Americans alike if we wake up to the dangers posed by socialism NOW. That is going to take hard work on all of our parts. I know a thing or two about hard work, which I believe is one of the key characteristics missing in the folks representing us in Congress today. I wasn’t happy with the high school I would have had to attend based off my parents address, so I traveled via public train and bus every day to attend one of my choice. Having the option to attend a high school of my own choosing enabled me to become the man I am today. I’d love to know where else in the world, immigrants from one of the Earth’s poorest nations could rise from homelessness and become successful business owners in a matter of two decades. All the while, raising their children with such success that one of them decides to seek federal office. Rising from poverty in Haiti to the middle class in South Florida wasn’t quick or easy, but what is worth having in life that is easy? I learned from my parents that hard work and grit – along with perseverance – pays dividends. Yet today, many Americans would rather depend on government handouts. If you’ve found this email inspiring on any level, I don’t believe in handouts of any kind, but I won’t be able to do anything about the ones that exist – or stop new entitlements – without first making my way to Congress. Thank you for taking the time to read this email today. I sincerely appreciate your consideration. For Country, Rod Dorilas | ABOUT ROD** Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service. At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer. Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China. Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left. | Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress

name: Deandrea Newsome
subject: Let’s do this!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Erica needs you with her in this fight.
#
Hey, Deandrea here, the Campaign Chair for Erica Smith for U.S. Senate, with an important campaign update.
**Tomorrow marks Erica’s first mid-month fundraising deadline of Q4, and we’ve set a goal of bringing in 350 online contributions before then — with $0 from corporate PACs, or Big Pharma and Big Oil CEOs.**
Unfortunately, donations have seriously slowed down this week, and it’s really important that our campaign fundraising stays on track.
[**Can you make a donation to our campaign today? Our finance team ran the numbers, and if just 115 people donate before tomorrow night, we’ll reach our goal in time!**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/21964?refcode=em20211015-549&%3Bamp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=549%2E3698%2Eky-y82)
**[Donate](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/21964?refcode=em20211015-549&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=549%2E3698%2Eky-y82)**
Growing up Black in the rural South, Erica knows what it means to struggle, and she has seen first-hand the challenges working people face as a public school teacher, a minister, and a three-term state senator.
Erica is ready to fight for ALL of us in Washington and be the 51st vote Senate Democrats need to deliver on raising the minimum wage, expanding the right to vote, abolishing the filibuster, passing Medicare for All, and so much more.
**Erica is the only progressive Democrat in this race and she has spent her entire career fighting for real change in our communities. But Erica needs you with her in this fight to win this U.S. Senate race.**
[**So, please, pitch in any amount you can afford today, to put your support behind our movement and help us reach our mid-month fundraising goal by midnight tomorrow. Every donation helps power our campaign forward.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/21964?refcode=em20211015-549&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=549%2E3698%2Eky-y82)
Let's do this!!!
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/21964?refcode=em20211015-549&%3Bamp%3Bamp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=549%2E3698%2Eky-y82)
Deandrea
Deandrea Newsome
Campaign Chair
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211015-549-footer&t=23&refcode2=549_3698_ky-y82&akid=549%2E3698%2Eky-y82)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=24&akid=549%2E3698%2Eky-y82)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=549%2E3698%2Eky-y82)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: The Violent College Left
body:
Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It’s never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8813%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=8JBhYf4YsSgmjJcspYR26g&sysid=1)
Fellow Patriot, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It’s never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That’s why it’s of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I’m no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. [**HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15362%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=F0xeNPmoVW8szf9cRR%2fDmA&sysid=1) Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn’t disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event--with the likely intent to do harm.

It’s no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It’s about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn’t have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony--a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. _**The good news is the radical Left’s attempts to silence me completely backfired.**_**** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that’s more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren’t for the **Young America’s Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university --**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America’s universities has not yet been broken. **Young America’s Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation’s leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you contribute $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15363%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Hu3Sk2v67kkXv6j1xXZJxA&sysid=1)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America’s Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, “Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness.” YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they’re told to trust. YAF’s team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here’s why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF’s Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D’Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes,** Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O’Keefe,** NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News’s**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan’s ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan’s lasting accomplishments.

_No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America’s Foundation._ _That’s why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events._ They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can’t do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it’s become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn’t want a fair discussion of ideas. But that’s why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment’s notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF’s rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15364%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Pgpa7NxpxiSaKiVyb4%2bkcA&sysid=1) Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can’t be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can’t think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, “There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds.” I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America’s Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15375%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=osjGA7YkIQbUaFS37t6lPA&sysid=1) [**DONATE**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15376%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WgOfJ9i6zjp6VLFXhGkQ5w&sysid=1) [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15377%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TJqNDGx62sVcWM%2fuU%2fZzcA&sysid=1) | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15378%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rYGbqDk7Re0QzuCEoq6WwQ&sysid=1) | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15379%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xYgqXyNkSV%2btluSmtUayxw&sysid=1) | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15370%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6TUTPon5eCuwYuwy%2bcjgDg&sysid=1)
---|---|---
**[www.yaf.org](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15371%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hO3VdWXoWf79bgZMnWJkqw&sysid=1)**

11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor
Reston, VA 20191-1556

**[Privacy Policy](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15372%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wz5cUE7QfJbQolQPl9kXHQ&sysid=1) **
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8813%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=8JBhYf4YsSgmjJcspYR26g&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8813%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=8JBhYf4YsSgmjJcspYR26g&sysid=1)

At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment’s notice. Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can’t be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can’t think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, “There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds.” I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro | | | | ---|---|--- 11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor Reston, VA 20191-1556 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: The Violent College Left
body:
Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It’s never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c497%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=6pRDZe%2fs2Ar1oVGDclfkPw&sysid=1)
Fellow Patriot, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It’s never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That’s why it’s of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I’m no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. [**HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66160%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=H31UQ9XFbH3SMuXfHXQLHw&sysid=1) Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn’t disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event--with the likely intent to do harm.

It’s no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It’s about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn’t have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony--a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. _**The good news is the radical Left’s attempts to silence me completely backfired.**_**** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that’s more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren’t for the **Young America’s Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university --**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America’s universities has not yet been broken. **Young America’s Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation’s leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you contribute $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66161%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xqeVhYIwXWA0UReQQ%2b80%2bw&sysid=1)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America’s Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, “Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness.” YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they’re told to trust. YAF’s team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here’s why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF’s Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D’Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes,** Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O’Keefe,** NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News’s**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan’s ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan’s lasting accomplishments.

_No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America’s Foundation._ _That’s why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events._ They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can’t do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it’s become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn’t want a fair discussion of ideas. But that’s why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment’s notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF’s rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66162%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dQkxyxKIs1oaYNa%2flvmlUA&sysid=1) Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can’t be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can’t think of a better investment. clean_body: Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It’s never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. Fellow Patriot, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It’s never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That’s why it’s of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I’m no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that: It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn’t disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech. The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus. For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters. In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event--with the likely intent to do harm. It’s no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It’s about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn’t have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony--a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. The good news is the radical Left’s attempts to silence me completely backfired.** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that’s more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren’t for the Young America’s Foundation (YAF). When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university --and won. But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America’s universities has not yet been broken. Young America’s Foundation has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses exclusively through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation’s leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America’s Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, “Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness.” YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they’re told to trust. YAF’s team is the best at what they do. They are #1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America. Here’s why: YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, YAF’s Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President Mike Pence, Dinesh D’Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes, Lt. Col.Allen West , SpeakerNewt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O’Keefe, NFL star and Congressman Burgess Owens, Star Parker, Fox News’sJesse Watters, and many others. YAF teaches millions of students across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!) And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan’s ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan’s lasting accomplishments. No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America’s Foundation. That’s why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events. They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can’t do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it’s become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn’t want a fair discussion of ideas. But that’s why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment’s notice. Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can’t be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can’t think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, “There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds.” I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro | | | | ---|---|--- 11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor Reston, VA 20191-1556 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314

name: Dr. Mary L. Trump
subject: Glenn Youngkin worships my uncle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
We can’t let him win.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37591749/311748152/-2023814932?refcode=20211015.7_MT_10CWR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2Q5OTRkMC0wZjJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7E3mSyj-ATJjRqewIp_voQQKUouSuaN0HcdBRcKoDUI=)

| | In 2020, we saw voters turn out in record numbers to defeat the most dangerous man in America, my uncle, Donald Trump.

Now, Democrats are complacent, seemingly unconcerned that a Donald Trump-endorsed candidate is inches away from winning the highest office in Virginia.

Glenn Youngkin has embraced everything my uncle stood for. He said that Donald Trump represents so much of why he’s running for office, sold the “Big Lie” that the 2020 election was in some way invalid, wants to bring Betsy DeVos’ public education destruction to Virginia, and has been endorsed by my uncle SIX TIMES.

[**Derek, after four years of my uncle as President, you know just as well as I that we can’t afford a Donald Trump acolyte in the Virginia Governor’s office. clean_body: We can’t let him win. | | | = | | In 2020, we saw voters turn out in record numbers to defeat the most dangerous man in America, my uncle, Donald Trump. Now, Democrats are complacent, seemingly unconcerned that a Donald Trump-endorsed candidate is inches away from winning the highest office in Virginia. Glenn Youngkin has embraced everything my uncle stood for. He said that Donald Trump represents so much of why he’s running for office, sold the “Big Lie” that the 2020 election was in some way invalid, wants to bring Betsy DeVos’ public education destruction to Virginia, and has been endorsed by my uncle SIX TIMES. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** If Glenn Youngkin wins this election, he’ll set my uncle on the path to a 2024 comeback. A victory here for the GOP would send a message to the rest of the nation that the party of insurrectionists, anti-maskers, and vaccine deniers is still alive and well. Virginia can’t afford that, and neither can we. = Thank you for standing with Terry and me, Mary L. Trump, PhD = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click._ Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Does anybody understand Kyrsten Sinema?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Senator Kyrsten Sinema started out in politics as an environmentalist. Now, according to _The New York Times_ , Sinema is pushing to cut $100 billion from President Biden's historic climate change legislation. Let's call a spade a spade: Kyrsten Sinema is a hypocrite. But now, as Sinema joins West Virginia Sen. Joe Manchin as a wrench in the gears of our Democratic Senate Majority, we need to know WHY Sinema is so eager to flip-flop on climate justice and other issues that were ostensibly once her core beliefs. Sinema's erratic behavior presents a serious problem for our Democratic caucus. But is the solution chasing her into bathrooms to yell at her, as POLITICO reports some dismayed activists have done? Or is it time Democrats get serious about replacing Sinema with a real progressive? But we must understand what you and at least 1,075 supporters think of Sinema so we can chart the most productive path forward. name: Rabine for Governor
subject: Behind the Curve
body:
Numbers are coming out on states' recovery from the pandemic, and shocker, Illinois is far behind our surrounding red states.

| [ ](http://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_10_15&n=1) | |
---|---|---
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoACmWpbFVl5yir_lA0uM2Gq9g9n79yo2HHshKvg7nExCdQZseeTdqQcxnA0-13oGA&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_10_15&n=2) Dear Peter -- A new study from MoneyGeek shows how blue states like Illinois are lagging behind red states in recovering from the pandemic. The “American Employment and the Pandemic: COVID-19 Cases and Job Recovery by State and Political Affiliation” found that Illinois has recovered 78% of its lost jobs – a figure which ranks 34th in the nation – while neighboring Missouri and Wisconsin have recovered 100 percent of their lost jobs. Policy decisions matter and when it comes to creating an environment for job growth, JB Pritzker is failing in a big way. How does an economic powerhouse like Illinois lag behind Wisconsin and Missouri in job recovery? The reason is self-evident. Pritzker’s policies are failing the people of Illinois. There are so many reasons why we need new leadership in Illinois. The lack of job recovery is just another in a host of reasons why we need to beat JB Pritzker in 2022. I am the candidate best equipped to do this. Please join in me in my mission to defeat Gov. Pritzker. Log onto [https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_10_15&n=3) to learn now. Best Regards, Gary Rabine | |
---|---
|
##
### St. Charles Bonfire & Barbecue Meet & Greet (10/16) 7 PM - 10 PM
Come out with family & friends to meet Republican Candidate for Governor Gary Rabine at the St Charles Bonfire & Barbecue Meet & Greet tomorrow night! For more information and to RSVP for this event visit the Facebook Event Page linked below.
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nmUUukZrx1xgsPFq6NPPOV60X97eBVNlQDDrdl35Xe1&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_10_15&n=4 "Event Details Here") [Event Details Here](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nmUUukZrx1xgsPFq6NPPOV60X97eBVNlQDDrdl35Xe1&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_10_15&n=4)

### FIRST EVER: Parking Lot Party \- Villa Park (10/24) 1 PM - 5 PM
The FIRST EVER Rabine For Governor Parking Lot Party is SUNDAY, OCTOBER 24th in Villa Park! From 1PM-5PM.
This will be a fun-filled event for the whole family with food, music, games, giveaways, and activities. Bring the family and come spend the day with Gary and the Rabine For Governor team! To RSVP visit the event page linked below.
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nmUUukZrx1xgsPFq6NPPOWngd47DgcqrRG-itPS25ZOKxbfR9lnsfGVoLWgivonRQ&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_10_15&n=5 "Event Details Here") [Event Details Here](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nmUUukZrx1xgsPFq6NPPOWngd47DgcqrRG-itPS25ZOKxbfR9lnsfGVoLWgivonRQ&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_10_15&n=5)

* * *
##
### **Standing with Chicago Police officers**
“The fact that City leaders would jeopardize the safety of Chicago residents by laying off police officers for not providing information about their vaccine status is appalling. These leaders don’t care about public safety, they only care about control."
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/newsletter_10_15_updates?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_10_15&n=6 "Continue Reading") [Continue Reading](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/newsletter_10_15_updates?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_10_15&n=6)
---
### **Illinois should follow Texas’ lead**
Texas Gov. Greg Abbott signed an executive order this week banning vaccine mandates and he asked the Legislature to pass a law to codify the ban.
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/newsletter_10_15_updates?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_10_15&n=7 "Read More Here") [Read More Here](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/newsletter_10_15_updates?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_10_15&n=7)
---
### **Congressional remap hearings attracting few participants**
Could it be the people of Illinois understand the fix is in as it relates to the remap process? The public’s input in the state legislative remap hearings were largely ignored. What makes anyone think anything will be different during the Congressional remap hearings?
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/newsletter_10_15_updates?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_10_15&n=8 "Continue Reading") [Continue Reading](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/newsletter_10_15_updates?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_10_15&n=8)

clean_body: Numbers are coming out on states' recovery from the pandemic, and shocker, Illinois is far behind our surrounding red states. | | | ---|---|--- Dear Peter -- A new study from MoneyGeek shows how blue states like Illinois are lagging behind red states in recovering from the pandemic. The “American Employment and the Pandemic: COVID-19 Cases and Job Recovery by State and Political Affiliation” found that Illinois has recovered 78% of its lost jobs – a figure which ranks 34th in the nation – while neighboring Missouri and Wisconsin have recovered 100 percent of their lost jobs. Policy decisions matter and when it comes to creating an environment for job growth, JB Pritzker is failing in a big way. How does an economic powerhouse like Illinois lag behind Wisconsin and Missouri in job recovery? The reason is self-evident. Pritzker’s policies are failing the people of Illinois. There are so many reasons why we need new leadership in Illinois. The lack of job recovery is just another in a host of reasons why we need to beat JB Pritzker in 2022. I am the candidate best equipped to do this. Please join in me in my mission to defeat Gov. Pritzker. Log onto to learn now. Best Regards, Gary Rabine | | ---|--- | St. Charles Bonfire & Barbecue Meet & Greet (10/16) 7 PM - 10 PM Come out with family & friends to meet Republican Candidate for Governor Gary Rabine at the St Charles Bonfire & Barbecue Meet & Greet tomorrow night! For more information and to RSVP for this event visit the Facebook Event Page linked below. "Event Details Here" FIRST EVER: Parking Lot Party \- Villa Park (10/24) 1 PM - 5 PM The FIRST EVER Rabine For Governor Parking Lot Party is SUNDAY, OCTOBER 24th in Villa Park! From 1PM-5PM. This will be a fun-filled event for the whole family with food, music, games, giveaways, and activities. Bring the family and come spend the day with Gary and the Rabine For Governor team! To RSVP visit the event page linked below. "Event Details Here" Standing with Chicago Police officers “The fact that City leaders would jeopardize the safety of Chicago residents by laying off police officers for not providing information about their vaccine status is appalling. These leaders don’t care about public safety, they only care about control." "Continue Reading" Illinois should follow Texas’ lead Texas Gov. Greg Abbott signed an executive order this week banning vaccine mandates and he asked the Legislature to pass a law to codify the ban. "Read More Here" Congressional remap hearings attracting few participants Could it be the people of Illinois understand the fix is in as it relates to the remap process? The public’s input in the state legislative remap hearings were largely ignored. What makes anyone think anything will be different during the Congressional remap hearings? | | **I need to know...**I am fighting Biden’s illegal vaccine mandate. Are you with me? **** [****RESPOND NOW >>****](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/15IxkHW06o4rUHqHcTwviPvM) **You probably have heard of Joe Biden’s latest power grab: an executive order requiring federal employees, government contractors and large businesses to get vaccinated. This was the government's**biggest** overreach yet, and luckily the decision has been met with legal challenges from numerous companies and even some states. ** **President Biden and the federal government should not be telling private businesses what to do. ** [**_I need 578 Patriots to join me in taking a stance against this egregious overreach of power. _**](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/15IC31wBkwzpwFEIwb1ODJNF) **[](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/15ICpvEbzV4plhFNo7BBOSTO)****[Respond right NOW](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/15ICLZLLPjzp9TGSg4bp01ZX) and let my team know what you think. ** **Thank you for sharing your voice, ** **Jim Inhofe**

# Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America
| | |
---|---|---
Supporter: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJyNkEtyhCAQhk-jOy1oFceFi3keIBegkEckAbUEYub2AWsySWWVqi4WH83X9C_6BhRGue4BAcYIN4AwxnWJy-56bUmNjwSdT019QlmNhHTvsxLzxIx482uwS8lnm49913UVg0MLpMFsUIS3nKsGWCUGzGXNc9OP3i8uq44Z3GJt21b-9UScBmTVLXhLrRQ62Ky6SMu0oaPKgCTu5rByGbnldGKxHpwzuzD9OsWb71WoWmdb-FEWyVvMiv4eSR37kMzKVfOnY568nHxUpEYvKV_uq_uZ4eWafrS4yLiJkE5Gi0gCBAHHT7i87NDtECMQHOOhgApIUSMsi8NAoBikamUHQihU52svlk0box1pY8Kvadk91LiO0ereZ-0pAwghKgH2_OA_4tQM53j6-yKfLx_Scs800fbyBVsboZY) Notification Status: Signed Up
Donald J. Trump October 15th, 2021
A new analysis of mail-in ballots in Pima County, Arizona means the election was Rigged and Stolen from the Republican Party in 2020, and in particular, its Presidential Candidate.

This analysis, derived from publicly available election data, shows staggering anomalies and fictitious votes in Pima County’s mail-in returns, making it clear they stuffed the ballot box (in some precincts with more ballots than were ever sent!).

Your favorite Republican candidate was steadily outperforming the Republican share of mail-in ballots by 3%, while Joe Biden was underperforming Democrats by 3%. But when mail-in ballots started pouring in way higher than normal (at over 87%), this trend flipped. In other words, when it was clear Trump was going to win, that’s when they swung into action. As more mail-in ballots poured in and increased by 1%, Trump’s performance decreased by 1%, while Biden’s increased.

As more and more mail-in ballots were stuffed into the system, Biden’s numbers shot way up. But they overplayed their hand, and got caught. Two precincts in Pima had over 100 percent turnout for mail-in ballots -- which is impossible -- and 40 precincts had over 97% returned. The national mail-in ballot return rate was 71%, but in Pima County the mail-in ballot return rate was 15% higher, and 19% higher than all the counties combined in the entire state of Arizona. One precinct with 99.5% mail-in turnout had 9,812 ballots counted. Another precinct with 100.6% turnout had 2,182 ballots returned, but only 2,170 mail-ins were ever sent. These two total 11,994 ballots, alone more than the margin needed to win.

Turnout rates of 99% and 100% is what you get in a Third World Country, and that’s what we’re becoming (look at crime, the Border, Afghanistan, food prices, energy prices, and the empty store shelves, etc.), unless this is fixed immediately!

The precincts above 92% mail-in return rate represented 264,000 votes. If just 2% are fraudulent, meaning Trump votes went to Biden, that would be enough to change the so-called margin in Arizona of 10,457 votes.

The Department of Justice has had this information since the November 2020 Election, and has done nothing about it. The Pima County GOP should start a canvass of Republican voters, in order to identify and remove the obvious fictitious voters from the system.

In addition, the Arizona Audit found tens of thousands of illegal votes, including 6,545 mail-in ballots with no envelopes, 2,580 bad signatures on mail-in ballot envelopes, and 1,919 mail-in ballot envelopes with no signature, which is also determinative and more than the margin.

Either a new Election should immediately take place or the past Election should be decertified and the Republican candidate declared the winner.

Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | | ---|---|--- Supporter: Notification Status: Signed Up Donald J. Trump October 15th, 2021 A new analysis of mail-in ballots in Pima County, Arizona means the election was Rigged and Stolen from the Republican Party in 2020, and in particular, its Presidential Candidate. This analysis, derived from publicly available election data, shows staggering anomalies and fictitious votes in Pima County’s mail-in returns, making it clear they stuffed the ballot box (in some precincts with more ballots than were ever sent!). Your favorite Republican candidate was steadily outperforming the Republican share of mail-in ballots by 3%, while Joe Biden was underperforming Democrats by 3%. But when mail-in ballots started pouring in way higher than normal (at over 87%), this trend flipped. In other words, when it was clear Trump was going to win, that’s when they swung into action. As more mail-in ballots poured in and increased by 1%, Trump’s performance decreased by 1%, while Biden’s increased. As more and more mail-in ballots were stuffed into the system, Biden’s numbers shot way up. But they overplayed their hand, and got caught. Two precincts in Pima had over 100 percent turnout for mail-in ballots -- which is impossible -- and 40 precincts had over 97% returned. The national mail-in ballot return rate was 71%, but in Pima County the mail-in ballot return rate was 15% higher, and 19% higher than all the counties combined in the entire state of Arizona. One precinct with 99.5% mail-in turnout had 9,812 ballots counted. Another precinct with 100.6% turnout had 2,182 ballots returned, but only 2,170 mail-ins were ever sent. These two total 11,994 ballots, alone more than the margin needed to win. Turnout rates of 99% and 100% is what you get in a Third World Country, and that’s what we’re becoming (look at crime, the Border, Afghanistan, food prices, energy prices, and the empty store shelves, etc.), unless this is fixed immediately! The precincts above 92% mail-in return rate represented 264,000 votes. If just 2% are fraudulent, meaning Trump votes went to Biden, that would be enough to change the so-called margin in Arizona of 10,457 votes. The Department of Justice has had this information since the November 2020 Election, and has done nothing about it. The Pima County GOP should start a canvass of Republican voters, in order to identify and remove the obvious fictitious voters from the system. In addition, the Arizona Audit found tens of thousands of illegal votes, including 6,545 mail-in ballots with no envelopes, 2,580 bad signatures on mail-in ballot envelopes, and 1,919 mail-in ballot envelopes with no signature, which is also determinative and more than the margin. Either a new Election should immediately take place or the past Election should be decertified and the Republican candidate declared the winner. | ---|--- Donald J. name: Laura Loomer
subject: Patriot, we did it!!
body:
The FEC reports just came out for the last quarter and we were able to outraise five-term incumbent Daniel Webster by 69%!!
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/YTPD892aCBXgT3xuVfcELapw/PJO5NsKoAwQoUF1YjyLb2g)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/YTPD892aCBXgT3xuVfcELapw/PJO5NsKoAwQoUF1YjyLb2g) The FEC reports just came out for the last quarter and **we were able to outraise my oppenent, five-term incumbent Daniel Webster by 69%!!**

Thanks to you and thousands of other patriots, **we crushed it!**

But this is no time to let up! With the reports coming out, the Republican AND Democrat Establishments are freaking out and you know they’re going to pull out all the stops to make sure I don’t unseat Webster and make it to Congress.

[**Will you donate right now?**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/YTPD892aCBXgT3xuVfcELapw/PJO5NsKoAwQoUF1YjyLb2g)

This is OUR shot to wake the GOP up and make it known that we won’t stand for Republicans who do nothing but make excuses and miss votes!

It’s OUR opportunity to take the fight to the Democrats and stop the rapid slide into communism that we’re seeing right now!

That’s why I need to know that you’re all in with me. [**Donate now to help the momentum build so we can win this!**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/YTPD892aCBXgT3xuVfcELapw/PJO5NsKoAwQoUF1YjyLb2g)

We didn’t just outraise Webster, we made him struggle!

Webster brought in just $63k for the quarter, but he spent $53k! Without PAC donations from Exxon, Big Sugar, wealthy Aircraft owners and FedEx (yeah, even FedEx donated to him), Webster’s campaign would have been in the red!

Do-Nothing Dan’s campaign POURED money into fundraising and took a loss on it!

My fundraising experts tell me that it’s clear as day that Webster has no grassroots support AT ALL, and he certainly doesn’t have you, Patriot!

And if he’s LOOSING money trying to raise money right now, then there is no way he’ll be able to catch up with us . . . **as long as we don’t give up!**

[**Are you in?**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/YTPD892aCBXgT3xuVfcELapw/PJO5NsKoAwQoUF1YjyLb2g)

[**Donate now, and let’s SHOCK the Good Ol' Boy Republican Establishment**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/YTPD892aCBXgT3xuVfcELapw/PJO5NsKoAwQoUF1YjyLb2g) that’s scared to death of me . . . and let’s watch Pelosi, AOC, Ilhan and the rest of the “Squad” shake in their heels as I get sworn in!

Thanks again for all that you do. THANK YOU!!

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

[Web Version](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/w/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/0zt892892sGgF1vXY892mEa9qbyQ/PJO5NsKoAwQoUF1YjyLb2g)
