name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Here's what President Trump said.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
You won't believe this |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a8e3aa5264&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | **_“He is tough as hell!” – President Trump_**
Dear ,

I am incredibly grateful that I was invited by President Trump to speak at his Des Moines, Iowa “Save America” rally. It was amazing to be able to speak to so many people about the good work that we are doing in Arizona to uncover the systematic fraud perpetrated by the Democrats in the 2020 election.

**I am more so honored that he publicly supported my campaign to run for Secretary for State, the results that I have fought for with my work around the country in Election Integrity, and his support for the next step of my fight: Auditing Pima County.**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7c828ef8bf&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| At the event, President Trump spoke of me, saying:

_“He is tough as hell, he’s incredible, and he is running for a certain position [Arizona Secretary of State] that’s going to be I think a very easy victory.”_

And of course none of this would happen without your support on the ground and from home. We would have no shot of making the strides that we did in uncovering fraud in Maricopa if it wasn’t for you.

And for that I am grateful, and I know the President is as well.

**In fact, he just showed his further support by mentioning and encouraging our fight for the Pima County Audit in his most recent press release!**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5e29307bca&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| This is huge. President Trump supports our patriotic movement to uncover fraud in Pima. **I have seen some of the data – and it already looks horrific.**

In case you weren’t able to hear my remarks at President Trump’s rally, here is a brief excerpt:

_That [Pima County] is the second most populous county in the state of Arizona, where we had a whistleblower who sent an email not just to the DOJ but to every single legislator saying, there’s 34,000 or 35,000 fictitious voters, and they’ve been inserted in system, and we’re going to never find them. Well, we believe we found them._

**Yes, you read me right. There was a whistleblower who revealed that there were 34,000 to 35,000 fictitious voters inserted into the system.**

This is just one of many reasons why our Nationwide Petition to Audit Pima County is gaining such momentum!

**We have the evidence of fraud. We have the President on our side. This grassroots movement has become a tidal wave of Patriotism. This is what we need to carry us to 2022 and beyond!**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2d4a4d7893&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| With President Trump’s endorsement and support of the work I am doing in Arizona: first in Maricopa, next in Pima County, and then as Arizona Secretary of State, nothing can stop us.

**[All I need is your continued support. ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=595e1ae28d&e=44b8c466b0) We are pushing as hard as we can to push the message of Election Integrity, but Big Tech is squashing and lying about the results of the Audit, Social Media is trying to silence us, and our opponents have mountains of cash. _[Can you help us continue to fight the good fight in Arizona with a donation today?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b78ce7b168&e=44b8c466b0)_**

[President Trump and I could not do this without you](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a491f94c95&e=44b8c466b0). This is why I am so grateful for your support. I take that seriously and I will continue to fight for you as you have for me.
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1800c0573e&e=44b8c466b0)
God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=096c573a4c&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, [please contribute whatever you can by the end of this month](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0b6c21fbfb&e=44b8c466b0).

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=4b35c3cdb0) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=4b35c3cdb0).
---

name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, Another busy week is in the books as Jane continues to prove why she is the grassroots, America First candidate for U.S. Senate. With the first forum with all major candidates in attendance now complete, Jane was able to make her strong case as the fighter Ohioans need in the U.S. Senate. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **Joe Biden's Policies Target and Harm Women** This week, Jane penned an op-ed for [Townhall.com](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=08c3597a49a44c31ba486cbb480d75f7&_e=b3pUWpyQv_7TwZEKvdyPPRVNlWU2tJONvxfOsYLHu6XjAh2PhHgxMxWZpOeVA6apxKd-6Ep2VzIi3iDcH91388lViDyDhvXCBynjHI8UrnVCmzXXfjDzHpNsMJVzyDsU8v8QXemcBkoza-kuhMZhyQZSizCnpzvylQ2XouR0xzUmJKKlGIFI1zGLjSSl4uyHvESIgHZa1l4P7v06vX1DxdfHNMhpNga-lu1e0h5jhT87AcRtV8O4w__yCRj-MGB31XbUPsAGAzuqmt9QrqBSr7KlrdNR2feyRE7rgl6D5mRT8PYfmCKYdI17zelZzHNon8k5tgNhho561-YdVhGCcY2HMiu-_ewqQXXNtMHARhh3FN-fyNNgZXVA8vxZD9E7) discussing Joe Biden and the Left’s disastrous policies and their effect on women in the workplace, at home, and the very definition of women. "Joe Biden and his administration are targeting women – targeting women in the workforce, targeting women standing up for their children, and targeting women by our very biological definition. As the first female Chair of the Ohio Republican Party, and currently, as a candidate running to be the first female Senator from Ohio, I have watched with dismay as Joe Biden’s destructive policies have reversed the incredible progress women made under President Trump and conservative policies. More importantly, as a mom, I am deeply concerned for the world we are leaving our daughters, sisters, friends and neighbors under Democrat policies, and it’s a huge reason why I’m in this fight to take our country back. While President Trump’s economy lifted up women with historic employment levels, Joe Biden’s economy is leaving women behind.” Read the full piece [here](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=08c3597a49a44c31ba486cbb480d75f7&_e=b3pUWpyQv_7TwZEKvdyPPRVNlWU2tJONvxfOsYLHu6XjAh2PhHgxMxWZpOeVA6apxKd-6Ep2VzIi3iDcH91388lViDyDhvXCBynjHI8UrnVCmzXXfjDzHpNsMJVzyDsU8v8QXemcBkoza-kuhMZhyR5CluCMYtmeCZGQgW_QZXhSR3G4nWChPw6y3qUQobWNnaTutg7z66yy2HpvOC_UTJ0dzpVkvuU97dca8W_m-yXcr7pNTX1lKzReG9W2GMNlChU1fdKk6lPufYydfP8fryPomqbSPA3bSPQO1an78c5Dob4dgEVVEH6ZgBwPTOBZmfcr0oyO6IlFAcHFwN7ax5Jj4OQnBtMZDjTFY4dFNnUzPXUwDgn2KT_yvlHV2lTr). **From The Trail** On Sunday, Jane was honored to join the Sikh Society of Cleveland in Bedford. Jane knows that Ohio’s next Senator needs to listen and understand all of Ohio’s communities and that’s exactly what she’ll do. On Monday, our fantastic team of interns and volunteers represented Jane in Cleveland for their Columbus Day parade in Little Italy. It is a great tradition and celebration of Italian American heritage, and we were happy we could be there! On Wednesday, Jane traveled to Ada for the Hardin County Republican Party Colonels Club Dinner. It was great to be with our friend and county chairman Rob Radway and to meet so many great Patriots from Hardin County. **In First Ohio GOP Senate Forum, Jane Timken Proves She's the America First Fighter Ohioans Need in Washington** The first Ohio GOP Senate Forum was held on Thursday evening in Darke County and Jane once again proved why she is the grassroots, America Fist fighter Ohioans need in the U.S. Senate. With an army of supporters in the audience, Jane laid out her vision for the U.S. Senate. It’s past time we stop Washington’s runaway spending, secure our Southern border, train our workforce, and protect our God-given Constitutional rights and that’s exactly what Jane laid out at this forum. But don’t just take my word for it. Preble County GOP Chairman David Haber had this to say of Jane’s performance: “Tonight, Jane Timken clearly proved that she is the fighter Ohioans need in the U.S. Senate. Jane isn't just talk - she's about action. She's fought for the America First agenda, she's supported strong conservative policies, and she's delivered for Ohio. Jane knows this race is about Ohio and she will take that Ohio-focus to Washington where she'll deliver for us again." I hope everyone has a great weekend. Sincerely, Rob Secaur Campaign Manager Jane Timken for Ohio Don't want to receive our emails anymore? [Unsubscribe](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_s=08c3597a49a44c31ba486cbb480d75f7&_t=JWyZ95T8G1oYoptYAVFwBEIAVEBO8H8uQXfU39y40cBOFcGGvf714gzwF2SbGMS5SmyZ2J7It5AkP1JqpRuk-NehCyT9QblcXHuRHMvnVQEMHzf_3D-J4l3PNt1S2J1UpYXpqUwh8o5rrbmeWWINRQfEGC-E7U8dpV7wUlZ-JFk%3D) | | [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=08c3597a49a44c31ba486cbb480d75f7&_e=b3pUWpyQv_7TwZEKvdyPPTLaK6yGRJOyv96q4rL7aoLMYdPOEy0uy8Fa2S2Z1V9CxQaMjw0atpEziErJyaoWR0L_Nb9RAnOZMIo7vCJedFGjIhvMG_e-6kfphsei1D_69zjZcZhCpdUfZQUdO4UAEZaKncejHgTih6JKIaB1aysPeGMVBqo_e0sp-XylMweGIdqld7qQ3wf9kePOfC5YBrm3nNulgvhsLV04KM-AfJLKJDmnVBXujsUcJMuSsg6xYorzZfzQbfE8uAuZFNvnzocGsfheHrOvL7LRnonUBHo%3D) | [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=08c3597a49a44c31ba486cbb480d75f7&_e=s8Pp5qjkdjj6Y5bGC-i4yT4q_bS0uSFj7i6gYupEbl0usKBr7w5iYxM7ZAq1Lh91zjP27LEXTY5zhIQD6zBJUQp1hFD6NNxQ4vvFT_UEzHaR3aiPnQY8M4Pezx_Oo9uAqee8n-UWnk4hvuNZUpyqmkGpHezHA82FxCEsvyPkBnqfEgNWlR8onAp_YMjeeGcPw_vL4QlIcUPGjcO-PZL_HKfsrI7LN1VStXe1Lu6wt6ji9P9NWdhcprCFM1mZeIEKBAVy_ZXa3WNhcsrA80D32A%3D%3D)

| | Derek,

In August, National Republicans announced they were pouring millions into Virginia to fund a massive field operation for Glenn Youngkin.

Well, I just got out of a meeting with my team and we’re seeing just how big of an impact that investment is having.

**_Derek, Youngkin climbed in the polls. Then the experts at The Cook Political Report moved the race to a toss-up. And right now? Republican enthusiasm is at an all time HIGH._**

That’s really bad news because it’s already October, and we have under a month to turn things around.

Here’s the good news: we have a plan.

[**We need to continue to build our historic grassroots field operation, but — we can’t run it if we don’t have the funds. clean_body: (but I have good news too) | | | = | | Derek, In August, National Republicans announced they were pouring millions into Virginia to fund a massive field operation for Glenn Youngkin. Well, I just got out of a meeting with my team and we’re seeing just how big of an impact that investment is having. Derek, Youngkin climbed in the polls. Then the experts at The Cook Political Report moved the race to a toss-up. And right now? Republican enthusiasm is at an all time HIGH. That’s really bad news because it’s already October, and we have under a month to turn things around. Here’s the good news: we have a plan. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = The truth is, in a race this close, money makes a big difference when it comes to turnout. With more resources, we can send teams of organizers to every single corner of Virginia , get mailers in every single Virginia mailbox , and build a massive turnout operation so every voter knows how, when, and where to vote. Glenn Youngkin has already committed to spending $75 million of his own money, now he has the financial backing of the national Republican Party too. If we’re going to match their turnout operation, I’m going to need your help right now. = Thanks for being on my team, Terry McAuliffe =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. name: Team Fetterman
subject: re: running out of time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Tick tock...
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211015-3030-header&t=1&akid=3030%2E434096%2Ee6KMS5)
Peter,
We're now just a few hours away from our mid-month October deadline, so we wanted to send you *one final email* asking you to please [** _kick in your first-ever $5 or anything you can before the clock strikes midnight._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33028?refcode=em20211015-3030&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3030%2E434096%2Ee6KMS5)
**First, we want to make it crystal clear why your online donation before this deadline means so much:**
What makes our movement to elect John Fetterman so damn strong is the sheer number of grassroots donors from every corner of Pennsylvania who chipped in to build this campaign early on. Already, we’ve received donations from all 67 counties in Pennsylvania, _and more than 72% of counties across the country._ Every county, every vote — that's how we win this.
**So far, 466 people from Monroe County have chipped in directly to help grow our campaign and build the movement it will take to elect John.** If you're able to grow this number by making your first contribution before tonight's mid-month deadline, it will make a huge impact on work we can do in the months to come. [** _Can you make your first $5 donation tonight before this critical deadline?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33028?refcode=em20211015-3030&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3030%2E434096%2Ee6KMS5)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33028?refcode=em20211015-3030&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=3030%2E434096%2Ee6KMS5)**
Look, it's not lost on our team that we come to you often to ask for your support on behalf of John, Gisele, and the entire Fetterman campaign team.
But the reality is this: **The number one reason that John Fetterman has emerged as the clear Democratic front-runner in this race to flip this open PA Senate seat is _because of you, Peter._** It's because of the folks on this grassroots team who've chipped in with amounts big or small whenever possible. And it's because of people who have invested in the long-term success of this campaign by owning a piece of this campaign to turn Pennsylvania blue.
[**_With that in mind, will you please donate for the first time ever ahead of tonight's mid-month deadline coming up in a few hours? We'd love to add your donation from Monroe County to the books tonight._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33028?refcode=em20211015-3030&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=25&akid=3030%2E434096%2Ee6KMS5)
Thank you for all you do,
— All of us at Team Fetterman HQ
P.S. Consistently hitting our goals ahead of big milestones like tonight is the only way we'll be able to stand up a statewide organizing program, hold events across our Commonwealth, and build the size and staying-power of our movement to elect John Fetterman. [** _Will you kick in $5 or more right now if your budget allows? Thank you in advance._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33028?refcode=em20211015-3030&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=26&akid=3030%2E434096%2Ee6KMS5) 🙏

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211015-3030-footer&t=27&refcode2=3030_434096_e6KMS5&akid=3030%2E434096%2Ee6KMS5)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=28&akid=3030%2E434096%2Ee6KMS5)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=3030%2E434096%2Ee6KMS5)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Fellow patriot,

Democrats love to virtue signal non-stop, and cancel anyone who disagrees with them. For a long time, it worked.

But now, conservatives know the Left’s game, and how to beat it. The key is to be PROUD of our beliefs, ignore the liberal attacks, and tell everyday working-class Americans what we believe -- and how our principles make their lives better.

Now, we’re seeing Republicans of all stripes filing to run for office, saying what’s on their mind, and defending our shared beliefs.

Let me be clear: The Republican Party welcomes anyone who shares our values. My friend Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez knows that, too. Last year, **Monica fell short just 6,588 votes from winning a seat in Congress that has been held by Democrats for over 100 years**. Had she been successful, Monica would have been the first Latina Republican ever elected to Congress from South Texas.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9b86cb0b70924335a7cca85b9f5f22fa&_e=NluslyvM0dKtT8cTFaNb3lqwRU5SjmF9n8RY7dB5EA6k7iSJlgKpfsvxvzvp0XcNP9_R9teRw1liYGIXbkHnwdFxgVpiXA0Nml-xZlQ0bRpkvboPfLCVgw65ifDhARUexfVHF1hrg0DkX4WXUG9TuCWGUOaeP4u7QqMmdZPTeOqJ1uOFoWHnxWNO2jrLjgIKaUqjjx7QxP8m0dqsdR34riuHEn_Lqes1CruojqnUbz8RKcEuh7_j-veE3n7zAFz99pS8sM4wcoERsquBm6H7iCfPLShgKeHnY34dbkCm6q4GUT1uhHbLG0XaSTQ3_foRTI19S59GQ_nLqhUiwcNnZDikYwqKjSwI1Xd7F6iIH1sCYuctWqyXbsihgZQ-cPXHDSVwwTphFR5nP0DTG7gmTdefJ8ECXT40mJbiCJE4SW735wrIt__Ca82ZyurRZsGTFKps_SrWCr7OMH2YdJTw2OEF4Eb7xYXXwb-O_ky6XTkAmkTEmGN0jnQLixANlb30)

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=448d0646549d4b85902d2b3145a73a6b&_e=0N0OZz6MYYYYMedc2uGzDc9KLvhkByJKOgPhfls22RInqta3ZkNfz4Q7BFu6pqzBF1uDBDwhGppnv66A5X1XbLe-145uLLRuERdgTvlsqV_DuWGfWjjZkilFMTddMDVtHLQMV_Pbbyz1oD0GMnIhVlHnSR9yL5HgemSuZECqk3wGO7601jmOZuiRa2oeHEgWaKUHtDYJnp_QlsNVvKbH6t1YuSdRWCW-zc_xu8--KEweMwoRR3XmZ4FCAOFnZuBTYqJx3xd-GxC-SHZPknbu5yeQF6mPc7AbGwsiVVl2R9hMEvpTiPyvm9656tw6EEG6zHJfKeLtZzGkJCwVOsotpg%3D%3D)
When liberals [called](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=448d0646549d4b85902d2b3145a73a6b&_e=0N0OZz6MYYYYMedc2uGzDc9KLvhkByJKOgPhfls22RInqta3ZkNfz4Q7BFu6pqzBF1uDBDwhGppnv66A5X1XbLe-145uLLRuERdgTvlsqV-0WBpXg-M1AKj1pjSBiWy6p7pyI7h2GrlCbxmeiQ6Bu8Xu8lxLMkGedH6wbi4OnP7_7r2qwOrHB6_Jr-Ri0m20LcSBScTr9MJ8CR0gg83Inc5K2TqygsMxnUfEWvP-XigM2gML7UrZkL7wpEQpEPNoyRijYov4_F08VWZ-baefwXS8qoMiSC7gU2QngKSQKrUJg6cxxQgT5boW4Wx-JHTXdv4q5feuaKvSWQvg1mQe6Q%3D%3D) to defund the police, conservatives knew what would happen. Did liberals listen? Of course not. Over the past year and a half, we’ve witnessed the obvious and devastating consequences of the left’s war on law enforcement: An [outbreak](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=448d0646549d4b85902d2b3145a73a6b&_e=0N0OZz6MYYYYMedc2uGzDZi2objpJKsDfZ-vv_bLZvQn2DVs68G8DhQ2j2Uz0HC4DirLfOXAllIkRf12G04-PLbvnR9jcZm0Lgmhh_46Pq3Vb5O5sv_rduowj0MyiB8zF4rCiGV6N3C-6uEPADf589orqbfYlkrLk3aUJIaM8_PE1FUg_ed73tVFuR1vhAIZrCXP364kNWRf6Fthi4NMzI2V0W-eY_aNVyitrkkWCL-F-JEB06I4-uE-M27soAmlaxsgOVbIRyByxu1VHaoiYnyMrmNBDho3A0Flhhg8lXmp1GJQ_o40gwXwspeOeWF6iFwSQ76Db-EOurQHp3O8ew%3D%3D) in violence and crime in our nation’s cities.

[Chicago](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=448d0646549d4b85902d2b3145a73a6b&_e=0N0OZz6MYYYYMedc2uGzDSVp9PpwuDzz0EPsLhX6L5-VR2UwS1XBvtUugZQWvqNsM4tIvztH8kc3i_uexDvt5ybxzEZYEdZ2aS48SCAbb0wdZ5QpKDtWs4F7JdxBiEN7Q0I1-gASSsk7ky0xgZO19xEj-a1Rd8vP8bCd0qoZf31kCXaOF4nZ_S2_539U0o-11okVXUxWxDt19vW9OdF4vLg1y4Xb5E9qFdI3cXyPXdxSEj18HKzZ-KFTgMaDF7K0-THK9lBmBJp1f1LEaSmGN27GxOfOJMOwyILgcL48AEUIPV2-MJ3AuMJu0AW7WvtXyenFQQJ9MTht7a1vIGExmg%3D%3D). [Minneapolis](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=448d0646549d4b85902d2b3145a73a6b&_e=0N0OZz6MYYYYMedc2uGzDUZbJ3zAcMMLhXgcll4kecPl4x5g7-p9fFWdqZFH0_bI4lXDUwxojiKw-B2TruWTVR5l0PPl-9bZeTPhL_Ty5DLgcZ1VH0VETmdTadw4HKdTTgA1CIA0pojDP-jGXrPHvkjmuxAIwDFeNJ16rUoV_ksV71caOGxisusvBHMe1MmiLuFjWKIs3Qx_Yj7kQcPbyvx5IEoUKhOHuJDKFbt0kQJDMAMs3SHpX05LVoNyytql1_gWoHYsE_JUEAbfkqPQeBGfFA8jfXpQoIzDKePytcoSPGrEhcQGgA3rtBkF8Vdu-qJ280OBZFyAWY8gM4gA-bZ_f919neUnvUX7lldeyFhSojo7q5Hag9eUFlWWZIezjwAim4g3xGlGe35-rEiI4A%3D%3D). [St. Louis](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=448d0646549d4b85902d2b3145a73a6b&_e=0N0OZz6MYYYYMedc2uGzDV1YoO_H7edD8il4k38hJXnbofD51DTAOfSAinNvPRXrq4DtKk3jJg4oWLM5LWxMQ3ExQl08LWzeE-Zvh-atila6fSMge_67rJalCuQfpQaHT8-ihduXzKu4S1j-_m3dWmVgAGxo3ZrgCZxzGxThd1uCP5Stm3cwYqdOZHu_QaZLoeFu6oYG8J7mKW4BjyFtVQ4r_xhf3zQnV99SXfU7RUNotPbrVVdsE3K1dz7Gcbsh2UrpBDq4ovZNzt-AeH7TdxSo2UHO3Nh7T0MoMWS0ZHEBvdsLjRzDVHan2lGZXmpIJXGWgcm-qKqubk5UZuZ7Ybt70DCMrXaqc_1cXZiVF_BefWOWrG7_vuBNMNjY4L29btvH8FJLR1ORrE-0rJblnQ%3D%3D). The [year-to-year increase](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=448d0646549d4b85902d2b3145a73a6b&_e=0N0OZz6MYYYYMedc2uGzDZaIJCBhEyuNQuttvK7yYy7SOeG5agsgf7LAYr0qpMSExAUm2FOFMXkRygAUhRe3vQOlaCtZIN6IXC1Cc2wfG0oziRsc6sHb9kBUxDuaNvrqjnbELBaxoRRzDhR3SToXFv8EWG28uhijPmzUQYAi0yYmDCfNrKSAfosNrH0MLqsg0TQIwzLtX4NcIGZ8s8Ogzh1Xh7tgQBS8oowVt0sucZ5YCbyBIf_ax526vxpkpz9Br6kYJAiEWarfXTCJzJD307yVH-gZG_DWWZa0n1eJ5-1Z-RWCeRUI3mhKJFBDodX8) in murders from 2019 to 2020 was the largest since 1960.

At the same time, our [police forces were gutted](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=448d0646549d4b85902d2b3145a73a6b&_e=0N0OZz6MYYYYMedc2uGzDbR19-yAL8hlCt-FI-FAjqo_7tWi1PAm9LtHFkeVne9kTDwq1q_Exkiwqm2rzHRyco6Q3nuQ83V9OpoExsj1oUTV08U2oIIC7mKP628KIuGDFqDiTAwGInQHrigsePiN5_O1tA_C6TVJo4rzUPX-iOssUxaUwryPDs4XEfaYe-aHpbuRg5DAJaW0i4NrJCc7uRvE63OkmsoqmFr-lN499G6Eyy0NnEn67cMNetY_2Sn6GQtT0fRpsiiaGKLyfrW9fksTKOwKlWZ5aNO5LFYjKGRL-XluZutkCU11EGk-v4LldJ-nqIAu2sTTnDn9P9E6BlNyszhzt5xAxsk5j1h7GWA%3D) due to reduced funding, destroyed morale, and mass resignations and retirements.

Now, cities are desperately trying to undo the mess they created by [refunding and restaffing police departments](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=448d0646549d4b85902d2b3145a73a6b&_e=0N0OZz6MYYYYMedc2uGzDZaIJCBhEyuNQuttvK7yYy7q0bpN-FPLUzkLVN9BVsrlGn4Lu7VUrAuVduwWo5urUwEOnEk15VTwqk5ywr3lSiDNpvSITQ3OUGBFttnF1APiiEb0cwHZFlrt8j2RMV-ba1PsuZRIEa5A-thFKHiHleEnauohcEakEFig4B_KPetcqJL3lhKbiPhIyHb-y1H3smbb-q8BTQXcGKQwfe3xYGIgl8SItjpNnbV3T01Ir1NJRMKok1aAxDkpbjDWTBdLWlTgVcE6V1e1gkjfay6Jr-HQMcIvfx6OytgRJu6XBxaK). Dallas is hiring 250 police officers to fill the void. Burlington, Vermont is offering officers $10,000 bonuses to stay on the force. Austin increased its police budget from its lowest ever to its highest ever.

Imagine the lives that could have been saved and chaos that could have been avoided if cities had resisted the dangerous calls from radical leftists in the first place.

Say it ain’t so! A Knoxville classic has [closed its doors until further notice](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=448d0646549d4b85902d2b3145a73a6b&_e=0N0OZz6MYYYYMedc2uGzDUXtoCV7NILchR7AMzELHCDiZnwN7n1Sk1yU3-a4f6pU9GyVbBf6BplcYFT6gK5WQ1H4gCjNrnKTff0LF8sw97sc0xkQ9FUKXN4Ie-3KeRer5w0oQMZDdpu7uucREHdkjhE8qfNfes22g1bOxd7yH2N0ITTlabQdTZ2KHJFdX6xmg5wRiCLWN8ksdaCFfh8ecU1jZZgGyUs3oKM21kxt_X6i_ZSOr6MDFoES2K7_ckSRCxzpwikKk-Brfa-DR1oEFL2mvqEmCsr-a0ndug2FFD5Z8MuAcU-jff9PRmqjOok95hP19y2wPC43uB906vcLJdMnOakLOsig9-CMAFhvOMk%3D) due to COVID-19. Wright’s Cafeteria is a staple to many Tennesseans and one of the oldest restaurants in Knoxville. A personal favorite of mine, I will miss the homestyle cooking and seeing good friends.

I am looking forward to Wright’s being open once again and will definitely celebrate with some fresh baked pie when it does.

Did liberals listen? Of course not. Over the past year and a half, we’ve witnessed the obvious and devastating consequences of the left’s war on law enforcement: An in violence and crime in our nation’s cities. . . . The in murders from 2019 to 2020 was the largest since 1960. At the same time, our due to reduced funding, destroyed morale, and mass resignations and retirements. Now, cities are desperately trying to undo the mess they created by . Dallas is hiring 250 police officers to fill the void. Burlington, Vermont is offering officers $10,000 bonuses to stay on the force. Austin increased its police budget from its lowest ever to its highest ever. Imagine the lives that could have been saved and chaos that could have been avoided if cities had resisted the dangerous calls from radical leftists in the first place. | COVID Shuts Down Another Beloved Business 😷 Say it ain’t so! A Knoxville classic has due to COVID-19. Wright’s Cafeteria is a staple to many Tennesseans and one of the oldest restaurants in Knoxville. A personal favorite of mine, I will miss the homestyle cooking and seeing good friends. body:
I'm the only candidate that can beat Mark Kelly | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=14ca746f832b4c30847a4e14ab74e0d2&_e=_DBv8POCbsxZ5UxdfnkAJirnVV2zzQSg7unty0_wFqtD4oOOwvfzSa1bvwSqqOc1bXMrO90Sj-HbqvrQVq10SCZweYEJZDarJdB8__5hVyNFF2-AtExccrRTjaQJ8Y9pfRU8G_q61vTc-XXVWs8Yxvqj9-UZw1R5AYNGzCoqm87mHjZAAlMIknfB4CYkD6Gro1aKdQ-6MchVOfxhGr1n00sCKaL92WtuoaZ1uNIOlLHwsfHIvx_9lBmVeKmC89bf13NpNdPx433qXATgtuy82lzqXflr0yfHKfVQe6MWmLE7BXptF7v5ET0-VxlMmdw8rH-vGl1Vo_B9ahpNm4goa-D6IYX9Vwv_nB9TRcWhfg2x0ab8pYQ_VzM2AfbZS8dJjAhGxPewyTd9iCIfAg3SzpSgC2lw9Ylkftn4hMTx9EQMEK0lexRwW2i33xBar27IlKgXUsE9u4qlYvQKcSa9KXbWi4hTaDik6yOMdIk-UmE%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

Mark Kelly just released his latest fundraising numbers, and he raised nearly $8 million last quarter. **I would be impressed by that number if I didn't already know it came from national Democrats and dark money allies.**

Meanwhile, our campaign, _backed by small donors, Arizonans, and grassroots activists,_**exceeded our goal for the third quarter and outraised every one of my Republican opponents.**

**I'm the only Republican that can beat Mark Kelly.** I raised over $1 million in the third quarter, that's more than double what any of my Republican opponents raised in their respective first quarters

**After seeing these fundraising results, I'm confident that I will be the one defeating Mark Kelly in 2022.**

[**To do that, our campaign is going to have to raise over $100 million. I need your support ASAP. Will you pitch in to help us win?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=14ca746f832b4c30847a4e14ab74e0d2&_e=_DBv8POCbsxZ5UxdfnkAJirnVV2zzQSg7unty0_wFqtD4oOOwvfzSa1bvwSqqOc1bXMrO90Sj-HbqvrQVq10SCZweYEJZDarJdB8__5hVyNFF2-AtExccrRTjaQJ8Y9pfRU8G_q61vTc-XXVWs8Yxvqj9-UZw1R5AYNGzCoqm87mHjZAAlMIknfB4CYkD6Gro1aKdQ-6MchVOfxhGr1n00sCKaL92WtuoaZ1uNIOlLHwsfHIvx_9lBmVeKmC89bf13NpNdPx433qXATgtuy82ldwOxHVYuIJBTDwrIonJY_NiRL-loEqIbuYPTw7Xx8mR-keDbuk5IIPMXgDMmG9gjA41h-3uZUvSQOer5c2uR8z7Gqf3vYekJHlbgiVC9RNFYhA8Ne1F05hCm7qAcMDDeesDltAON1AdZ9be7ncslAyj_fPoIEeERti--OWZGVc7g-OcZHGfUJ3G2Lm5eAuxPTf9HYLRHmjESdkD3QXidI%3D)

[** ****TAKE BACK ARIZONA ➞ **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=14ca746f832b4c30847a4e14ab74e0d2&_e=_DBv8POCbsxZ5UxdfnkAJirnVV2zzQSg7unty0_wFqtD4oOOwvfzSa1bvwSqqOc1bXMrO90Sj-HbqvrQVq10SCZweYEJZDarJdB8__5hVyNFF2-AtExccrRTjaQJ8Y9pfRU8G_q61vTc-XXVWs8Yxvqj9-UZw1R5AYNGzCoqm87mHjZAAlMIknfB4CYkD6Gro1aKdQ-6MchVOfxhGr1n00sCKaL92WtuoaZ1uNIOlLHwsfHIvx_9lBmVeKmC89bf13NpNdPx433qXATgtuy82qZZGbZp1XLytjQdkvmUjoh00jNcivXL9cuznLNg43cQrcOkPRSnJLnzpPiYCsp5Zh46U8GAHLw8CTcYdpy05VOGVOGpi3Mp6UXnyJ3aIGwJJ4f7Wg23_9BrOWQFQvCt6ngzo30kLwjtfeFCt4w4NSNkhDDjxcomH-3Jrzw2AvPcZRS-rbOZAV866qDAXGVHOxCrb7QxDhp7G_xIlAGSmX0%3D)
Kelly is lining his war chest with liberal dollars because he knows he's in trouble come 2022. **Unlike in 2020, he has a record to defend, and he's shown that he cares more about the opinion of Chuck Schumer than his own constituents in Arizona.**

[**Our campaign is off to a fantastic start, and we're going to keep shattering our goals. ButFellow Conservative- we need to pick up the pace if we want to beat Mark Kelly.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=14ca746f832b4c30847a4e14ab74e0d2&_e=_DBv8POCbsxZ5UxdfnkAJirnVV2zzQSg7unty0_wFqtD4oOOwvfzSa1bvwSqqOc1bXMrO90Sj-HbqvrQVq10SCZweYEJZDarJdB8__5hVyNFF2-AtExccrRTjaQJ8Y9pfRU8G_q61vTc-XXVWs8Yxvqj9-UZw1R5AYNGzCoqm87mHjZAAlMIknfB4CYkD6Gro1aKdQ-6MchVOfxhGr1n00sCKaL92WtuoaZ1uNIOlLHwsfHIvx_9lBmVeKmC89bf13NpNdPx433qXATgtuy82kiHCTF6Tq5nLoa4ESQh7336tTWdfgI6OGs_dWdVbQPmEyDBXXn2PCVxU4jtCnRX7VWSg5OnQN-XvHjBiK8DJrjVzS_IECMt-px1yhk4GLFefPV51SdxFKKFkAn81gYBSUcfG5QF6w3hea0Sped-5_8Sbc3V9mHWTC0TVdJtbd7_7PpAkdp_3SCqZ1tbFCHg6TdBo8GYnFoWD-ih42Ejc9g%3D)

We can't take back the Senate if we don't take back Arizona, [**so please chip in today to help us make that a reality.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=14ca746f832b4c30847a4e14ab74e0d2&_e=_DBv8POCbsxZ5UxdfnkAJirnVV2zzQSg7unty0_wFqtD4oOOwvfzSa1bvwSqqOc1bXMrO90Sj-HbqvrQVq10SCZweYEJZDarJdB8__5hVyNFF2-AtExccrRTjaQJ8Y9pfRU8G_q61vTc-XXVWs8Yxvqj9-UZw1R5AYNGzCoqm87mHjZAAlMIknfB4CYkD6Gro1aKdQ-6MchVOfxhGr1n00sCKaL92WtuoaZ1uNIOlLHwsfHIvx_9lBmVeKmC89bf13NpNdPx433qXATgtuy82jcSe16B5EvSW-ZLOxqJvtaLO5IaS4GDF9SCwZ7CXf5Mq4N6LvA_ZatBIrtI4DOTERjg3RePDLQzOIgLLd_H_rN-UAgmGu3QTMm-UTajmfSSGeE2rJuvCKwib1tI_Ze8UIOF1aKfEg0XMAqbLjekUNAoQ-9jVFBsriKmxRijWPDPfodU51cg83qFBu106x77V2zR7BzeRBNcJHD-2AsYYEk%3D)
Thank you,

Blake Masters
Republican for U.S. Senate, Arizona

P.S. I'm running against one of the Democrat's top fundraisers. In 2020, he raised close to $100 million. [**We need your support to keep up with his numbers. Can you chip in $5, $10, $20, or whatever you can give today to help me take back Arizona?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=14ca746f832b4c30847a4e14ab74e0d2&_e=_DBv8POCbsxZ5UxdfnkAJirnVV2zzQSg7unty0_wFqtD4oOOwvfzSa1bvwSqqOc1bXMrO90Sj-HbqvrQVq10SCZweYEJZDarJdB8__5hVyNFF2-AtExccrRTjaQJ8Y9pfRU8G_q61vTc-XXVWs8Yxvqj9-UZw1R5AYNGzCoqm87mHjZAAlMIknfB4CYkD6Gro1aKdQ-6MchVOfxhGr1n00sCKaL92WtuoaZ1uNIOlLHwsfHIvx_9lBmVeKmC89bf13NpNdPx433qXATgtuy82rUh_I-lRB104xXPTT6jqxZ6jBA1YhODCGqvxQWt4LcDZc12Fgp63xBVksY3tSR4m8bm96FM154xzrLYb7kgGF5GajFW5YPJw1AciiHOb7BpmIEHm9goiuFXJ4of5GJ-JEatELqB2fsYNhTZGoJgaQ9j2vaynfwJtk7GXKWkdK_rPwJMYJWxJenbgTn-bYiolDFt2WORnUYzQB2-M1820Bs%3D)

[** ****DONATE TODAY ➞ **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=14ca746f832b4c30847a4e14ab74e0d2&_e=_DBv8POCbsxZ5UxdfnkAJirnVV2zzQSg7unty0_wFqtD4oOOwvfzSa1bvwSqqOc1bXMrO90Sj-HbqvrQVq10SCZweYEJZDarJdB8__5hVyNFF2-AtExccrRTjaQJ8Y9pfRU8G_q61vTc-XXVWs8Yxvqj9-UZw1R5AYNGzCoqm87mHjZAAlMIknfB4CYkD6Gro1aKdQ-6MchVOfxhGr1n00sCKaL92WtuoaZ1uNIOlLHwsfHIvx_9lBmVeKmC89bf13NpNdPx433qXATgtuy82nfoJAIF7C3qOZfZerpUPMIG2a73mj_Fxl4JARQ7pQs0iazj36jrAIOfO_YRiuq4xFnpBTMLFB6OhNpq_anEPAtGHXt5mH3vHkvPk9QtVlERlmGXACeCNUfOnNu5J-ZD5QrOIXFnyR_aH1nnaFl5lnX5KCFEMtfUfX_Jk_x_2ZByQUV--kTAlFgew2fKuXozv9sIoQCqzZYtouHtjoOEGwg%3D)

name: Chairman Stephen Stepanek
subject: Your Weekly New Hampshire Republican Newsletter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
Special Elections, Fall Festivities, & Volunteer Opportunities and MORE!

| | | | |
---
| | | [ ](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fnhrepublicanparty/1/0100017c86014970-76a1b1d7-5c2e-424c-a828-c5b939ba3405-000000/jOB1mrun2eyDGsCmDJftMNxy7cM=240) | [ ](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FNHGOP/1/0100017c86014970-76a1b1d7-5c2e-424c-a828-c5b939ba3405-000000/cBrKfWPGkaQPwhMFC-WTXBpN4a4=240) | [ ](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Finstagram.com%2Fnh_gop/1/0100017c86014970-76a1b1d7-5c2e-424c-a828-c5b939ba3405-000000/Qhucu9lr7eWYsxa4lkEFuGMM5FQ=240) | [ ](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fchannel%2FUCeVTFDHmk8hEwVsuHD2lAFg/1/0100017c86014970-76a1b1d7-5c2e-424c-a828-c5b939ba3405-000000/vbwBSKOV4SZ8O-5whf4sMISEszg=240) | [ ](https://)
---|---|---|---|---
| **Weekly Newsletter ******
---
_**Note from Chairman Stepanek **_**_Weekly Governor's Glance _****_Upcoming Events _****_House Republican Update _****_Senate Republican Update _****_Republican Spotlight_**** _Noteworthy News_**** _NHGOP Tweets _
****NH Federation of Republican Women****NH Young Republicans****NH Federation of College Republicans**** **
---
|
---
| **Derek,****

****I hope everyone has had a chance to enjoy the beautiful fall foliage that’s arrived in the Granite State. It’s during these autumn months that folks from around the country come to explore the stunning landscapes New Hampshire has to offer, and aren’t we blessed to call this state home?****

But New Hampshire is much more than a pretty place to live, it holds key values that make the “Live free or Die” state so special. We should all recognize the value in this sentiment, and understand the importance of ensuring that the integrity of these values is maintained. How so? Through electing Republican leadership.

We have multiple campaigns happening right now across the state, and it’s without a doubt necessary that we all pitch in to the best of our ability. We have a special election in Cheshire County with candidate **[**Rita Mattson**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.ritamattson.com/1/0100017c86014970-76a1b1d7-5c2e-424c-a828-c5b939ba3405-000000/pRZorgG11cg6yTQLRu9sSBNQdL4=240)******. On top of this we have Mayoral races across the state:**[**Victoria Sullivan**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.victoriasullivanformayor.com/1/0100017c86014970-76a1b1d7-5c2e-424c-a828-c5b939ba3405-000000/4-aUHcEQSZiPKhbYi82_aqfeJSA=240)**for Manchester,**[**Paul Callaghan**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fpaulcallaghanformayor/1/0100017c86014970-76a1b1d7-5c2e-424c-a828-c5b939ba3405-000000/jbGv7rnhniOasEDzyZmxgbzapzY=240)**for Rochester,**[**George Hansel **](http://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/http:%2F%2Fgeorgehansel.com/1/0100017c86014970-76a1b1d7-5c2e-424c-a828-c5b939ba3405-000000/jMAw9krk23INckvluaMjoPGoXcM=240)**for Keene,**[**Robert Haynes**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FBerlinProsperity/1/0100017c86014970-76a1b1d7-5c2e-424c-a828-c5b939ba3405-000000/eqs2p63s-G6KIZR2jy6tnxEsdG8=240)**for Berlin,**[**Ken Hilton**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FKHilton2021/1/0100017c86014970-76a1b1d7-5c2e-424c-a828-c5b939ba3405-000000/9jm9xtz1J4_qLr0ug6YQMcrBvgs=240)**for Somersworth, and**[**Dawn Johnson**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fdawn4laconia/1/0100017c86014970-76a1b1d7-5c2e-424c-a828-c5b939ba3405-000000/neInW4BycLKQ2b-Zmy-cW6FnsKA=240)**for Laconia. Take the time to check out these races and see if you’re able to make volunteer or monetary contributions.

****Finally, we’ve had an incredible series of events put on by our NH Young Republicans. This group is an important tool for the party, as it engages and energizes young conservatives to be active in the state party. Be sure to follow them on facebook, and share their events online so that they can continue to recruit new members from around New Hampshire! **

---
---
| **Stephan Stepanek
NHGOP Chairman **
---

# Check out this Press Release from Manchester Mayoral Candidate Victoria Sullivan
---
---
| Manchester, NH - [Victoria Sullivan](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fr20.rs6.net%2Ftn.jsp%3Ff=001SBNT30eb6cj6w5CW-oX2oxmrCknaOiKHxRE5oNtYvLFo-u-0DZfzEaRpV-EuXXB1rDm72-OXYtJqHTF0Ct4Hl5MuflZAmHvh3ZdjDi2dVGrMRjqqtp0-Q1PTpxx5JNE3fupbSkMzZk53CLETwx5y55izNY5blEC_yAc43utQcn4=%26c=Z6iShcy2lKBHSbWvZ_SqUa-2EcLuHRFo2980BZuasyCZZvQ6r2cv-g==%26ch=F3B8PDXHXr6-vqELz5F--ZIcax_4Vg0s9073m3MectvM6Jeq29Rkyw==/1/0100017c86014970-76a1b1d7-5c2e-424c-a828-c5b939ba3405-000000/Oji7lWEKq-u6qPEQPLs1TfqVUqY=240) issued the following statement on continued violence in Queen City schools after the student assembly at Memorial High School was canceled today because of safety concerns from the Manchester Police Department. Sullivan said the following:
"This incident is the latest in a string of headlines highlighting the failed leadership of our school district. Our city is in chaos under Mayor Joyce Craig, and it is now impacting our students at every level. Memorial High School is no longer permitted to have Friday night football games because [violence has broken out repeatedly at the games.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fr20.rs6.net%2Ftn.jsp%3Ff=001SBNT30eb6cj6w5CW-oX2oxmrCknaOiKHxRE5oNtYvLFo-u-0DZfzESFOS4SXf6W6FfVvrwOBx5PxhuGmZY9EqmYQq3b7Xc6e-aJsrNMmBg0oHHHJeLtziT2JgjY3LjFnO6j1Un--sC4=%26c=Z6iShcy2lKBHSbWvZ_SqUa-2EcLuHRFo2980BZuasyCZZvQ6r2cv-g==%26ch=F3B8PDXHXr6-vqELz5F--ZIcax_4Vg0s9073m3MectvM6Jeq29Rkyw==/1/0100017c86014970-76a1b1d7-5c2e-424c-a828-c5b939ba3405-000000/eNSdBPKu290d51LRKBIv3kyva3Y=240) Student assemblies are now deemed too dangerous to hold. Parents contact me almost daily about the violence and bullying happening in our schools.
"Joyce's solution is to put all of our high school students into one building when they cannot even control schools with smaller populations. This is unacceptable. Our students lost a year of their education and are now unable to assimilate back into the full-day school structure because the district failed them.
"At the end of the day, Joyce Craig serves as the chair of the Manchester Board of School Committee. The responsibility for providing a safe learning environment where our children are thriving falls squarely on her shoulders, as well as those serving on the school board. I have witnessed parents bring concerns before the school board where they were completely disrespected and dismissed.
**"What should we have done?"**
"In August of 2020, I presented a plan to the school board that would have allowed every child in the district to return to in-school learning on a daily half-day basis. The Mayor and the Board of School Committee ignored my recommendations.
"When the ARPA funds were being distributed, I suggested that part of the funds be used for family events at the schools where the parents and teachers could help reassure the children that it was safe to come back to school and re-assimilate with their classmates. That suggestion was also denied.
"Instead of alienating our parents, we should have utilized the programs available through the New Hampshire Department of Education - programs such as the dual capacity, Dr. Karen Mapp framework for parental engagement. This would have helped close the learning lag we are seeing from remote learning and aided in a smoother transition back into the school buildings.
"Put simply: The district should have worked to get the students back into school much sooner than they did. Manchester was one of the last districts to return to full-day in-person learning.
"My education plan builds on my experience as a legislator on the House Education Committee, as a parent, classroom volunteer, PTA president, and advocate for parents and children - as well as through my work on the state level in education. My plan has a comprehensive approach to combatting discipline issues, engaging parents, and supporting our students in an academically strong education. The simple fact is wecannot afford to allow this kind of negligence and mismanagement to continue.
"It is time for a serious change in Manchester. It is time to save our schools."
[To learn more about Victoria Sullivan's comprehensive plan to improve education in the Queen City, CLICK HERE.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fr20.rs6.net%2Ftn.jsp%3Ff=001SBNT30eb6cj6w5CW-oX2oxmrCknaOiKHxRE5oNtYvLFo-u-0DZfzERvENGV-0aILl25quhfLowRBieEKPnyHzSGykWMUDUiu975m8XeRtJ4Lj9TlmZxvfvx3v-kYfSv371AOSZ7FeWo_u9cYUxcsQmsytJw7zqRNMwO1iSgRoUn6R7KJThDtpg==%26c=Z6iShcy2lKBHSbWvZ_SqUa-2EcLuHRFo2980BZuasyCZZvQ6r2cv-g==%26ch=F3B8PDXHXr6-vqELz5F--ZIcax_4Vg0s9073m3MectvM6Jeq29Rkyw==/1/0100017c86014970-76a1b1d7-5c2e-424c-a828-c5b939ba3405-000000/WtZEW7BWgsiaOpaPipUc4Kc_aQY=240)

| **Thanks to the state budget we recently passed, Laconia taxpayers will save more than $1.25 million under the Statewide Property Tax. That’s direct relief for taxpayers, but the budget also helps property taxpayers in other ways by sharing funds with cities and towns.

For instance, we’ve increased revenue sharing under the Meals and Rooms Tax to 30 percent. That will mean more than $1.1 million going directly to Laconia in each of the next two years, helping to lower taxes. In addition, the two-year budget includes more than $23 million in Adequate Education Grants for Laconia schools.

I’m happy that our state budget is great news for hard working Laconia families.**
**Sen. Harold French****Canterbury**

| **The New Hampshire Federation of College Republicans is the officially chartered state organization for College Republicans all over the state of New Hampshire. With chapters at Saint Anselm College, Plymouth State, UNH, SNHU, Dartmouth, Franklin Pierce, and Keene State, the NHFCR has representation for a wide swath of the state. Executive board members include Chairman Ben Mickens, Executive Director Joseph LaCreta, Vice-Chair for CD1 Nate Twarog, Vice-Chair for CD2 John Michitson, Treasurer Kevin Chrisom, and Secretary Jessica Long. Our chapters are driven to keep college students engaged with conservative politics by bringing speakers to campus, presenting students with conservative internship opportunities in the state, and doing grassroots campaigning. The Federation board looks forward to helping get our chapters to a post-COVID reality while we work to keep Republican leadership in Concord as we push for Republican leadership in DC. **

clean_body: Special Elections, Fall Festivities, & Volunteer Opportunities and MORE! | | | | | | | | | | | | https:// ---|---|---|---|--- | Weekly Newsletter ** Note from Chairman Stepanek Weekly Governor's Glance **Upcoming Events House Republican Update Senate Republican Update Republican Spotlight Noteworthy News NHGOP Tweets NH Federation of Republican WomenNH Young RepublicansNH Federation of College Republicans | | Derek, I hope everyone has had a chance to enjoy the beautiful fall foliage that’s arrived in the Granite State. It’s during these autumn months that folks from around the country come to explore the stunning landscapes New Hampshire has to offer, and aren’t we blessed to call this state home? But New Hampshire is much more than a pretty place to live, it holds key values that make the “Live free or Die” state so special. We should all recognize the value in this sentiment, and understand the importance of ensuring that the integrity of these values is maintained. How so? Through electing Republican leadership. We have multiple campaigns happening right now across the state, and it’s without a doubt necessary that we all pitch in to the best of our ability. We have a special election in Cheshire County with candidate ****. On top of this we have Mayoral races across the state: Manchester, Rochester, Keene, Berlin, Somersworth, and Laconia. Take the time to check out these races and see if you’re able to make volunteer or monetary contributions. Finally, we’ve had an incredible series of events put on by our NH Young Republicans. This group is an important tool for the party, as it engages and energizes young conservatives to be active in the state party. Be sure to follow them on facebook, and share their events online so that they can continue to recruit new members from around New Hampshire! | Stephan Stepanek NHGOP Chairman | | | | | | | Check out this Press Release from Manchester Mayoral Candidate Victoria Sullivan | Manchester, NH - issued the following statement on continued violence in Queen City schools after the student assembly at Memorial High School was canceled today because of safety concerns from the Manchester Police Department. Sullivan said the following: "This incident is the latest in a string of headlines highlighting the failed leadership of our school district. Our city is in chaos under Mayor Joyce Craig, and it is now impacting our students at every level. Memorial High School is no longer permitted to have Friday night football games because Student assemblies are now deemed too dangerous to hold. Parents contact me almost daily about the violence and bullying happening in our schools. "Joyce's solution is to put all of our high school students into one building when they cannot even control schools with smaller populations. This is unacceptable. Our students lost a year of their education and are now unable to assimilate back into the full-day school structure because the district failed them. "At the end of the day, Joyce Craig serves as the chair of the Manchester Board of School Committee. The responsibility for providing a safe learning environment where our children are thriving falls squarely on her shoulders, as well as those serving on the school board. I have witnessed parents bring concerns before the school board where they were completely disrespected and dismissed. "What should we have done?" "In August of 2020, I presented a plan to the school board that would have allowed every child in the district to return to in-school learning on a daily half-day basis. The Mayor and the Board of School Committee ignored my recommendations. "When the ARPA funds were being distributed, I suggested that part of the funds be used for family events at the schools where the parents and teachers could help reassure the children that it was safe to come back to school and re-assimilate with their classmates. That suggestion was also denied. "Instead of alienating our parents, we should have utilized the programs available through the New Hampshire Department of Education - programs such as the dual capacity, Dr. Karen Mapp framework for parental engagement. This would have helped close the learning lag we are seeing from remote learning and aided in a smoother transition back into the school buildings. "Put simply: The district should have worked to get the students back into school much sooner than they did. Manchester was one of the last districts to return to full-day in-person learning. "My education plan builds on my experience as a legislator on the House Education Committee, as a parent, classroom volunteer, PTA president, and advocate for parents and children - as well as through my work on the state level in education. My plan has a comprehensive approach to combatting discipline issues, engaging parents, and supporting our students in an academically strong education. name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: 365 days a year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We can’t get complacent. We organize 365 days a year to re-elect AOC and build this movement.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211015-2591-header&t=1&akid=2591%2E2526796%2Eq8w42v)
Every cycle you see the same surge as election day nears. The political ads start dominating the commercials of your favorite shows. Organizers send text messages asking you to knock doors or phonebank. Candidates email asking you to chip in. And a flurry of other election-related activities pick up their pace — all in the last few months before voters hit the polls.
**This is all important work, but the problem is that most campaigns start seriously doing this outreach just a few months out from Election Day. But Team AOC does things differently.** We operate on a 365-day campaign model — engaging voters where they’re at _all year long._ We don’t take non-election years off from organizing, because we won’t make progress on winning the policies we need if we only engage in this work when it’s time to vote.
**The truth is a 365-day campaign takes enormous resources to operate.** While most campaigns spend millions of dollars in the final 90 days before an election, we strategically invest early in our organizing, communications, and advertising. That’s why it’s so important that we keep up with our monthly fundraising goals this year — but right now we’re about halfway through October, and we’re not halfway towards our goal.
**We’re just shy of our goal of hitting 10,000 donations before midnight tonight.** [Can you be the one to put us over the line by chipping in $3 to fund our important campaign work all year round?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211015-1?refcode=em20211015-2591-P_FND_MMF_GOL&t=2&refcode2=2591_2526796_q8w42v&akid=2591%2E2526796%2Eq8w42v)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211015-1?refcode=em20211015-2591-P_FND_MMF_GOL&t=21&refcode2=2591_2526796_q8w42v&akid=2591%2E2526796%2Eq8w42v)**
**Emails like the one you’re reading now are essential in funding all that we do.** The grassroots donations we collect from this email directly fund our important work to re-elect Alexandria and build our movement’s strength nationwide.
Thanks for everything,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211015-1?refcode=em20211015-2591-P_FND_MMF_GOL&t=22&refcode2=2591_2526796_q8w42v&akid=2591%2E2526796%2Eq8w42v)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20211015-2591-P_FND_MMF_GOL&t=23&akid=2591%2E2526796%2Eq8w42v)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=2591%2E2526796%2Eq8w42v) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=2591%2E2526796%2Eq8w42v) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=2591%2E2526796%2Eq8w42v)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

And a flurry of other election-related activities pick up their pace — all in the last few months before voters hit the polls. This is all important work, but the problem is that most campaigns start seriously doing this outreach just a few months out from Election Day. But Team AOC does things differently. We operate on a 365-day campaign model — engaging voters where they’re at all year long. We don’t take non-election years off from organizing, because we won’t make progress on winning the policies we need if we only engage in this work when it’s time to vote. The truth is a 365-day campaign takes enormous resources to operate. While most campaigns spend millions of dollars in the final 90 days before an election, we strategically invest early in our organizing, communications, and advertising. That’s why it’s so important that we keep up with our monthly fundraising goals this year — but right now we’re about halfway through October, and we’re not halfway towards our goal. We’re just shy of our goal of hitting 10,000 donations before midnight tonight. Emails like the one you’re reading now are essential in funding all that we do. The grassroots donations we collect from this email directly fund our important work to re-elect Alexandria and build our movement’s strength nationwide. Thanks for everything, Team AOC | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com

body:
Team --

Karen started as a community organizer, so she wants to make sure this campaign is grassroots from top to bottom. That means the strength of our online fundraising could make or break this campaign.

We set fundraising goals to ensure we have the resources to keep this movement to bring change to L.A. running full speed ahead. And to stay on track with spending this month, we need to raise $20,000.

**Sunday at midnight we 're going up against the first mid-month deadline of this campaign. Karen's building a campaign that's for the people of L.A., and that means she wants people from every zip code to be a part of it. clean_body: Team -- Karen started as a community organizer, so she wants to make sure this campaign is grassroots from top to bottom. That means the strength of our online fundraising could make or break this campaign. We set fundraising goals to ensure we have the resources to keep this movement to bring change to L.A. running full speed ahead. And to stay on track with spending this month, we need to raise $20,000. Sunday at midnight we 're going up against the first mid-month deadline of this campaign. Karen's building a campaign that's for the people of L.A., and that means she wants people from every zip code to be a part of it. So what do you say, will you chip in now to support her campaign for mayor? It doesn't matter where you live -- we want you to be part of this historic moment to make sure that every family, every neighborhood in Los Angeles has a mayor who will fight for them. Karen's running for mayor to create a pathway to progress for every single Angeleno. That means tackling homelessness, supporting working people, and listening to the needs of those who don't have a voice in the city. Our movement is powered by the people, so no single donation is too small. In solidarity, Team Bass Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of L.A.. Thanks to L.A.'s matching funds program, individual donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. | | In considering that October is Breast Cancer Awareness Month, I like to offer this to you Healthcare is taking care of the whole person. Dental, Vision, Auditory, Reproductive care, Mental Health- these are all parts of the whole of healthcare, and that list is by no means complete. I believe we must make sure affordable, accessible Whole Body Healthcare, for the total person, is available with equity, including physical, dental, hearing and mental care. This includes women's healthcare that are more uniquely focused, like mammograms.
---
|
---
| | [It is a known fact that MAMMOGRAMS SAVE LIVES.](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/62No0VJqd/c?w=EKXClcmk_xrWGRqZhnUoMWDVwFOza3UjgTcfAhZ4C3U.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYWNyYWNjcmVkaXRhdGlvbi5vcmcvTWFtbW9ncmFwaHktU2F2ZXMtTGl2ZXMiLCJyIjoiOTNmNGMzMmMtNzkyYy00NTVkLTQ1ZjEtNzk5YzRjZDNhNWI1IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZTQ2OTQxNmEtMWFmMS00NDM2LTg5ZjAtZDkzMjIzMTNkZDFhIn0)
---
| |
* Mammography has helped reduce breast cancer mortality in the U.S. by nearly 40% since 1990.
* 3/4 of women diagnosed with breast cancer have no family history of the disease and are not considered high risk.
* 1/6 breast cancers occur in women aged 40–49.

---
| | I believe Whole Body Healthcare is a fundamental right and I want to make it happen. [To do that I need your help.](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/62No0VJqd/c?w=WAqR6jf4yw7oCh9qs_qrPRgcFgFYsN4QUK9SOsbfXLY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JyZW50LWhlbm5yaWNoLWZvci13YXNoaW5ndG9uLTE_cmVmY29kZT1CQ0FlbWFpbCZhbW91bnQ9MTAwIiwiciI6ImY1NWNmYmU3LTNlZjEtNGM0ZS1hMzMyLWQxMDFjZjViZjliMiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9) I know you've heard this before - it isn't easy running a campaign, doing voter outreach and building a strong working team without big money donors like the Republicans are relying on. Every dollar, but more importantly every donor, matters. body:
How are we letting this guy win?
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37592779/311775139/-2023814932?refcode=20211015.9_TM_10DO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTcyMDQyNy0yZDJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VCHXIXZUoTsTMGMzIdHgj5aqImMMkKY2-Y0hyBLBQzk=)

| | Right now, I’m in the most competitive race of 2021 -- **recent polling shows that it's a statistical TIE, and it’s Donald Trump and the Republican party’s best shot at picking up a big win this year.** My Trump-endorsed opponent, Glenn Youngkin, has promised to spend $75 million of his own fortune on buying the Governor’s office. Youngkin’s a GOP extremist -- he was caught on video pledging to defund Planned Parenthood. He opposes Medicaid expansion, is anti-LGBTQ+, anti-woman, and pro-guns. His political mentor is Ted Cruz, and he’s been endorsed by Donald Trump SIX times. So you can imagine how confused I am about why people aren’t stepping up and donating. We’re blowing this one, Derek. [**Election Day is coming up in just over two weeks, and we can’t afford to slow down. clean_body: How are we letting this guy win? | | | = | | Right now, I’m in the most competitive race of 2021 -- recent polling shows that it's a statistical TIE, and it’s Donald Trump and the Republican party’s best shot at picking up a big win this year. My Trump-endorsed opponent, Glenn Youngkin, has promised to spend $75 million of his own fortune on buying the Governor’s office. Youngkin’s a GOP extremist -- he was caught on video pledging to defund Planned Parenthood. He opposes Medicaid expansion, is anti-LGBTQ+, anti-woman, and pro-guns. His political mentor is Ted Cruz, and he’s been endorsed by Donald Trump SIX times. So you can imagine how confused I am about why people aren’t stepping up and donating. We’re blowing this one, Derek. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** I just don’t get how we’re letting Youngkin roll over us and outspend us. People are acting like this is a sure thing -- that Virginia is a blue state. Let me tell you: it isn’t. People need to start stepping it up. This is a must-win race, and we’ve got to stand up to this guy. \-- Terry = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: Rod Dorilas
subject: Would you support a Black Trump Republican for Congress?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
body:
My parents came to the U.S. homeless to give me the American Dream. Now, I'm running for Congress to keep the American Dream, which saved our lives, a |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=0c930fbd7b284b5082a7e56f8e4b2bcd&_t=JKWvMPgiJnhfHElnBR4E2xuJSIxOpUYDj4AQ4-hrZHH6Yr0Qc-4jh4yj8r8e60Yf26yaGxyLUpMUJKvr_OwJWN0ODn8-HVMot5VoYPoPirSg0-A3yLaN_J3BefbRBHoWyTTjGeekgN00FtvwJlPAbSSabBhbr9_BJVoIlRlCpaw%3D).

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=0c930fbd7b284b5082a7e56f8e4b2bcd&_e=NisJ3UCtcOTjK7fEfGZGq7nHzq8Xmdlul7CRLHlkgM6xJa35LEuC73HpjftsEd468vN1l-ZRPdKg0X7TzqkDL8qxV1CiVj975stI2e8T5Jx0cZTlC6OARHlRhXvBrmggH9v1iMCSy0o5wbPm6z7r8xDid3aPsHznqPZz_aXUKKlUgU-uFsnfUPEVQq6ylvU2N2euD1Cz1H_U_a4uuTm0eF6T65Sb_sZSOut6QKHy9Iu6-1Pih9VurG84bT9CkQEpzr9FRhqU3JPo1lBW61Nuo-FTcAXLZMqA8xizoa2e5ja4Wrw7SwmgFme0xLIpYC1bi2Eddeg2AtiqcyZ2j4BGddvTumwbKWDuBB67Lm3-xBjT5gk24oElGoeZAqXPL5NrmskXHjGBhoiEohIur0gOKcJhXCvgFnzvEBhYY0SU6IOTcivss_MD5zYEpsUTWPiHUWywIofDubpNQOs9H6Btm8JYzbDUpugID7xQnCa3G0pmr2YUXbX6dF6MRdvRwZIb)

---
Peter,

Never believe the Left’s narrative that America is a racist country; that the American dream doesn’t exist anymore; or that the Constitution is a relic of the past that disproportionately benefits Anglo Americans.

I’m speaking with authority on the matter: **I’m a first generation Haitian-American whose parents came to this country, quite literally penniless, to pick crops in South Florida during the 1980s**. Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. **I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative**.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=0c930fbd7b284b5082a7e56f8e4b2bcd&_e=NisJ3UCtcOTjK7fEfGZGq7nHzq8Xmdlul7CRLHlkgM6xJa35LEuC73HpjftsEd468vN1l-ZRPdKg0X7TzqkDL8qxV1CiVj975stI2e8T5Jx0cZTlC6OARHlRhXvBrmggH9v1iMCSy0o5wbPm6z7r8xDid3aPsHznqPZz_aXUKKlUgU-uFsnfUPEVQq6ylvU2N2euD1Cz1H_U_a4uuTm0eF6T65Sb_sZSOut6QKHy9Iu6-1Pih9VurG84bT9CkQEpzr9FRhqU3JPo1lBW61Nuo-FTcAXLZMqA8xizoa2e5jZyurdSGXLgaow0n9UgmoDXyTs_vcx92IxNd5JmfvzLvwDtX8ha1ZbMp9eSdXaIIXqkBOgzwYXiNsCDHqDdN1iMn9KP9KF0GZxg4NN4i4LmnZVHtyIs8ZyUtVK8Yahc_SOabl3GY5N_K9OJRarORXbfNX9v3Aoy5jdBjkopc1X4YbMKO6mmBW3UmDokljOmYqNWF8Zhivn9xhqN22VCLLE-)
My name is Rod Dorilas and I’d like to tell you a few important things about me and why I’m writing to you today.
* I’m a military veteran (**I joined at 17**),
* I’m a lawyer (**I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school**)
* I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office.

**The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success.**

In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ _**freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction**_.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=0c930fbd7b284b5082a7e56f8e4b2bcd&_e=NisJ3UCtcOTjK7fEfGZGq7nHzq8Xmdlul7CRLHlkgM6xJa35LEuC73HpjftsEd468vN1l-ZRPdKg0X7TzqkDL8qxV1CiVj975stI2e8T5Jx0cZTlC6OARHlRhXvBrmggH9v1iMCSy0o5wbPm6z7r8xDid3aPsHznqPZz_aXUKKlUgU-uFsnfUPEVQq6ylvU2N2euD1Cz1H_U_a4uuTm0eF6T65Sb_sZSOut6QKHy9Iu6-1Pih9VurG84bT9CkQEpzr9FRhqU3JPo1lBW61Nuo-FTcAXLZMqA8xizoa2e5jY_oBfuRE_8U3g2k7HZcaQRzdn03XPpjqzadX1MoVvfwvQDMitrpXae_vVXts8xNNZ22-7Z4MmCaiYAd0uV4mTFLmDEbmfo7HGMmifbapZ1GV-MftFeubdFpcUgeyo9AWQS4fpR-ttW7k0Z9GTcFv2s-6y8CmseBKxRdcAiHQSfwGW-y7-ihKUpHLc5oU5WC1V72di-zklKWotB8WE_HcGg)
I’m asking you to continue reading the rest of this email, but if you cannot, **[please consider chipping in whatever you can spare to my campaign today](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=0c930fbd7b284b5082a7e56f8e4b2bcd&_e=NisJ3UCtcOTjK7fEfGZGq7nHzq8Xmdlul7CRLHlkgM6xJa35LEuC73HpjftsEd468vN1l-ZRPdKg0X7TzqkDL8qxV1CiVj975stI2e8T5Jx0cZTlC6OARHlRhXvBrmggH9v1iMCSy0o5wbPm6z7r8xDid3aPsHznqPZz_aXUKKlUgU-uFsnfUPEVQq6ylvU2N2euD1Cz1H_U_a4uuTm0eF6T65Sb_sZSOut6QKHy9Iu6-1Pih9VurG84bT9CkQEpzr9FRhqU3JPo1lBW61Nuo-FTcAXLZMqA8xizoa2e5jbcN6JFWuwiC-1HCD8id039Kkaq8Gl0Vm6FEnzsUBvBWzApGetAzAh6UCs-Zdb4QKGuy_EHSMAUT57Uk-71EupxoYal296lBjqcMJ2y7QO0XRaMfqAgfvgrgm01qJyui9n9FFm59s1UTh2V_OG_N5H10XWuYiidHH7mxq_B5_5i7xb8SWVYAK4C1yvBJhE8wwyjAV0IpAPIWvNF_-2Gh5YW)**. I’ve accomplished a lot in my short career, but I’m not independently wealthy and can’t fund my own campaign. I know I would be an effective voice for our party – I just need to make sure people in my district know who I am and what I stand for.

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville.
